summary: FUJIX Ltd. manufactures, distributes, and trades in various sewing and embroidery thread in Japan, Asia, and internationally. It offers industrial sewing, special use, decorative, machine embroidery, and other threads. The company also provides home-use sewing threads, such as synthetic fiber sewing, cotton sewing, silk sewing, special use, lock sewing, patchwork, decorative, temari, and other threads, as well as polyester and bobbin threads for embroidery. It serves the apparel, fashion, and related handicraft industries. The company was founded in 1921 and is headquartered in Kyoto, Japan.

Prored Partners CO.,LTD. provides management consulting services to companies in Japan. It offers cost management, strategy and hands-on consulting, PE fund support/PMI, SCM/logistics, and organizational strategy consulting services. The company also provides SaaS/IT services for PRO sign corporate real estate sector. Prored Partners CO.,LTD. was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

Life Intelligent Enterprise Holdings Co.,Ltd. engages in the alcoholic beverage, education, food, and other businesses in Japan. The company is involved in the retail discount of commercial food products; engages in the wholesale of meat; real estate business; renovation-related business; and employment support and other welfare services, as well as operates a nickel business. It also manufactures and sells alcoholic beverages, such as shochu under the Enma; ENMA; Kojiya Denbei; Sansui; and Rien brand name; and provides tests and teaching materials, videos, and video lessons for junior high schools. In addition, it provides individuals and group travel; and non-life and life insurance agency businesses. The company was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Charle Co.,Ltd. engages in the sale of apparel, cosmetics, and health food in Japan. The company operates through two segments, Sales of Ladies' Underwear and Manufacture and Sales of Ultra-Fine Bubble Technology Products. It provides women's underwear and innerwear, as well as men's and kids clothing; water saving shower heads; and skin, bathroom, body, and hair care products. It sells its products through mail order and door-to-door channels. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Kobe, Japan.

Anap Holdings Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the apparel retailing business in Japan. It is involved in retail and wholesale of clothes; licensing business; operation of beauty salons; provision of relaxation services; and bitcoin investment activity. The company was formerly known as ANAP Inc. and changed its name to Anap Holdings Inc. in April 2025. Anap Holdings Inc. was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

The Kaneshita Construction Co.,Ltd. provides design, planning, survey, supervision, investigation, and construction civil engineering and architectural works in Japan. The company undertakes civil engineering works, including roads, tunnels, bridges, rivers, and water and sewage facilities, as well as road pavement, erosion control, port construction, and landscaping and construction works. It also engages in the management of buildings; and provision of regular inspection, repair, cleaning, and maintenance management services, as well as disaster recovery services. In addition, the company manufactures and sells recycled mixtures as a recycled resource, as well as paving materials; and recycles industrial waste. Further, it is involved in the food and beverage business. The Kaneshita Construction Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1935 and is headquartered in Miyazu, Japan.

Car Mate Mfg. Co., Ltd. primarily manufactures and sells car accessories. It offers car wash chemicals; car interior accessories; car racks; deodorants; fragrances; in-vehicle carrier; light lamps; child seat; engine starters; cameras; tire chain; rod holders and repair parts; remote control engine starter; car security; GPS monitoring services; and household goods. The company also provides outdoor, leisure, bicycle-related products, and sporting goods, such as snowboard. Car Mate Mfg. Co., Ltd. was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Demae-Can Co.,Ltd operates delivery-specialized websites and apps in Japan. The company operates Demae-kan, a food delivery service that retails daily necessities, beverages, and other essential items, as well as engages in website operation and management, system development, advertising operation and management, and delivery agency services. It also offers Demaekan eGift, a gift certificate for dishes, food, and everyday items. The company was formerly known as Yume no Machi Souzou Iinkai Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Demae-Can Co.,Ltd in December 2019. Demae-Can Co.,Ltd was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Shibuya, Japan.

Origin Company, Limited manufactures and sells power supplies, semiconductor devices, precision machinery parts, system machinery, and synthetic resin paints in Japan. The Electronics division offers power supply products, including backup power systems, inverters, and multi-output power supplies used in dust collector, medical diagnostic equipment, semiconductor and optical manufacturing equipment, communication equipment, information and telecommunications equipment, and EV-related equipment. The Mechatronics division provides condenser type welding machine, flux less vacuum reflow, liquid bonding system, and precision liquid coating system. The Chemitronics division offers paints used for plastic substrates and plated nonferrous metals. The Components division provides precision machinery parts, including one-way clutches, torque limiters, torque hinges, reverse input shutoff clutches, and bearings. The company's Power Devices division offers rectifying diodes, silicon surge clamper, schottky barrier diodes, snubber modules, surge protector element and varistor, and SiC schottly barrier diode/SiC MOSFET. The company was formerly known as Origin Electric Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Origin Company, Limited in April 2019. Origin Company, Limited was incorporated in 1938 and is headquartered in Saitama, Japan.

Ikegami Tsushinki Co., Ltd. engages in the provision of broadcast equipment in Japan and internationally. The company offers broadcast equipment, including camera systems, digital cameras, HDTV camera systems, camera control units, base station, fiber camera adaptors, OLED and LCD viewfinders, system expanders, control panels, command converters, and mounting plate for studio/control room system, relay/broadcasting system/news gathering equipment, R2 remote production system, and helicopter tv system; medical equipment, such as output and medical grade cameras, LCD monitors, and digital video recorders; inspection equipment, including tablet inspection and printing system, medicine inspection equipment, tablet inspection machine, plane and single sheet visual inspection equipment for checking surface of films, panels, and metal foils; and security camera systems. Ikegami Tsushinki Co., Ltd. was formerly known as Ikegami Tsushinki Seisakusho and changed its name to Ikegami Tsushinki Co., Ltd. in 1951. Ikegami Tsushinki Co., Ltd. was founded in 1946 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Nichiwa Sangyo Co., Ltd. manufactures, processes, sells, and trades in compound feed products in Japan. It operates through Feed Business and Livestock Business segments. The company is also involved in the manufacture, sale, and brokerage of livestock and poultry equipment; breeding of livestock and poultry; production and sales of livestock products; processing of livestock products and food; sales of animal drugs; and the livestock medical treatment business. Nichiwa Sangyo Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1924 and is headquartered in Kobe, Japan.

The Kosei Securities Co., Ltd. provides investment and financial services in Japan. The company engages in the buying and selling securities, securities index futures, securities options, and foreign market securities futures; and underwriting and offering of securities or solicitation of sales to specified investors. It also provides intermediation, brokerage, and agency services for the buying and selling of securities, as well as for entrustment of the same. The Kosei Securities Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1961 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

ZUU Co.,Ltd. engages in the fintech platform and transaction businesses in Japan. The company offers ZUU Online, a financial media service platform; MP-Cloud, a content management system; and PDCA Cloud, a SaaS service that solves management and organizational issues faced by managers. It is also involved in internet advertising; digital marketing support; management consulting; asset management consulting; and merger and acquisition advisory businesses, as well as financial business, including wealth management, licenses, brokerage, insurance agency, and investment-based, loan-based, and equity investment crowdfunding. The company was incorporated in 2013 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

Futaba Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, designs, develops, manufactures, and sells electronic equipment, radio control, and manufacturing equipment in Japan, the United States, Europe, rest of Asia, and internationally. It operates through Electronic Systems; and Machinery and Tooling segments. The Electronic Systems segment comprises composite modules, radio control equipment for industrial and hobby, robotics products for drones and servos, organic light-emitting diode, touch panels, and VFDs, as well as industrial servos and transmitters. Its Machinery and Tooling segment consists of press die set components, mold base components, and precision plates, as well as equipment for automation and streamlining molding works. Futaba Corporation was incorporated in 1948 and is headquartered in Mobara, Japan.

Toso Company, Limited engages in the development, manufacturing, and marketing of interior products worldwide. It offers decorative and functional curtain tracks, motorized curtain tracks, doors, shades, and external roll-up curtains, curtain rail, hanging bar, laundry bar, Picture rail, tassel hook, tassel, partitions, venetian, dimmable, and roller blinds, roman shades, vertical and pleated blinds, and panel tracks, screen, colt, as well as peripheral parts for motorized products. It offers walking sticks and other items through agents, home improvement centers, and nursing care specialty stores. Toso Company, Limited was incorporated in 1949 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Nansin Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells casters, trolleys, roll box pallets, store supplies, and medical plastic parts. The company was formerly known as Nansin Rubber Industries Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nansin Co., Ltd. in July 1987. The company was founded in 1932 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Echo Trading Co., Ltd. engages in the sale of pet food and pet supplies in Japan. The company is also involved in the wholesale, pet education, sales promotion for pet supplies, internet, and specialty store businesses. The company's wholesale business covering alcoholic beverages, food, and related consumer goods. The company was formerly known as echo Sales Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Echo Trading Co., Ltd. in 1992. Echo Trading Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1971 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

NKK Switches Co., Ltd. engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of various switches for industrial. It operates through Japan, Europe and the United States, and Asia segments. It offers toggle, rocker, pushbutton, illuminated pushbutton, multi-function pushbutton, emergency stop, key lock, rotary, slide, tactile, and tilt switches; indicator lights; relays; sheet keyboards; touch panels; and accessories, as well as universal design products. The company's products are used in information and communication equipment, space satellite equipment, computers, FA automation equipment, aviation, railways, ships, medical care, disaster prevention, measurement and control equipment, semiconductor-related equipment, amusement, mobile communication, health and environment, and other fields. The company was formerly known as Nihon Kaiheiki Ind. Co., Ltd. and changed its name to NKK Switches Co., Ltd. in April 2014. NKK Switches Co., Ltd. was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Kawasaki, Japan.

Nichia Steel Works, Ltd. manufactures and sells wire products in Japan. It offers iron wires, zinc-plated iron wires, colored galvanized iron wires, and galvanized deformed coil rebars, as well as zinc, aluminum, and magnesium alloy plated iron wires; tertiary fences and wires; and civil engineering and architectural processed and pre-mesh processed products. The company also provides hard steel wires, galvanized steel wires, piano wires, zinc/aluminum/magnesium alloy plated steel wires, colored galvanized steel wires, steel flat wires, iron flat wires, deformed wires, stranded wires, coupling coils, and one-touch tunnels. In addition, it offers high strength and hexagon bolts, and hot dip galvanized high strength bolts. The company serves customers in industries, including construction and civil engineering, as well as agriculture, forestry, animal husbandry, fishery, electric power communication, and automobile industries. Nichia Steel Works, Ltd. was founded in 1908 and is headquartered in Amagasaki, Japan.

Apple International Co., Ltd. operates as an automobile exporter in Japan and internationally. It is involved in the franchise business of used cars; and auto auction business. The company was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Yokkaichi, Japan.

NISSHIN GROUP HOLDINGS Company, Limited plans, develops, constructs, manages, and sells condominiums in Japan. It is involved in the rental of real estate businesses; building management, management of rental properties, and other related services; and civil engineering works. The company also engages in the brokerage, rental brokerage, and renovation activities; real estate stock and securitization businesses; and purchase, resale, and renovation business of second-hand condominiums. In addition, it offers mortgage guarantees and housing loans to condominium buyers; plans, develops, and sells detached houses; and constructs apartment buildings. NISSHIN GROUP HOLDINGS Company, Limited was incorporated in 1975 and is headquartered in Shinjuku, Japan.

First Juken Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the construction and sale of single-family homes in Japan. It operates through Detached House Business; and Condominium Business, etc. segments. The company is also involved in the sale of renovated, refurbished, and second-hand condominiums; and provision of real estate rental services for condominiums and other properties. In addition, it engages in custom-built housing business; real estate sales, brokerage, placement, rental, and management; and non-life insurance agency and life insurance solicitation. Further, the company provides architectural and civil engineering design; construction supervision; construction; and consulting services. First Juken Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Amagasaki, Japan.

Daiken Co.,Ltd. manufactures and supplies various metal products primarily in Japan. It offers various building materials, including RS visor, clipped type louver, bolted type louver, grating, s-mat; door hardware/hanger rail, slidex, interior door hanger, and door hanger; hatch, including ceiling, floor, wall, and home floor; outdoor shed; and other products, bike rack, multi stocker, curtain rail, and HACCP. The company also exports products related to houses and buildings. The company was founded in 1924 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Noda Corporation manufactures, processes, imports, and sells woody and inorganic building materials, medium-density fiberboard, and plywood products in Japan. The company provides building interior materials, including flooring, inner wall, fixture members, staircase members, framework, and step products; exterior substrate materials for motor use; and home furnishings and fixtures, such as interior and sliding doors, closets, opening frame members, front hall storage racks, home storage units, and other products, as well as handrail members. It also offers laminated wood bonded with braces and structural hi-best wood; and imports and sells ordinary, concrete forming, structural, and painted plywood, as well as coniferous plywood, south-sea lumber plywood, and other products. The company was formerly known as NODA PLYWOOD Mfg. Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Noda Corporation in 1989. Noda Corporation was founded in 1902 and is headquartered in Taito, Japan.

Kawagishi Bridge Works Co., Ltd. engages in the production and construction of steel frames in Japan. It manufactures and sells precast concrete products for construction works. The company's products are used in the construction of high-rise buildings, skyscrapers, and large space structures. Kawagishi Bridge Works Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1947 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Shima Seiki Mfg.,Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, sells, markets, and services knitting machines, design systems, and automatic fabric cutting machines in Japan, Europe, the Middle East, rest of Asia, and internationally. The company offers computerized flat, and glove and sock knitting machines under the WHOLEGARMENT brand; and peripherals. It also provides SDS-ONE APEX series, which consists of an all-in-one system, a design system with integrated hardware and software; and APEXFiz, a design software subscription service. In addition, the company offers P-CAM, a series of automatic fabric cutting machines; P-LAB automatic labeling machines; P-SPR 2 spreading machines; PMK 1600/2000 inkjet marking plotters; CAD/CAM systems; and SHIMA KnitManager, a production management software. Further, it is involved in the provision of service and maintenance services; manufacture of machine parts; production of cashmere yarns; sale of REPAC and ReMateri yarns; operation of BLUEKNIT, an online shopping mall for knits; Auberge de South Terrace, a hotel located in Nanki Shirahama; food services business; and museum. The company serves the fashion, sports/outdoor, healthcare, shoes and accessories, home furnishings, automotive, aeronautical, and industrial materials industries. It exports its products. Shima Seiki Mfg.,Ltd. was founded in 1961 and is headquartered in Wakayama, Japan.

Nippon Shindo Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of copper and brass rods, forgings, and other products. The company offers brass rods and wires, as well as brass alloys. Its products are used in gas equipment, plumbing products, and air conditioners in the housing industry; screws, bolts, and nuts in the auto industry; and connectors for personal computers and audio equipment in the electronics industry. The company was incorporated in 1938 and is headquartered in Sakai, Japan.

Asaka Industrial Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells shovels and scoops in Japan. It operates through Daily Life Products and Logistics Equipment segments. The company also offers spades; outdoor equipment, including gardening tools; construction and agricultural equipment and tools; farming tools; physical distribution system components; store fixtures; hole diggers; forks; lopper and garden shears; and wooden products. In addition, it sells electric mobile shelves, rotating racks, transport equipment, and store equipment; and heavy, medium, and light weight racks. Asaka Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1661 and is headquartered in Sakai, Japan.

Naigai Co.,Ltd. engages in planning, manufacture, wholesale, import, and export of textile products in Japan and internationally. It offers men's, ladies', children's socks and panty stockings, etc. The company was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Unbanked,Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the gold bullion trading business in Japan. It operates through Gold Bullion and Non-Bank segments. The company is also involved in precious metals spot trading; gold investment, including Kinka, a cryptocurrency linked to the price of gold; corporate loans; loan-type crowdfunding; real estate secured lending; and money lending services. In addition, it provides access to blockchain-powered financial products; and on-chain services. The company was formerly known as Daiichi Commodities Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Unbanked,Inc. in July 2025. Unbanked,Inc. was incorporated in 1972 and is headquartered in Shibuya, Japan.

Kato Works Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of mobile cranes, and construction and industrial equipment worldwide. It offers rough terrain, city range, all terrain, truck, and crawler cranes; hydraulic excavators; crawler carriers; earth boring rigs; vacuum suction cleaners; street sweepers and snow cleaners; and compact track loaders, as well as spare parts. The company sells its products under the KATO brand. Kato Works Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1895 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Kogi Corporation manufactures and sells casting roll-related products, environmental equipment, and friction materials in Japan and internationally. The company operates through Casting Field, Environment Field/Environmental Engineering, and Environment Field/Functional Materials segments. It offers various rolling rolls, such as steel plates, wire rods, steel bars, H-shaped steel, angle steel, channel steel, and deformed steel bars; steel castings for steel ingot molds and automotive press molds; and rum, cylinder, manhole cover, iron cover, and grating. It also provides continuous cast-iron rods and general casting products. In addition, the company offers blowers, transvectors, vortex coolers, oil skimmer, gas cooler/refrigerated air dryer, and air filter/dedicated adapter; KC metal fibers; and waste incinerators, recycling equipment, and superheated steam application equipment. Further, it offers ACE automatic molding machine, V process automatic molding machine, gray cast iron, spheroidal graphite cast iron, and press die casting, as well as TGC600 technology. Additionally, the company provides mold products, such as bed, frame, table, molding board, column, housing, gear housing, and gear casing; heat resistant castings, and steel related casting mold, molding board, and throat metals; other molds, sinker, tundish cover, throat cover, and alloy mold; and cast-iron rods under the Dense Bar name. Kogi Corporation was founded in 1916 and is headquartered in Himeji, Japan.

Tokyo Soir Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells women's formal wear and accessories in Japan. It operates through Formal Business and Lifestyle Business segments. The company offers black and colored formal wear under the Tokyo Soir, Lanvin Noir, Aquascutum, Pierre Cardin, Fleur Noir Soir Perle, Individual, Soir Perle, Essence Soir Perle, Claire Noir, Soir Benir, Soir Neue, Soir Dolce, Emotional Dresses, Rifane, Soir Lab, Aproberry, Demikitte, Hitoiro Soir, Form Forma, Traumerei, Yukiko Kimijima, Lifanne Liz, Jenny Elbe, A.V.V. Noir, and Soir Rêve brands; and accessories under the Petit Soir brand. It is also involved in the provision of rental services for dresses and accessories; and operation of a salon. In addition, the company retails products in the food and drink, kitchen and dining, living, fashion, and health and beauty categories under the kuros brand. It sells its products through department stores, mass retailers, shopping centers, brick-and-mortar stores, and online stores. Tokyo Soir Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1949 and is headquartered in Chuo, Japan.

Sankyo Kasei Corporation manufactures, sells, and imports/exports chemicals, synthetic resins, dyes, pigments, paints, dyeing auxiliary poisonous, and deleterious substances in Japan and internationally. The company engages in the sale and import/export of building materials, electrical equipment and its parts, machines, tools, and other general goods; and processing, sale, and import/export of chemical fiber and natural fiber. It also engages in the research, development, manufacture, sale, and import/export of alcoholic beverages, drinking water, condiments, processed foods, and their materials; and building rental business. In addition, the company offers films for food and general packaging; various printing works; surfactants for textile materials and processing; and resins for paints and adhesives. Sankyo Kasei Corporation was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Gamecard Holdings, Inc. engages in gaming business. It is involved in the issuance and sale pf pachinko prepaid cards; development and sale of IC card systems and peripheral devices for pachinko and slot machines; and sales promotion support for pachinko parlors. The company was formerly known as Gamecard-Joyco Holdings,Inc. and changed its name to Gamecard Holdings, Inc. in October 2025. Gamecard Holdings, Inc. was founded in 1988 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Maruo Calcium Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells various calcium carbonate and other industrial raw materials in Japan. Its products include various type of colloidal calcium carbonates; light calcium carbonates; ground calcium carbonates; food-additive calcium carbonates; animal feeds; hydrated and quick lime; wet silica products; and minerals, including talc, clay, and silica powder. The company also imports and distributes wet silica products. Its products are used in sealants/adhesives/plastisols, films, plastics, paints, inks, rubber, food additives, and other applications. The company was formerly known as Maruo Seifun Goshi Company and changed its name to Maruo Calcium Co., Ltd. in August 1963. Maruo Calcium Co., Ltd. was founded in 1926 and is headquartered in Akashi, Japan.

Sonocom Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells screen printing materials and equipment in Japan. It offers screen printing plates, screen masks, metal masks, photo masks, and rotary screens, as well as screen printing equipment, including printers and mask washers. The company was formerly known as Sono Kogyo Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Sonocom Co.,Ltd. in April 1990. Sonocom Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1962 and is headquartered in Meguro, Japan.

Techno Mathematical Co., Ltd. develops software and hardware IPs in Japan. It develops and licenses image, audio, and voice-related software IPs for various types of digital devices; develops and licenses hardware IPs as design data mainly from silicon chips. The company develops video devices, FPGA design kits, and codec chips. It serves electronic device, entertainment, service, media, security, medical, construction, telecommunications, machines, automobile, agriculture, forestry, fisheries, and transportation industries. Techno Mathematical Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Takamatsu Machinery Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells machine tools. It offers CNC lathes, collet chucks, automobile part machines, IT-related manufacturing equipment, agricultural and food processing machines, etc. Takamatsu Machinery Co., Ltd. was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Hakusan, Japan.

ItoKuro Inc. provides education-related web media services in Japan. It operates various types of portal sites, such as Jkuku-Navi for cram school information used by parents of infants, elementary school, junior high school, and high school students; Minna-no-Gakko-Joho, a school information site for nursery, kindergartens, elementary, junior high, vocational, and high schools; universities; and other schools nationwide; Kateikyoshi-Hikaku-Net, a tutor search site for students and parents looking for tutoring agencies; Igakubu-Juken-Manual, a university information site for students and their parents who wish to become doctors; Igakubu-Yobikou-Guide, a portal site for information on medical school entrance exam prep schools; Kodomo Booster, a search and reservation site for information on lessons; and comolib, an information site for families and outings. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Shinagawa, Japan.

Denkyo Group Holdings Co.,Ltd. engages in the wholesale business. It offers household appliances, daily necessities, and electronic parts to electronics retailers, home improvement stores, mail order companies, and other retailers. The company also engages in the real estate rental business; design and construction of low-voltage equipment; parking lot management and non-life insurance agency businesses; and storage, delivery, installation, and repair of home appliances. Denkyo Group Holdings Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1948 and is based in Osaka, Japan.

AMG Holdings Co.,Ltd. engages in the construction and real estate-related businesses primarily in Japan. The company offers custom homes, commercial construction, property management, and rental, as well as consulting for large-scale repair work services. It is also involved in the design, construction, management, maintenance, and inspection of condominiums and detached houses. In addition, the company engages in the civil engineering business. AMG Holdings Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1986 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

Yoshicon Co.,Ltd. engages in the buying, sale, intermediation, leasing, management, and research of real estate properties in Japan. It also sells patent, utility model, design, and trust beneficiary rights; and construction and environmental materials. In addition, the company is involved in investment advisory; sale of electricity; and operation and management of parking lots and solar power plants, as well as attraction of commercial facility factories. Yoshicon Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Shizuoka, Japan.

Sanko Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells pressed products, mechatronic parts, and plastic products used in automobiles, business machines, and digital home appliances in Japan. It offers press-related products, including deep draw processing for automotive safety parts, airbag parts for automobile front passenger seats, DC-DC converters in-vehicle mounting parts, and driver airbag parts; and plastic-related products, such as battery terminals, junction boxes, fuse modules, and inverter terminal blocks. The company also provides slide mechanical units for on-vehicle meters, hinges for center consoles, hinges with impact locks, orthogonal 2-axis hinges, and parallel 2-axis hinges, as well as high-torque ceiling suspension hinges for in-vehicle monitors. The company was incorporated in 1945 and is headquartered in Shiojiri, Japan.

Corona Corporation manufactures and sells kerosene heating appliances in Japan. It offers kerosene fan and portable kerosene heaters, as well as household electrical appliances, such as dehumidifiers. The company was founded in 1937 and is headquartered in Sanjo, Japan.

Fujishoji Co.,Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells gaming machines in Japan. The company offers pachinko and pachislot machines. It is also involved in the planning, development, sale, and distribution of digital content. The company was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

TAKADAKIKO (Steel Construction) CO.,LTD. engages in the design, manufacture, and on-site construction of bridges, steel frames, and other steel structures in Japan. It is also involved in the design of new steel bridges; fabrication and on-site installation; design of existing bridge maintenance and repair works; fabrication and on-site installation; and design of bridge-related steel structures. In addition, the company manufactures and constructs steel frames for super-high rise buildings and large spatial structures. Additionally, it manufactures vibration control components; and civil engineering and marine-related steel structures. TAKADAKIKO (Steel Construction) CO.,LTD. was founded in 1921 and is headquartered in Chuo, Japan.

Felissimo Corporation engages in mail order business in Japan. It sells a sells clothing and accessories, clothing, personal items, daily necessities, housing, catalogs and internet catalogs for products, daily necessities, beauty and health products, handicrafts and leisure products, and food products. The company also operates a platform that enables business partners to list and advertise their products. Felissimo Corporation was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Kobe, Japan.

Avantia Co., Ltd. engages in the housing business in Japan. It is involved in the construction and sales of detached houses; planning, buying, and selling condominiums and commercial real estates; contracting of architectural work, civil engineering work, and plumbing work; renovation work; and real estate brokerage and rental businesses. The company was formerly known as Sanyo Housing Nagoya Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Avantia Co., Ltd. in January 2020. Avantia Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1989 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Senshukai Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the mail order, corporate, and insurance businesses in Japan. The company conducts mail order sales through catalogs and the Internet. It also operates Belle Maison net, a general online shopping site for various products, including fashion, interior, and Disney goods; Belle Maison catalogs; Belle Maison store; Monthly Club, a shopping style that delivers Belle Maison products on a regular basis; ihana.com, an online shopping site for flowers and gifts; gift catalogues; and TSUNAGU SENSHUKAI, a gift shop. In addition, the company provides Senshukai childcare, which operates nurseries and after-school care centers; Belle Maison life plan design; Belle Maison home staging, business support and sales promotion; and clothes and bedding cleaning services. Further, it provides points accumulation and purchase, insurance, and credit card services. Senshukai Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1946 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Asax Co., Ltd. provides real estate secured loans for individual and businesses in Japan. The company also offers real estate bridge, and purchase and construction loans, as well as loans for real estate agents. Additionally, it is also involved in the credit guarantee; and real estate rental and sale businesses. The company was incorporated in 1969 and is headquartered in Shibuya, Japan.

Kawase Computer Supplies Co., Ltd. provides print communication products and services in Japan. It offers data print services, variable printing, cloud-based data processing, business forms, and web to print solutions. The company also offers high-speed data, and on-demand printing solutions; and digital invoice delivery, and digital messaging delivery services. The company was formerly known as Kawase Shiko and changed its name to Kawase Computer Supplies Co., Ltd. in 1976. Kawase Computer Supplies Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1955 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Sun A.Kaken Company,Limited manufactures and sells packaging material-related products in Japan. It operates through Light Packaging Materials, Industrial Materials, and Functional Materials business segments. The company offers sealed bag for microwave cooking, easy peel open film lid, easy to open packaging material, PTP packaging sheets for medical products, air buffer packaging material, and air mat for disaster; base material for adhesive tape, release paper, and other special tapes; and surface protective film, antibacterial and anti-viral, clean room use and adhesive, and other functional products. Sun A.Kaken Company,Limited was incorporated in 1942 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

GRANDES, Inc. engages in the construction and sales of custom-built homes in Japan. It sells and invests in apartments, as well as provides construction contracting, and construction and real estate consulting services. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Oita, Japan.

Nikken Kogaku Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells wave-absorbing and foot-stabilizing products in Japan. The company offers wave dissipating, coastal revetment blocks, and other civil engineering products. It also provides coastal protection blocks, and riverbank disaster-prevention and environment protection blocks. In addition, the company offers natural stones and geosynthetics products. It serves land, infrastructure, transport, tourism, as well as government, and construction consultants and companies. Nikken Kogaku Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1950 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Nakayama Steel Works, Ltd. engages in the steel, engineering, building materials, and real estate businesses in Japan. It offers steel coil products, including hot, pickling, plated, slit, and striped /pattern coils; and steel sheet products, such as thick steel and NP steel plates, leveler sheets, and checkered steel and pattern steel plates, as well as hot rolled steel products. The company also provides bars and wire rod products comprising steel bars, burn-in- coils, and wire rods, as well as lightweight C-shaped steel products, steel pipes, steel sheets, secondary wire rod products, billets, and by-products. In addition, it offers steel fish, breeding, and seaweed reefs; and casting machine engineering products, including rolls, valves, and casting and processing equipment. Further, the company plans, designs, and constructs factories, warehouses, offices, etc. Additionally, it engages in manufacturing and processing of lightweight shaped steel products, electro sewn steel pipes, construction-related products, etc.; buying, leasing, brokerage, and sale of real estate properties; and port transportation and freight vehicle transportation businesses. The company provides general shipping and shipping brokerage services; and environmental services. The company was incorporated in 1923 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Almetax Manufacturing Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells aluminum building materials, electrical materials, and civil engineering products in Japan. The company engages in the development, design, production, and construction of various industrial materials, such as ceramic, glass, etc., as well as environmental and landscape materials, etc.; and development research, construction, and sale of new materials, new technologies, recycling, etc. It also offers aluminum building materials, decorative windows, functional windows, bay windows, screen doors, skylights, entrances, back doors, and bathroom doors; openings, such as lattices; and exteriors, such as handrails, balconies, terraces, carports, etc. The company was incorporated in 1969 and is based in Osaka, Japan.

Nakayamafuku Co.,Ltd. engages in trading home-use products in Japan and internationally. It is involved in selling storage, interior, frying pans and pots, and gardening supplies. The company offers its products through online, home centers, and supermarkets. It also imports and exports household metal ware, cooking appliances, lifestyle, sanitary, and storage products. Nakayamafuku Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1925 and is based in Osaka, Japan.

Wedge Holdings CO.,LTD., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the finance and content businesses in Japan and South-East Asia. The company offers financing services for the purchase of motorcycles. It also engages in the publication editing activities; planning and development of card games; created and published many games, books and comics; and production and distribution of company owned contents and music labels. The company was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Wedge Holdings CO.,LTD. operates as a subsidiary of Showa Holdings Co., Ltd.

Isamu Paint Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells paints, solvents, and building materials in Japan. The company operates through Paint Business and Other segments. The company provides automotive, general purpose/industrial, architectural, and aerosol paints. It also manufactures and sells coating equipment and rooms, as well as attached raw materials; designs, constructs, and contracts waterproofing and painting works; and leases and manages real estate properties. Isamu Paint Co., Ltd. was founded in 1927 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

HKS Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of automobile aftermarket parts in Japan and internationally. It offers exhaust systems, turbochargers, suspensions, electronic parts, original goods, NGV parts, and others. The company also development, production, and sale of automotive aftermarket parts, including mufflers, electronic control units, turbochargers, suspensions, cooling and heating systems, and engine components; and conversion kits for converting a gasoline vehicle into a compressed natural gas and gasoline Bi-fuel vehicle. The company is also involved in developing and selling light sport aircraft engines and a contract and original equipment manufacturing business. HKS Co., Ltd. was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Fujinomiya, Japan.

Seki Co., Ltd. operates in the printing and paper distribution industry in Japan. It offers general printing, packaging, publishing, advertisement and promotion planning and design production, event planning and operation, digital marketing system development, system development, and post office advertising agency services, as well as website planning, production, and operation services. The company is also involved in the processing of paper containers; and catalog mail order business, sells books and magazines, commissioned operation of museum management, and worker dispatching works. Seki Co., Ltd. was founded in 1908 and is headquartered in Matsuyama, Japan.

Nichidai Corporation develops, manufactures, and sells precision-forged dies and related forged products in Japan, Thailand, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Molds, Precision Parts, and Filters. The company offers precision forging dies that are used in the production of automotive parts; precision forged parts and assembly of precision parts; and sintered wire mesh filters which are used in the petrochemical, pharmaceutical, and food industries; chemical and nuclear plants; and the H-IIA rocket. In addition, its products include precision forging dies, such as press and former dies; formed products comprising cross joints, inner races, hypoid pinion gears, bevel gears, helical gears, and scrolls; and die sets, including hydraulic enclosing mechanism with pantograph system, hydraulic back pressure, and gas pressure enclosed die sets. Further, the company provides forging DX; precision forgings; and filters, as well as contracted development services. Nichidai Corporation was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Kyoto, Japan.

Imasen Electric Industrial Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and sells auto parts in Japan and internationally. It also manufactures and sells industrial machinery parts, health machinery and equipment, such as powerless walking support machines, as well as other transportation machinery and equipment parts. The company offers power seat adjuster, rear combination lamp, and electromagnetic swirl horn products. In addition, it offers DC converter, power seat/seat heater control ECU, and backup power supply related products. Further, the company provides electric wheelchair, rapok prosthesis, walking support machine, aircraft wire harness, and wire harness for machine tools. Additionally, the company develops, manufactures, and sells industrial cameras and image processing boards. The company manufactures and sells molds, jigs, and other machinery. Imasen Electric Industrial Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1939 and is headquartered in Inuyama, Japan.

Uematsu Shokai Co.,Ltd., a trading company, purchases and sells machinery, tools and industrial machinery and equipment in Japan. The company offers metalworking machines, forging machines, automatic programming, can manufacturing, and steel frame machines; cutting, work, power tools, air tools, measuring tools and equipment, tooling equipment, etc.; and industrial machinery, such as prime movers, oil and pneumatic equipment, compressors, labor-saving and rationalization equipment, loading and unloading equipment, welding machines, pipework equipment, storage equipment, environmental improvement equipment, ME equipment, chemical products, construction machinery, etc. It also provides conduction equipment comprising bearings, transmissions, transmission parts, variable speed gears, etc.; and steel materials, office automation equipment, food-related equipment, home appliances, seasonal products, etc. The company was incorporated in 1955 and is headquartered in Sendai, Japan.

Makoto Construction Co,Ltd., a construction company, designs, constructs, and sells detached houses in Japan. It operates through detached house sales, real estate brokerage, and real estate rental segments. The company constructs ready-built, contract housing, and custom-built houses, as well as condominiums. It also engages in renovation business; rental and management of office buildings, and apartments; and loan funding activities. The company was incorporated in 1991 and is headquartered in Sakai, Japan.

Takahashi Curtain Wall Corporation engages in the PC curtain wall and aqua businesses in Japan. The company designs, manufactures, and constructs exterior walls, precast concrete curtain walls, building components, and components for architecture. It also plans, proposes, designs, and constructs water facilities, water spaces, and water environments, including pools for hotels, schools, and sports facilities, as well as various types of hot spring baths; and design, manufacture, and install concrete components. In addition, the company is involved in system storage furniture and real estate leasing businesses. Takahashi Curtain Wall Corporation was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Chuo, Japan.

Bleach, Inc. operates a sharing-based integrated marketing business in Japan. It also provides marketing support services, including building overall strategy development and advice; advertising production; and advertising operations. The company was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Marufuji Sheet Piling Co.,Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the sale, rental, and repair processing of temporary materials for construction work in Japan. The company offers steel sheet piles, corner piles, lightweight steel sheet piles, H shaped steel, shaped steel, and covering plates; retaining walls, platform, and pier related products; temporary bridges and piers; wireless axial force monitoring systems; and marifuji clip, guardrail, and PC-ATM products. It also provides temporary stairs, shield machine back truss, shield machine support, tower crane support stand, iron troughs, rooftop steel frames, sieve for separating aggregates, stud dowel welding, and friction reducing material coating. In addition, the company offers RG construction and multiple anchor reinforced earth wall construction methods; driving and pulling works; and underground obstacle removal works. The company was formerly known as Marufuji Shoten Corporation and changed its name to Marufuji Sheet Piling Co.,Ltd. in March 1963. The company was founded in 1926 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

PIOLAX, Inc. designs, develops, produces, and sells various parts and products for the automotive, medical, and consumer and security industries in Japan, the rest of Asia, the United States, Europe, and internationally. It offers valves and fuel parts for filling, storing, and providing petrol; connectors for piping used around radiators; compact filters for fuel and oil systems; evapo-tube ASSY products; and connectors with the invented resin tubes. The company also provides powertrain parts, which include various springs that are used for transmissions, and snap rings used for holding parts; open-close parts, including air dampers, latches, and cushions for glove boxes; resin and metal fasteners for fixing automobile interior/exterior parts and connecting pipes to car body; and harnesses for bundling electric wires. In addition, it offers precision parts comprising retainers and tension springs to hold wheel caps; injection-molded parts for automotive interior/exterior; and visor-related parts and luggage board handles, as well as plate clamps and screw clamps. Further, the company provides medical appliances, such as spiral catheters and stents; and consumer and security products, including springs for combination faucets, and security parts to seal money bags or container vehicles, as well as hot water blocking valves and headphone wire bands. The company was formerly known as Kato Hatsujo Inc. and changed its name to PIOLAX, Inc. in October 1995. PIOLAX, Inc. was founded in 1933 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.

Tomita Co., Ltd. distributes machine tool products in Japan and internationally. The company provides general-purpose and CNC lathes, milling, drilling, broaching, boring, gun drilling, electrical discharge, additive manufacturing, cutting, laser processing, sheet metal, forming, injection molding, and other machines; machining centers; grinders; gear processing machines, including cutting, finishing, honing, shaving, and hobbing; and CNC routers and light metal/plastic/wood processing machines. It also offers pneumatic and hydraulic equipment; cutting tools and abrasives; power transmission products; electronic components; measuring equipment; metal working related devices; dust collectors and washing machines; coolant units; material handling equipment; heat treatment and environmental equipment; welding equipment; molding machine related equipment; and other products, as well as electric equipment, tools, conduction equipment, drives, tools, and instruments. In addition, the company provides automation, retrofit, and customized devices/machines; robots/loaders/conveyors; CAD/CAM systems; and production management systems/software products, as well as imports machinery and tools. It also sells its tools via mail orders. Tomita Co., Ltd. was founded in 1911 and is headquartered in Chuo, Japan.

Naito & Co., Ltd., a trading company, engages in sale of cutting tools, mechanical tools, industrial equipment, machine tools, and other products in Japan and internationally. The company's cutting tools include carbide tools, special steel tools, abrasives, and diamond tools; and measurement equipment comprise 3D measuring machines, shape measuring devices, optical measurement devices, torque machines, various test equipment, foreign object detectors, and others, as well as vernier calipers, micrometers, dial gauges, and gauges. Its industrial devices consist of tooling products, complementary tools, pneumatic equipment, hydraulic equipment, environmental equipment, and working tools; and machine tools comprise lathes, milling machines, machining centers, grinding machines, electric discharge machines, robots, and CAD/CAM systems. The company was founded in 1945 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Sanyei Corporation engages in the wholesale and retail of furniture and houseware, fashion accessories, and home appliances in Japan and internationally. It operates through Furniture and Household Goods Business, Fashion Goods Business and Home Appliance Business segments. The company offers furniture and interior products, as well as housewares under the foxx chair and Formio brands; operates online furniture store under the MINT brand; operates garden exterior goods store under the Tsukuri brand; footwear under the BIRKENSTOCK, Orthofeet and BENEXY brands; and bags under the Kipling and uF brands. It also provides environment friendly products, including watches under the Our Earth Project and YOT WATCH brands; hair products under the mod's hair brand; and home appliances and cooking equipment under the Vitantonio and MULTI CHEF brands, as well as operates pet salons, hotels, veterinary hospitals, and pet-related products retail stores under the Pepica brand. In addition, the company offers services, such as shipping, fulfillment and product procurement under the Thirdlogi brand and retails emergency supplies through online platform under the BOUSAI DIRECT brand. The company was formerly known as SANYEI Boeki and changed its name to Sanyei Corporation in 1971. Sanyei Corporation was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Seiryo Electric Corporation operates in the information and communication technology sectors in Japan. It offers radio system and tracking management solutions comprising automatic vehicle monitoring, disaster prevention and administrative radio, airport vehicle positioning, cloud-based telemetry, IP radio, and golf irrigation management systems for local government and private sectors. The company also provides security and visual information solutions, such as closed-circuit television, digital signage, and intruder-monitoring security sensor systems; and tsunami alerting, river information, sluice gate control and management, road traffic and weather information, and sediment and weather condition notification systems, as well as road information systems for submergence. In addition, it offers radio communication equipment, as well as consulting, designing, and operation of systems. The company was incorporated in 1966 and is headquartered in Kita, Japan.

Yutaka Giken Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells automobile parts in Japan, North America, China, Asia, and internationally. The company offers torque converters; motor system; thermal management; brake system; exhaust system; and drive system. It also provides BELT POWER X, a work assistance device; M-BASE, general-purpose frame; and wind heating system for households. The company was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Hamamatsu, Japan.

Daisui Co.,Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the wholesale of marine products in Japan. It also offers fresh and salted fish, and refrigeration warehousing services. The company supplies its products to supermarkets and restaurants. It also exports its products. Daisui Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1939 and is based in Osaka, Japan.

Heiwa Paper Co.,Ltd. engages in paper trading activities in Japan and internationally. The company imports, develops, sells, and exports specialty papers, high-grade papers, industrial papers, and other paper materials. It also provides fancy papers, fine boards, printing papers, and basic papers; and engages in the development and commercialization of paper products. Heiwa Paper Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1946 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Eidai Kako Co.,Ltd. manufactures, imports, and sells resin sheets in Japan. It operates through two segments, Automotive Supplies-Related and Industrial Materials-Related. The company offers plastic profile extrusion molding products comprising interior and exterior components for electric appliances, interior and exterior materials for housing, interior and exterior components for office furniture, car floor mats, and bathtub covers, as well as AW mats and floor carpets. It also provides semiconductor-related parts, including stick magazines and storing IC devices and various electronic components; industrial parts that are used in the field of terminal block covers, LED lighting covers, aircraft parts, and escalator sliding parts; sewer pipe rehabilitation materials; and components for air conditioners, refrigerators, and washing machines and lighting fixtures for dryer stands, hoses, and refrigerator gaskets. The company also imports and exports its products. Eidai Kako Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Kitakei Co., Ltd. engages in the sale and installation of new building materials, housing equipment, and other products in Japan. It provides wooden building materials, including interiors doors, closets, floors, system storage, and staircase sets; non-wood building materials, such as gypsum board, insulation, roofing materials, non-combustible board, and siding products; and Lauan and softwood plywood products. The company also offers wood products comprising wood structural and construction materials, flooring, and laminated boards; housing equipment, including system kitchen, unit bath, vanities, toilet, air conditioning equipment, combustion equipment, and solar panels; and other products, such as sashes, exteriors, chemical products, and architectural hardware and tools. In addition, it is involved in the construction of exterior walls, housing, roof, structural frame, interior, and sash; and solar power generation system, as well as provision of ancillary services. The company offers its products to lumber stores, building material stores, construction companies, housing companies, etc. Kitakei Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1950 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Pegasus Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells industrial sewing machines in Japan, China, Bangladesh, rest of Asia, the United States, Europe, and internationally. It operates through Apparel Machinery Business and Automotive Business segments. The company offers overlock and safety stitch, interlock and double chain stitch, automatic and labor-saving unit, and non-apparel industrial sewing machines. It also produces and sells automotive parts comprising seat belt, antenna, lamp, harness, auto door, door mirror, auxiliary lamp, headlight, wiper, and display parts. The company was formerly known as Pegasus Sewing Machine Mfg. Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Pegasus Co., Ltd. in April 2023. Pegasus Co., Ltd. was founded in 1914 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Wowow Inc. provides broadcasting and related services in Japan. It procures and produces programs through broadcast satellite, as well as offers services through cable television, communication satellite, and IPTV. The company also provides telemarketing services. The company was formerly known as Satellite Broadcasting, Inc. and changed its name to Wowow Inc. in December 2000. Wowow Inc. was incorporated in 1984 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

J.E.T. Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the design, development, manufacture, sale, and after-sales maintenance service of semiconductor cleaning equipment in Japan, South Korea, China, Taiwan, and internationally. The company offers batch type and single wafer cleaning equipment; and inspection and manufacturing equipment for lithium-ion batteries comprising electrolyte leak inspection devices and ultrasonic bonding systems. The company also provides organic agricultural products. The company was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Asakuchi, Japan. J.E.T. Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Zeus Co.,Ltd.

Cookpad Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the cooking business in Japan. The company offers Cookpad, a recipe posting and search service; Cookpad Mart, an online marketplace for fresh produce; moment, an AI camera that analyzes cooking and provides specific advice; and other related services. It also provides Cookpad News, an online cooking magazine; and Tabemiru, an analytical tool that accumulates recipe search data. The company was formerly known as Coin Ltd. and changed its name to Cookpad Inc. in June 1999. Cookpad Inc. was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Meguro, Japan.

Nihonwasou Holdings, Inc. engages in the sales intermediation of Japanese clothing and accessories. The company provides educational guidance for kimono and sewing; tailoring and sewing of kimonos; Kimono maintenance and sales promotion agency services; and production management consulting services, as well as engages in the wholesale business of Japanese clothing and accessories. It research, develops, and sells kimono accessories; manufactures and sells textiles; and operates the men's Kimono specialty stores. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Mamiya-OP Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells electronic and sports equipment in Japan and internationally. The company also provides CR units; ticket-vending machines; banknote transfer system equipment; bill validators; medal and coin hoppers; IC card readers/writers; and physical random number generators. It also offers golf shafts, blocking rods, vault poles, arrows, and bows. In addition, the company is involved in the buying, selling, brokerage, leasing, and management of real estate properties. Further, it provides automatic lawn mowers; system solutions; and mobile order system. Mamiya-OP Co., Ltd. was founded in 1931 and is headquartered in Hanno, Japan.

Nankai Plywood Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells interior building materials in Japan. The company operates through Wood-related business, Electric wire-related business, and General piping-related business segments. It offers storage, floor, and ceiling materials; and staircase and stair railing, slide doors, fittings, and other products. It also sell electric wires and electrical equipment, as well as provides piping and lining work for chemical plants. The company was founded in 1942 and is headquartered in Takamatsu, Japan.

Endo Manufacturing Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells golf club heads, metal sleeve products, automobile and two-wheeled vehicle parts, forged components, aircraft parts, and medical devices in Japan and internationally. The company offers automobile, two-wheeled vehicle, and agriculture machinery parts, such as connecting rods, suspensions, yokes, hub units, transmission, gears, shafts, cranks, shift forks, camshaft, and arm lifts; golf club iron heads; dynamic/static blades for large turbines, hydraulic cylinders and joint parts, hydraulic dampers and piston rods for rolling stock, rock crushing machinery parts, and linear guides. It also provides metal sleeve products, including fuser rollers, heating rollers, battery cases, motor covers, seamless belts, seamless rings, motor parts, drive belts, electronic parts, and optical parts; golf products, such as irons and wedges under the EPON GOLF brand. In addition, the company offers medical devices comprising hip stems, acetabulum cups, trauma plates, knee joint and femoral components, and shoulder joint stems; engine parts for aerospace field. The company was incorporated in 1950 and is headquartered in Tsubame, Japan.

Kikukawa Enterprise, Inc. engages in the manufacture and sale of sawmilling and woodworking machinery in Japan. It provides glue laminated board and CLT, lumber core and other wood, and plastic and printed circuit board machines; wide belt sanders, and plywood and boards; and musical instruments, and building materials; and machine tools for FMC polyfoam models, railway vehicles and automobiles, aircrafts, and various metal products. The company was formerly known as Kikukawa Iron Works, Inc. and changed its name to Kikukawa Enterprise, Inc. in October 2012. Kikukawa Enterprise, Inc. was founded in 1897 and is headquartered in Ise, Japan.

Livesense Inc. engages in the internet media business in Japan. The company operates Machbaito, a part-time job recruitment website; and Tenshoku Kaigi, a job-change review site that provides job seekers with information posted by site members, including company reviews, official company information, job openings, and information sent out by the companies. It also operates TenshokuDRAFT, a job-change service for IT engineers; IESHIL, which provides real estate information services; and baton, a cloud-based online interview service. Livesense Inc. was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

The Takigami Steel Construction Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and constructs bridges, steel frames, steel towers, and other steel structures primarily in Japan. It is also involved in construction work, as well as repair and reinforcement work. The Takigami Steel Construction Co., Ltd. was founded in 1895 and is headquartered in Handa, Japan.

Tigers Polymer Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells rubber hoses, sheets, and molded products primarily to automotive, electrics, air conditioning, construction and housing, and industrial materials markets in Japan, Southeast Asia, the Americas, and China. It offers home appliance hoses for vacuum cleaners, washing machines, and air conditioners; and industrial hoses for use in general industrial, residential, and civil engineering and construction fields. The company also provides natural, synthetic, special, and urethane rubber sheets for use in packing materials, cushioning materials, mats, silicone rubber moldings, and fluoro rubber stopper. In addition, it offers rubber and resin molded products; and electrical facility materials. The company was formerly known as Tigers Rubber Inc. and changed its name to Tigers Polymer Corporation in June 1973. Tigers Polymer Corporation was founded in 1938 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Ohmoriya Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells seaweed and other seaweed-derived products in Japan. It offers seasoned powders, dried seasonings for green tea over cooked rice, dried seasonings for soups, and others. The company was founded in 1927 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Sanyo Homes Corporation engages in the construction business in Japan. It operates through two segments, Housing Business and Condominium Business. It is involved in the designs, construction supervision and contracting, sales, and other activities for housing, asset utilization, and residential remodeling. The company also develops, rents, sells, and other activities for condominium buildings. The company also manages condominiums and nursing/child-care/after-school facilities, as well as develops and sells personal care robots. Sanyo Homes Corporation was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Leader Electronics Corporation engages in the research and development, manufacturing, and sale of electronic measuring instruments in Japan. The company provides video and broadcast related products, such as waveform monitors, rasterizers, IP, handheld, SG, etc.; and accessories, which includes rack mount adapters, blank panels, power supplies, and other related products. It also offers SFR-Fit, a software for measuring the modulation transfer function. The company was formerly known as Ohmatsu Denki Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Leader Electronics Corporation in 1966. Leader Electronics Corporation was incorporated in 1954 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.

Mitsuchi Corporation manufactures, delivers, and sells custom fasteners for automotive components in Japan. The company offers engines, seats, powertrains, steering, rear-door locks, airbags, brakes, window regulators, undercarriage, and suspension systems; cold-forged products, including deformation, hole machining, gear processing, hole and gear processing, and forming and forging products. It also provides assembled products for window regulators and rear-door locks; and sun quick nuts, all quick nutters, and quick joints. The company was formerly known as Mitsuchi Byora Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Mitsuchi Corporation in February 1975. Mitsuchi Corporation was incorporated in 1963 and is headquartered in Kasugai, Japan.

Taiyo Kisokogyo Co.,Ltd. engages in the civil engineering business in Japan. It operates through six segments: Special Civil Engineering Work, Housing-Related Construction Business, Environmental-Related Construction Business, Construction Business, Machinery Manufacturing and Sales Business, and Renewable Business. The company engages in housing correction work; building construction and renovation business; manufacture and sale of construction machinery; and sale of solar power generation and renewable energy. The company undertakes underground special civil engineering work, such as underground continuous walls, underground obstacle removal, ground improvement and pipeline work in various fields, liquefaction countermeasure work, as well as slope reinforcement work. It is also involved in the soil contamination remediation, geothermal energy utilization, and urban redevelopment activities. Taiyo Kisokogyo Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

Fukuvi Chemical Industry Co.,Ltd. engages in manufacturing, processing, and sale of synthetic resin products and inorganic compounds in Japan and internationally. The company operates through Construction Materials, CSE Business, Precision Business, Global Business, and Other segments. It manufactures and sells plastic extrusion of construction and industrial products under the Fukuvi brands. The company also provides skirting boards, wood plastic composite products, ceilings, multi-layer flooring products, inspection opening frames, plastic transitions, and rustication strips, as well as corner beads for walls. In addition, the company engages in development, manufacture, and sale of exterior and interior building materials, floor-related materials, system building materials, etc. Further, it manufactures phenolic foam insulation board and provides management services. It serves original equipment manufacturer. Fukuvi Chemical Industry Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1947 and is headquartered in Fukui, Japan.

Mercuria Holdings Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the fund management business in Japan, China, Hong Kong, the Cayman Islands, and internationally. The company offers investment advisory and management, financial, and asset management services. It also manages the Spring real estate investment trust; asset management operations of Enex infrastructure investment corporation; advisory and support services for the transaction, leasing, and management of real estate, infrastructure facilities, machinery and equipment, and standing timber; matching site provider for SMEs; family office advisory business; and consulting business. In addition, it is involved in agency business. The company was incorporated in 2021 and is headquartered in Chiyoda, Japan.

Zett Corporation engages in the manufacture and wholesale of sports equipment in Japan. The company offers baseballs bats, basketball wear, gloves, and other apparel products. It also operates Z-NET, an online ordering system to search and place orders from approximately 3,000 stores. The company was formerly known as Watanabe Corporation and changed its name to Zett Corporation in 1980. Zett Corporation was founded in 1920 and is based in Osaka, Japan

Cross Plus Inc. engages in the planning, manufacturing, and sale of apparel and non-apparel products in Japan. It is involved in the manufacture and wholesale of women's and men's clothing, fashion accessories, lifestyle products, and cosmetics, as well as provision of related guidance and consulting services. The company also provides child development support services, including therapeutic support for preschool children with developmental disabilities. It serves apparel companies and general consumers through stores and e-commerce. The company was formerly known as Sakuraya Shoji Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Cross Plus Inc. in August 2001. Cross Plus Inc. was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

Aigan Co.,Ltd. develops and operates existing stores and provide solution a chain of eyeglasses specialty stores in Japan. The company offers eyeglasses, hearing aids, sunglasses, and other related products. Aigan Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1961 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Atom Livin Tech Co., Ltd. plans, develops, and sells interior hardware products in Japan. It offers door locks; hinges; slide hinges; swing door fittings; sliding door locks and hardware; top-hung sliding door fittings; movable partition fittings; folding door fittings; aluminum interior fittings; handles and pulls; slide rails and wire baskets; storage and hanging hardware; clothes drying fixtures and other fittings; brass antiques; and other furniture hardware under the ATOM brand name. The company sells its products through online and hardware stores. It serves furniture manufacturers, construction hardware stores, house builders, and housing equipment manufacturers. The company was founded in 1903 and is headquartered in Taito, Japan.

Pacific Metals Co., Ltd. produces and sells ferro-nickel and ferro-nickel slag products in Japan and internationally. It operates through Nickel, Gas, and other business segments. The company offers ferro-nickel that is used as a raw material for stainless steel; ferro-nickel slag that is used as a civil engineering material and mineral slag products. In addition, it is involved in waste recycling business. Further, the company engages in transport contracting and real estate businesses, as well as produces and sells oxygen, argon, and nitrogen gas. The company was formerly known as Nisso Steel Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Pacific Metals Co., Ltd. in January 1970. Pacific Metals Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1949 and is headquartered in Hachinohe, Japan.

Yuken Kogyo Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells hydraulic equipment and systems, and environmental machinery in Japan and internationally. The company offers hydraulic pumps and motors; proportional electro-hydraulic controls; pressure control, flow control, directional control, modular, logic, and linear servo valves; AC servo motor driven pumps, as well as hydraulic cylinders; piston and vane pumps, actuators, and hydrulic power units/power packages; and accessories and others. It also provides various hydraulic systems for industrial machine and marine use; special hydraulic power units; and various power packs. In addition, the company offers PET bottle compacting presses; automatic chip compactors; and various garbage compactors/separators; and waste plastic and plastic bags, drum compactors, food waste pressure separators, and cardboards, as well as metal chips, and oil and beverage cans. Yuken Kogyo Co., Ltd. was founded in 1929 and is headquartered in Ayase, Japan.

Daishin Chemical Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells various paints and chemicals in Japan. The company's products include lacquer, melamine, acrylic resin, urethane resin, epoxy resin, plastic, and paint thinners; printing ink solvents, cleaning solvents, and industrial organic solvents; and paint removers, salt-reducing agents, as well as ethanol and other products. It also offers reagents to support various tests, basic research, analysis, and environment, as well as product development, including pharmaceutical, textile, food, and electric products development. It sells its products to paint manufacturers, and printing ink and other industrial sectors through a network of sales agents. Daishin Chemical Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1952 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Kyowakogyosyo Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells hexagon bolts, JIS hexagon socket head cap screws, bolts for construction machinery and internal combustion engines, cold-forged parts for automobiles, and special cold-/hot-forged parts in Japan and internationally. It also offers automobile parts, such as transmission, steering and suspension, and other forging parts; gears; and industrial bolts and bolts for internal combustion engines. The company was founded in 1950 and is based in Komatsu, Japan.

Seiwa Chuo Holdings Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the wholesale of general steel products in Japan. The company also provides processing, contract work, and cargo handling services. Seiwa Chuo Holdings Corporation was incorporated in 1954 and is based in Osaka, Japan.

KYORIN Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, researches and develops, manufactures, and sells ethical and generic drugs in Japan and internationally. The company offers Flutiform, a drug for the treatment of asthma; Lyfuna for cough treatment; Desalex, an antiallergic agent; Beova, and Uritos KYORIN therapeutic agents for overactive bladder; Lasvic, a quinolone synthetic antibacterial agent; Pentasa, a remedy for ulcerative colitis/Crohn's disease; Nasonex and Mometasone KYORIN, which are used as allergic rhinitis therapeutic agents; and Kipres, a leukotriene receptor antagonist anti-bronchial asthma and allergic rhinitis drug. It also provides Mucodyne, a mucoregulating drug; GeneSoC, a real-time PCR system; Rubysta, a disinfectant cleaner; Milton, a disinfectant; over-the-counter drugs; and prescription medicines and quasi-drugs, and diagnostics business. In addition, the company offers subcontracted drug manufacturing services. It has development and commercialization agreement with Hyfe Inc. for digital therapeutics (DTx) for chronic cough. The company was formerly known as KYORIN Holdings, Inc. KYORIN Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1923 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Otake Corporation engages in sale of plumbing, housing, and air conditioning equipment. It offers valves, fittings, pipes, meters and gauges, support hardware products, housing equipment supplies, and plumbing machine tools. The company also provides polyurea and mouse shield products. Its products are used in chemical and industrial sectors, as well as the production activities of factories and plants comprising supplying heavy oils and energy, cooling and cleaning water, transporting beverages and chemicals during manufacturing processes, and exhausting steam and gas. The company was formerly known as Otake Shoten Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Otake Corporation in 1988. Otake Corporation was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

KOSE R.E. Co.,Ltd. plans, develops, and sells apartments in Japan. The company develops residential, asset management, and second-hand condominiums. It is also involved in the real estate rental property management, development and construction, and building maintenance businesses. The company was incorporated in 1990 and is headquartered in Fukuoka City, Japan.

Taihei Machinery Works, Limited engages in the manufacture and sale of plywood machinery, woodworking machinery, and building materials for home applications in Japan. It operates through three segments: Plywood Machinery Business, Woodworking Machinery Business, and Housing Construction Materials Business. The company offers artesa, dryer, and horizontal hot press products, including Knife Grinder ARTESA I V94-AC and Knife Honer ARTESA II V95-AC; Roll Jet Dryer/SRJ-125; Type VF-5(4) Vacuum Pre-feeder; Horizontal Hot Press/P25-AB; and Automatic Infeed Device IRETARO/P91-AB. It also provides T-Scanner DX, which measures the condition of wood by scanning it with a laser camera, and extracts defects, such as its shape, knots, and insect bite; and finger jointing system. In addition, the company manufactures underfeed chipper, rapier, and shak racer. Further, it sells and renovates custom-built house; and sells wooden building materials for construction. Taihei Machinery Works, Limited was incorporated in 1925 and is headquartered in Komaki, Japan.

Kanefusa Corporation engages in the manufacture and sale of industrial and machine knives, sawblades, tools, and machinery parts in Japan and internationally.
