Dkk-Toa Corporation was incorporated in 1944 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

KVK Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures, processes, sells, and installs water faucets in Japan, China, and the Philippines. The company offers bathroom and kitchen faucets, as well as washstand faucets for hair and face washing; sink fixtures; pipe fittings and plumbing equipment; and other faucet parts. It also provides water supply and drainage fittings; and joints and piping components. KVK Corporation was founded in 1939 and is headquartered in Gifu, Japan.

Fines inc. provides video production services in Japan. It offers video distribution platform; marketing data centralized management tools; and DX consulting; and reskilling training and e-learning services, as well as security solutions. The company also provides online reservation systems. Fines inc. was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

Zuiko Corporation designs, develops, manufactures, sells, and maintains disposable hygiene product manufacturing systems in Japan and internationally. Its converting machines are used to produce baby and adult diapers, feminine napkins, and face masks, as well as pet sheets and nursing pads, incontinence pads. The company also offers medical equipment and intermediary medical systems; pet care products; recycling equipment; and equipment, systems, and related software products related to converting machines. Zuiko Corporation was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Daiun Co.,Ltd. engages in the cargo handling business in Japan. It operates in Port Transportation Business and Automobile Transportation Business segments. The company primarily offers ocean freight, harbor works, import/export customs clearance, drayage transportation, warehouse, cargo transport, and used car yard services. It also engages in the agency business for various types of non-life insurance, including automobile, fire, accident, and marine insurance. The company was formerly known as Osaka Shipping Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Daiun Co.,Ltd. in January 1962. Daiun Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1945 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Wakachiku Construction Co., Ltd. engages in construction and real estate businesses. The company is involved in construction work, marine development, regional and urban development, environmental improvement and conservation, and construction consulting services; and other construction, management, and real estate businesses. It also sells and lease of real estate. Wakachiku Construction Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1890 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. As of March 13, 2026, Wakachiku Construction Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of ASO Corporation.

Cleanup Corporation engages in the equipment business for residence, stores and business establishments, and other business in Japan and internationally. The company offers kitchen equipment under CENTRO, STEDIA brands; bathroom products under clear bath and Yuasis brands; and bathroom vanity products. Cleanup Corporation was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Kyowa Leather Cloth Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells synthetic leather cover materials in Japan. The company's products are used in automotive interiors, interior designs, and fashion and lifestyle businesses. It sells its products under the Sobagni brand. Kyowa Leather Cloth Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1935 and is headquartered in Hamamatsu, Japan.

IFIS Japan Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, researches and estimates data in Japan. It operates through five segments: Investment Information Business, Document Solutions Business, Fund Disclosure Lawyer Business, IT Solution Business, and Language Solutions Business. The company provides electronic distribution services for securities research reports; corporate earning forecasts and consensus data services; financial document production and printing services; and system integration services for financial institutions. It also offers DX solutions, including robot advisor, document management, financial document order system, automatic pamphlet creation system, terms/contract creation system, operation report creation system, life plan simulation, communication portal, information sheet creation tool, web to print, and PIP maker solutions. The company was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

FTGroup Co., Ltd. engages in the network infrastructure business in Japan. The company operates as a retail electricity supplier and provide its electricity services Fene Denki and FT Denki; rent and sale the water-saving device under the JET brand; act as an intermediary for the sale of water servers; sale, installation, and after-sales services for appliances and office automation equipment, as well as air conditioning equipment, LED lighting, and air purifiers; and sale and installation of solar power generation equipment and storage batteries. It also provides optical internet service under the Hikari Hayatoku brand; network security products, file servers, security products, information, and communication equipment for small and medium-sized businesses and individual business owners. The company was incorporated in 1985 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. FTGroup Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Hikari Tsushin, Inc.

Yagi & Co.,Ltd., together its subsidiaries, operates as a fiber trading company in Japan. It operates through Material Business, Lifestyle Business, Apparel Business, and Brand Retail segments. The company offers cotton/synthetic yarn and other fiber raw materials; knits/textiles; mens and ladies apparel; sportswear; nighties/innerwear; and bedding, interior products, lifestyle products, and industrial fiber materials. It also imports, exports, and sells fiber and related products, fiber product raw materials, fabrics, and secondary fiber products; as well as plans and sells apparel fabrics, and products. In addition, the company manufactures and sells raschel knits, powder puffs, outerwear, twisted yarns, textiles, towels and bath towels, menswear, ladieswear, fashion accessories, and clothing products. Further, the company offers uniforms, workwear, kids' wear, and Femtech products, as well as engages in real estate rental business. It offers its materials to automotive use, interiors, industrial materials, and the apparel industries. Yagi & Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1893 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

SystemSoft Corporation engages in technology and innovation businesses in Japan. It offers system engineer services; SS cloud; PoC, robot construction support, and in-house operation support services, as well as support services for expansion into other departments; and Al system development and consulting services. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Chiyoda, Japan.

NICHIDEN Corporation operates as a trading company in Japan. It offers cylinders, valves, coupling, etc.; industrial robots, controllers, etc.; and sensors, touchscreens, measuring devices, etc. for the control equipment field. The company also provides motors, reduction drives, gearboxes, etc.; chains, gear wheels, coupling, etc.; and handles, bearings, linear motions guides, etc. for the power transmission device field. In addition, it offers dust collectors, pumps, compressors, LEDs, etc.; conveyors, lifts, casters, etc.; and containers, palettes, storage shelves, etc. for industrial machinery fields. Further, the company provides transport equipment, vibrators, lifting and lowering machines, storage-related equipment, transport systems, structural system equipment, packaging and packaging systems, other loading and unloading/transportation-related products, environmental equipment, fans, and cleaning equipment, pumps, other machinery and equipment, and tools and related products. Additionally, it offers Hydraulic equipment, pneumatic equipment, vacuum equipment, hoses, tubes, joints, sequencers, displays, actuators, switches, encoders, image, processing, panel equipment, nut runners, mechatronics parts, piping, equipment, communication and network equipment, uninterruptible power supplies, and other control equipment related products. NICHIDEN Corporation was founded in 1935 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Chubu Shiryo Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells compound feed for livestock and fisheries in Japan. The company offers animal feed, including poultry, pig, cattle, and fish feed; livestock and fishery products, such as eggs; organic compound fertilizers; and livestock equipment. It also provides livestock medical services, such as livestock hygiene management, pathological testing, and instruction on breeding techniques, as well as livestock insurance. The company was incorporated in 1949 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

Encourage Technologies Co., Ltd. develops, maintains, and sells computer system software products primarily in Japan. It offers ESS SmartIT Operation products, including ESS REC, a standard tool for monitoring and auditing user system operations; ESS FileGate, which provides a safe file transfer environment through various types of file sanitization technologies; ESS AdminONE, a privileged ID management product; ESS AdminControl for Client, for managing local administrator passwords; ID Inspector, which identifies users who utilize shared IDs, such as root/administrators, without any customization of applications and operating systems; and ESS AutoQuality, a user system operation solution. The company also provides BPO and consulting services related to computer operation management. In addition, it offers solutions for ransomware, IT control, privileged ID management, evidence management, outsourcing, work style reform, BCP measures, telework visualization, PCI DSS, and RPA control monitoring for the finance, cloud, medical care, and local government sectors. Encourage Technologies Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2002 and is headquartered in Chuo, Japan.

Nitcho Corporation manufactures, sells, imports, and exports commercial kitchen equipment in Japan. The company offers cleaning, disinfection, heating, rice cooking, and cooking equipment. It also provides kitchen facility planning, construction management, and after-sales services. In addition, the company engages in building design and construction supervision, the sale of kitchen-related products and toxic and deleterious detergents, and the purchase and sale of used kitchen and food processing equipment. It serves government, medical, and welfare facilities, as well as cafeterias, hotels, food factories, and theme parks. Nitcho Corporation was incorporated in 1947 and is headquartered in Ota, Japan.

Magmag, Inc. engages in the development and operation of content distribution platform in Japan. It operates through Platform, Media Advertising, and Others segments. The company operates MagMag!, an email newsletter distribution platform; MagOne, a fan site platform; MAG2NEWS, which provides news analysis and column articles in the fields of politics, economics, business, entertainment, science, and others; MONEY VOICE, an economic media site that provides information for investors on stocks, foreign exchange, bonds, futures, real estate, and others; TRIP EDITOR, a travel web media outlet; and by them, a love web media service, as well as MagMag Reader App, which allows users to view email newsletter content through an app. It is also involved in the planning, development, and operation of Internet media; operation and sale of advertising space to be placed in web media and email newsletters; and event planning and management activities. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Shinagawa, Japan. Magmag, Inc. is a subsidiary of AirTrip Corp.

MIXI, Inc. engages in the sports, digital entertainment, lifestyle, and investment businesses in Japan. It offers TIPSTAR, a service that offers online betting tickets and live broadcasts; Fansta, a service for finding sports bars; keitan, an auto race app; Chariloto, a site to sell Keirin and auto race betting tickets; Chiba Jets Funabashi, a professional basketball team in the B.LEAGUE; F.C.Tokyo, a Japan professional football league club team; netkeiba.com, a horse racing media; Weekly Baseball Online, a baseball information site; and netkeirin that provides various content. The company also offers MIXI M, a platform to integrate personal and payment information, and assets; Monster Strike, Monster Strike Stadium, Kotodaman, and MSonic; MONSTORE, the monster strike online store; MIXI_ANIME and Monstore, an online store; PROMARE, and Pandora and Akubi, an animated movie; Fight League: Gear Gadget Generator, an animated series; and XPICE, a short animation. In addition, it provides mixi, a social networking service that offers space for friendly communication; minimo, a salon artist booking app; FamilyAlbum, a family photo and video sharing app; mixi2, a social network to share the moment and come together; and OKURU, a photo gift service. The company was formerly known as eMecury Co., Ltd. and changed its name to MIXI, Inc. in February 2006. MIXI, Inc. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Tokyo Printing Ink Mfg. Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells specialty chemicals in Japan. The company operates through four segments: Ink Business; Chemical Products Business; Processed Products Business; and Real Estate Rental Business. The company offers offset and gravure inks, inkjet inks, printing machines, and printing materials. It also engages in the manufactures and sells masterbatches and resin compounds. In addition, it offers plastic meshes and packaging materials and civil engineering materials. Further, it involved in the leasing of an office building owned in Tokyo and residence owned in Saitama Prefecture. Additionally, it provides dry colors; colorants for thermosetting resins; functional additives for plastics; compounds; detergents; powder resins; and functional products, such as 3D printers and radiation measurement. The company was founded in 1895 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Giken Holdings Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the construction business and related operations in Japan. It is also involved in the manufacture and sale of wave-dissipating root blocks, landslide prevention work, and radiation shielding interior work; leasing and sale of circular steel formworks and construction materials; medical consulting; and hardware and software planning and development services, as well as manufactures, processes, sells, and installs steel fittings. The company was incorporated in 2018 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Kokusai Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of testers and measurement instruments for motors and rotating equipment, and automatic inspection equipment in Japan, the United States, South Korea, China, and internationally. It offers balancing machines, tire balancers for production line, tire uniformity machines/tire and wheel assembly balancers, tire drum durability testing machines, road wheel balance and runout measuring equipment, tire balance weight appliers, shaft straightening machines, coil winding testers, motor testers for production line, gear testers, seismic systems, electric servo motor-driven vibration testers, and electrodynamic vibration testers. The company's products are used in automobiles, home appliances, and digital devices. Kokusai Co., Ltd. was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Tama, Japan.

Nichimo Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells fish products in Japan and internationally. The company offers surimi, and fresh and frozen fish products, and processed and value-added products; fishing nets, gears, ropes, twines, fishing machinery and vessels, and aquaculture feeds; processed cultivated fish products; food processing machines and other related machinery; nori processing and tofu making machines; and fermented soybean and health food products. It also provides synthetic resins, packaging materials and supplies, and agricultural materials; logistics and distribution services; and temporary staffing services, as well as engages in the real estate activities. Nichimo Co., Ltd. was founded in 1910 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

UEX, Ltd. engages in the fabrication, distribution, and sale of stainless steel, titanium, and other metal products in Japan. It offers stainless steel plates, strips, tubes, pipes, bars, and shapes; building materials; stainless steel for hydrogen stations; and duplex stainless steel, and processed products, as well as machinery and engineering products. The company also provides cutting services. The company was formerly known as Ueno Metalex, Ltd. and changed its name to UEX, Ltd. in 1998. The company was founded in 1872 and is headquartered in Shinagawa, Japan.

TOSNET Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, provides security services in Japan. The company offers static guard services for office buildings, stores, parking lots, banks, warehouses, residences, etc.; crowd control services for festivals, concerts, sporting games, conventions, seminars, parades, expos, shop's openings, etc.; traffic control services for parking lots, construction sites, warehouses, etc.; and retail security services for grocery stores, jewelry shops, department stores, appliance stores, etc. It also provides power supply car services for events, concerts, sporting games, blackouts, data centers, and business continuity plans; mailing services; and building management, equipment maintenance, and cleaning services. In addition, the company offers automated external defibrillators under ZOLLR AED PlusR brand. The company also involved in power supply business. It serves customers through its network of branch offices. TOSNET Corporation was incorporated in 1977 and is headquartered in Sendai, Japan.

Gunosy Inc. primarily engages in the operation of news and information applications in Japan. The company operates through three segments: Media Business, G Holdings Business, and New Businesses. The Media Business segment includes Gunosy, a mobile application that provides information curation service; au Service Today, an all-in-one application that provides news, weather, transit information, fortune-telling, etc.; and operates domestic and international Game8 media business. The G Holdings Business segment involves in publishing social games, such as anime and manga. The New Businesses segment offers IR Hub, a timely disclosure support service for information disclosure; operates store and commerce business, such as S8 Shops, a service for building and managing external payment websites; and Game8 Store, an e-commerce service within Game8 that enables the sale of in-game items and game download keys. The company also offers News Lite, a news and information application available; and YOU IN, a wellness application. It is also involved in growth investment; investment business and consulting; and media, advertising, and entertainment businesses. Gunosy Inc. was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Shibuya, Japan.

Shinhokoku Material Corp. engages in the manufacture and sale of special alloy materials and precision-machined products in Japan. The company operates through two segments, Special Alloy Business and Real Estate Rental Business. It offers low thermal expansion alloy castings for semiconductor and FPD manufacturing equipment industries; heat resistance casting alloy; wear resistant casting alloy; high-temperature and high-strength alloy castings for the steel industry; alloy for grate of incinerator/alloy for furnace bottom air nozzle of biomass power generation boiler; steel sheets; precision processed parts for semiconductor and FPD manufacturing equipment; and forged products, including bars, wires, etc. The company also provides steel pipe manufacturing tools, and forging and pressing products. In addition, it is involved in real estate leasing business. The company was formerly known as Shinhokoku Steel Corporation and changed its name to Shinhokoku Material Corp. in October 2021. Shinhokoku Material Corp. was founded in 1939 and is headquartered in Kawagoe, Japan.

People, Dreams & Technologies Group Co., Ltd. engages in consultancy, service provider, and products businesses in Japan. The company provides survey, plan, design, and construction management related to bridges and special structures, roads, ITS, ports and river disaster prevention, environment, and railways; various structural analyses and experiments; commercial construction work; design related to civil engineering structures and facilities; transportation, road development, route, and urban and regional plans; and general information services, such as data management for various public facilities. It is also involved in the provision of consulting, systemization planning, design, and software development related to information processing; content development; operation and distribution services; business surveys and advisory related to PFI; consulting, planning and design related to architecture; soil and geological surveys; research and development on foundation structures and construction methods; design and construction of disaster prevention works and civil engineering works related to ground disasters; construction supervision, EPC management, fundraising consulting, O and M consulting, and asset management related to renewable energy. In addition, the company operates road and public facility; PPP; demand-responsive transportation system; health support and rental activities; and renewable energy and finance businesses. Further, it sells eco products and information system. People, Dreams & Technologies Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1953 and is headquartered in Chuo, Japan.

Murakami Corporation manufactures and sells rear-view mirrors in Japan, the Rest of Asia, North America, and internationally for automobile manufacturers. The company offers rearview, electronic, and optics mirrors. It also provides heated washer and projection related products. In addition, the company offers opt-electronics solutions, such as dichroic and half mirror; UV, IR, and dichroic filter; cold mirror, band-pass, and trimming filters, as well as Ar, Cr, and laser mirrors. The company was founded in 1882 and is headquartered in Shizuoka, Japan.

Okabe Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells construction and civil engineering products in Japan, North America, and internationally. It offers temporary construction products, such as clamps, scaffolding, inserts for scaffolding, temporary pass, and safety products; concrete formwork products, including separator, cone, form tie, flat rib, overtightening restrainer, corner fastener, panel adjuster, slab jointer, bottom pipe supporting hook, and leakage cover; items for h-beam, sheet pile method, insulation , and other formwork; water stop/disposal products; insert and rooftop protection products; and chamfers. The company also provides rebar work products, which include joints, pile head, spacers, footing beam stand for foundation, and beam lowering stand for beam, as well as civil engineering products. Okabe Co., Ltd. was founded in 1917 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Showa Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. engages in manufacturing and selling diatomite and perlite filter aids under the Radiolite and Topco brand in China and Japan. Its diatomite and perlite filter aids are used to remove particulates from liquids and gases, as well as liquid filtration applications. The company also provides functional additives for use in coatings, agricultural chemicals, and other industrial products. Showa Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1930 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

ALiNK Internet, Inc. plans, develops, and manages Internet media. It offers Tenki.jp, an application that shows current weather, temperature, and rain clouds information; Tenki.jp Climbing Weather, a weather forecast application specializing in mountains. The company also provides information, such as weather commentary by weather forecasters, as well as earthquake, tsunami, and typhoon information. In addition, it offers web consulting and internet advertising agency services. The company was incorporated in 2013 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

SM ENTERTAINMENT JAPAN Co.,Ltd. engages in the CS broadcasting, management, mobile, fan club, merchandising, events and concerts, music, and rights businesses in Japan. It operates through Entertainment Business and Rights & Media Business segments. The company operates KNTV, a Korean entertainment channel that broadcasts terrestrial dramas, news programs, K-pop, and variety shows; plans and produces original programs; broadcasts music live performances and online fan meeting events; manages the activities of artists in Japan; plans and operates official mobile site of the carriers; plans and organizes activities, including music and appearances at events in the media and in commercials; operates and plans artists fan club sites; designs, creates, and sells event goods that are sold at concerts, fan meetings, and other events; and sells goods on commission. It also engages in product planning and sale of goods related to the artists; and SMTOWN FC GOODS ONLINE STORE that sells official artist goods. In addition, the company acquires broadcasting rights, video distribution rights, and DVD-related products from content rights holders and distributes various content, including online live shows. It serves broadcasting stations, BS/CS channels, video distribution companies, and content planning and production companies. The company was formerly known as Stream Media Corporation and changed its name to SM ENTERTAINMENT JAPAN Co.,Ltd. in June 2025. SM ENTERTAINMENT JAPAN Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1971 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

Kanemitsu Corporation engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of pulleys for automobiles, and agricultural machinery in Japan. The company offers engine parts including crankshaft, power steering, alternator, fan, and water pump pulley, as well as sensor plate, tensioner base, tight plug, crankshaft and camshaft sprocket; transmission parts, such as piston drive pulley, flange lock-up clutch, cover canceller force, and drum C2 clutch inner; and EPS parts, which include inner hub, housing, and ring products. It also provides home appliance parts including water container; and motor case and airbag parts. The company was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Akashi, Japan.

Miyaji Engineering Group,Inc., through its subsidiaries, engages in the construction and civil engineering activities in Japan. It is involved in the designing, production, erection, installation, maintenance, and repair of bridges, steel frames, and other steel structures; design and production of prestressed concrete; bridge erection/steel frame erection activities; and design, manufacture, installation, sale, and repair of bridges, coastal structures, etc. The company also designs, manufactures, and installs steel structures; sells bolts and welding materials; and offers personnel dispatching services, and other business operations, as well as sale and repair of bridges and coastal structures; and solar power generation activities. Miyaji Engineering Group,Inc. was founded in 1908 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

AINAVO HOLDINGS Co.,Ltd. engages in the single-family home and large property businesses in Japan. The company sells tiles and stones, as well as engages in the construction activities. It is also involved in construction of unit baths, system kitchens, water heaters, luxury bathtubs, ceramic tiles, air conditioning, sanitary equipment and facilities, solar power generation systems, and other hosing equipment, as well as interior and exterior tiles, floor tiles, exteriors, and other tile-related products. The company was formerly known as Avelco Co., Ltd. and changed its name to AINAVO HOLDINGS Co.,Ltd. in October 2013. AINAVO HOLDINGS Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1924 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Kobayashi Yoko Co., Ltd. engages in the investment and financial services business in Japan. The company offers commodity futures and exchange margin trading activities; sale of gold bullion; provision of life and non-life insurance agency business; sale of solar power generation machines and LED lighting products; wholesale of electrical equipment materials for advertising purposes; and operation of golf courses. In addition, it is involved in the rental of properties, such as business hotels and studio condominiums; real estate transaction business; and internet advertising business, including SEO measures, site production, and consulting work. The company was founded in 1913 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

BSN Media Holdings, Inc. engages in the radio and television broadcasting business. It also involved in planning, production, and sale of broadcast programs; various events, including art, music, sports, movies, theater, entertainment, science, etc.; and planning, publishing, and sale of publications. The company was formerly known as Broadcasting System of Niigata Inc. and changed its name to BSN Media Holdings, Inc. The company was incorporated in 1952 and is headquartered in Niigata, Japan.

Hatena Co., Ltd. provides user generated content services in Japan and internationally. The company offers content platform services, including Hatena Blog, a blog service; Hatena Bookmark, a social bookmarking service; Human Search Hatena, a question and answer site; and Hatena Lab, a repository for experimental services. It also provides content marketing services, such as Hatena MediaSuite, a support service from planning to operation of owned media; Hatena CMS, a CMS to create and update websites; Hatena Blog Corporate Plan, a service for small businesses and technical blogs; Hatena Bookmark Native Ads, an in-feed native advertising service; and Feed, a speech analysis solution. In addition, the company offers technology solution services comprising Mackerel, a SaaS-based server monitoring service; GigaViewer, a manga viewer for websites and apps; Mangano, a manga submission service; Jump Rookie!, a manga submission and publishing service; Tomorrow's Young Jump, which provides manga submission and publishing services; Kakuyomu, a novel submission and revenue sharing platform; Magical iLand, an entertainment site; SmaPlus, which supports the development of a game-linked service; Squid Rings 2 and 3; Taikai Support, which supports the development of a tournament support service; Miiverse, which supports the development of Miiverse, a network service; Flipnote Hatena, which supports the development and operation of Flipnote Hatena, a community service for posting Flipnotes; Home Appliance Conference, a community-based curation service; and Pinga, a web manga update checker. Hatena Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

Chori Co., Ltd. engages in textiles, chemicals, and machinery businesses in China and internationally. The company offers fibers, textiles, and garments, including synthetic fiber intermediates, polyester fibers, and nylon thread; fabrics used in casual wear, sportswear, Middle Eastern garments, and various materials; hygienic and lifestyle-related materials and construction materials; polyester yarn and fabrics used on the car seats; lab coats, uniforms, suits, and clothing materials; men's apparel, ladies' apparel, and unisex apparel; and sportswear, fitness wear, golf wear, and innerwear. It also provides chemical products, such as urethane materials; coatings, inks, and adhesives; resins and compounds; cosmetics and personal care materials; environment-related products; lithium-ion battery-related materials and battery raw materials; glass and ceramic raw materials; agriculture-related materials and fertilizer-related raw materials; functional inorganic chemical materials; functional metal materials; raw materials for aluminum electrolytic capacitors; raw materials for ceramic capacitors; refined phosphoric acid and phosphate; resin raw materials and resin additives; and aluminum raw materials for heat exchangers. In addition, the company offers pharmaceutical ingredients and intermediates; agrochemical ingredients and intermediates; functional intermediates that includes semiconductor and electronics materials; bio-related products; food chemicals; feedstuff materials and additives; healthcare products, and ingredients for supplements and health foods; pharmaceutical raw materials; and medical equipment. Further, it sells transportation equipment comprising four-and two-wheel vehicles and trucks, as well as exports agricultural machinery, construction machinery, and industrial equipment. The company was founded in 1861 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan. Chori Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Toray Industries, Inc.

Fenwal Controls of Japan, Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, designs, develops, manufactures, and sells fire prevention and extinguishing, temperature control, and medical equipment in Japan, rest of Asia, and internationally. It operates through the Safety Security Protection (SSP), Thermal, Medical, Printed Wiring Board Assembly (PWBA), and Fire Pump segments. The SSP segment engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of fire alarm systems, fire extinguishing systems, and explosion suppression systems, as well as the design, construction, maintenance, and engineering services for its systems. Its Thermal segment offers temperature controllers, heating plates and equipment for semiconductor manufacturing equipment, thermocouples for high-temperature furnaces, and other temperature control equipment, as well as related systems. The Medical segment provides artificial kidney dialysis machines and medical devices. Its PWBA segment offers printed circuit board assembly, artwork design, and noise (EMC) countermeasures. The Fire Pump segment provides firefighting and disaster prevention equipment such as fire pumps, fire pump carriers, safety pumps, and fully automatic fire extinguishing systems. The company was incorporated in 1961 and is headquartered in Chiyoda, Japan.

Twinbird Corporation manufactures and sells home appliances. It offers refrigerator and electronic refrigerators, steam oven/microwave, coffee maker, toaster oven, home bakery, rice cooker and polisher, cookers, mixers/blenders, electric kettle, oil pot, flyer, and other kitchen goods; and air purifier/humidifier, air conditioners/coolers, fan, and lighting equipment. The company also provides cleaners, washing machine, iron/handy steamers, shoe dryers, bath polishers, and cleaning supplies; head, face, body, and face care products, as well as dryers and cosmetics; bathroom TV, wireless earphones, and mobile battery. In addition, it offers electric acoustic equipment and piston stirling coolers. Twinbird Corporation was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Tsubame, Japan.

Fujikura Kasei Co., Ltd. provides various coatings and painting materials in Japan and internationally. It operates through the Coating, Paint, Electronic Materials, Chemical Products, and Synthetic Resins segments. The company provides plastic coatings for automotive interior, exterior, and lighting parts; cosmetic containers, PE tubes, film applications, and electronic devices, as well as general-purpose coatings, including hard coats, vapor-deposited coatings, and soft coatings for a variety of applications. It also offers architectural coatings, such as febriller, a metallic coating; Lapis Grande, a matte multicolor coating; and Sinagio SG, a matte enamel coating. In addition, the company provides polymers and resin materials that include pressure-sensitive adhesives, functional particles, materials for photocopiers and printers, firing binders, urethane resins, and block polymers, as well as raw materials for diagnostic reagents comprising plain and carboxy-modified latex particles and fluorescent and magnetic particles used in the medical field. Further, it offers conductive resin materials, including electrically conductive adhesives; circuitry, electrode, and connector materials for PCBs; materials for printed electronics; circuitry and insulating paste materials for touch panels; room temperature drying materials; and EMI shield materials under the DOTITE brand. The company was formerly known as Fujikura Kagaku Mfg. Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Fujikura Kasei Co., Ltd. in December 1958. Fujikura Kasei Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1938 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

Aidma Marketing Communication Corporation provides marketing support services in the fields of distribution and retail sectors in Japan. It offers ARSS promotional solutions, market research planning, Aidoma big data platform solutions, Web SP solutions, and promotional support solutions. The company was formerly known as Aidma Corporation and changed its name to Aidma Marketing Communication Corporation in April 2015. The company was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Toyama, Japan.

Premier Anti-Aging Co., Ltd. engages in the planning, development, import, export, mail order/EC, wholesale, and retail of cosmetics, health foods, and recovery wear in Japan. The company is involved in anti-aging and recovery businesses; and manufactures and sells skin care, hair care, and inner care products. It offers its products under the DUO, CANADEL, Clayence, C+mania, Sinto, Sitrana, Reinca, and Lalaskin brands. The company was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

Asahipen Corporation manufactures, imports, and sells various paints and painting supplies, and household supplies in Japan. The company offers aqueous, oil, and spray paints, as well as paint auxiliary materials; painting supplies, including brushes, rollers, kotebakes, roller trays, painting machines/compressors, painting aids, curing supplies, containers, and polishing supplies; repair materials for cover, floor, joints, metal products, wood parts, base adjustment, and concrete; and repair tape and pale bucket, as well as insulation and waterproofing materials for roofs. It also provides interior goods, such as shoji paper, bran paper, cover paper, adhesive sheets, glass decoration and condensation products, floor material, glue and double-sided tapes, repair maintenance materials, and various tools; home care products comprising, floor waxes, cleaning agents, bleaching and fungicides, home detergent and cleaners, kitchen detergents and hygiene management supplies, waterproof/water repellents, graffiti droppings, polishing/removers, and lubricants; and gardening supplies. The company was formerly known as Asahi Paint Company and changed its name to Asahipen Corporation in January 1965. Asahipen Corporation was founded in 1940 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

AI,Inc. develops and provides various speech synthesis engines and solutions in Japan. It also offers voice-related, consulting and peripheral systems, AI-powered sound-based quality control, and customer relationship management solutions. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

System Integrator Corp. plans, develops, and sells packaging software and cloud services in Japan. It offers ERP, EC, omni channel, project management, database development and design support, application design, and e-learning tools. The company's products include AISIA, a design recognition solution; TOPSIC, an online and in real time cloud solution to evaluate a range of engineers' programming skills from beginner to advanced; SI Object Browser, a database development support tool; SI Object Browser ER, a data modeling tool; and SI Object Browser Designer, an AI design document preparation tool. Its products also comprise SI Object Browser PM, an integrated project management tool; SI Web Shopping, an EC site construction package software; and GRANDIT, a Web-based ERP. In addition, the company offers consulting services. System Integrator Corp. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Saitama, Japan.

ODK Solutions Company, Ltd. provides information processing outsourcing services in Japan. The company provides entrance exam solutions, such as online application system and entrance examination outsourcing services; and operates UCARO, a university entrance exam portal site. It also offers educational app development; and securities trading solutions. In addition, the company provides SLAP and iStudy LMS e-learning platforms that support human resource development; develops, sells, and operates e-learning materials, as well as e-learning, on-demand learning, and corporate training services; and provides customer support and medical solutions, including clinical testing systems. It serves educational institutions, securities companies, general business corporations, etc. ODK Solutions Company, Ltd. was incorporated in 1963 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

KG Intelligence CO., LTD. operates as a content provider company. The company offers Wagasha de DOMO! x Alpa Connect, a tool that manage and operate all postings on eAlpa and other aggregate sites all at once; ARPA LINK, a spot work matching app to pinpoint job openings based on time, location, and skills; e-Arra, a recruitment site that provides information on part-time, full-time, and temporary employment; ALPA, a free job information magazine; and ARPA presents the Suitable Job Fair, an introduction site for the suitable job fair. It also provides career counseling, employment support, and job change support services, as well as foreign care human resource development program; Home Building School, a free consultation support service for home building; Rental Style, a website that provides information on rental apartments, condominiums, and detached houses; Rental Style Column; Mom Rental, a website to search for rental properties near elementary and junior high school districts; Kodate Rental, a website that collects and publishes detached houses and rental homes; Kodate Rental Column; Hospita Renta, a website to search for rental properties near hospitals and medical institutions; Hospita Rental Column; Gakuheya Rental; Gakuhair Rental Column; Chukodate!, a website to search for information on purchasing vacant houses, used homes, detached houses, and single-family; Chukoma!; Kaitochi!; IETO; Mom's House Building; Sumai Satei, a real estate sales website for women; and Rental Style Moving Estimates. In addition, the company offers information magazines; Mama Sore, a website that provides news and columns for mothers raising children; human resource development support, competitor store research, human resource recruitment support, and website creation support services; and printing and binding services, including posters, flyers, pamphlets, and free papers. KG Intelligence CO., LTD. was incorporated in 1950 and is headquartered in Okayama, Japan.

Goodpatch, Inc. engages in the provision of UI/UX design consulting services. The company offers UI/UX design, business model design, brand experience design, organizational design, and software development services. It provides ReDesigner, a designer recruitment support service; ReDesigner for Students, a job-hunting platform; Goodpatch Anywhere, a design talent organization; Strap, an online whiteboard tool; and Prott, a prototyping tool. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Shibuya, Japan.

Nihon Parkerizing Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and supply of surface treatment chemicals in Japan and internationally. It supplies surface treatment chemicals for cleaning substrates, adding corrosion resistance, creating a base for painting, and providing lubrications; emulsion type rolling oil for rolling steel and cooling applications; heat exchangers, as well as offers technical support services. The company also provides rust prevention, heat treatment, and rust stabilizing treatment services. In addition, it offers conversion coating, rubricant for deformation, lubricant for deformation, solid lubricant and rustproof coatings, salt-bath nitriding and carburizing, austemper treatment, composite plating, and plasma electrolytic oxidation services, as well as provides WEATHERCOAT, a surface treatment technology to develop rust layer on weathering steel. Further, the company provides rust preventive oils, paints, industrial cleaners, and electroless nickel plating liquids; manufactures and sells metal surface treatment and coating equipment; and offers building maintenance services. Additionally, the company is involved in solar power generation. Nihon Parkerizing Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1928 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Emergency Assistance Japan Co., Ltd. provides medical assistance services in Japan and internationally. It offers security assistance program, assistance cloud, lifestyle assistance, international student crisis management, and emergency assistance services, as well as assistance services for foreign nationals. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Bunkyo, Japan.

Masaru Corporation engages in the construction activities in Japan. It is involved in the building repair and renovation works; condominium and building renewal works; and skyscraper sealing and waterproofing works. The company also involves in construction of facilities, such as air conditioning, heating and cooling, and water supply and drainage, as well as assembles, installs, and maintains industrial machinery, such as exhaust equipment, drying and painting equipment, and dust collection equipment. In addition, it sells building materials and engages in rental of equipment. Masaru Corporation was incorporated in 1957 and is headquartered in Koto, Japan.
gumi Inc. provides mobile online games in Japan and internationally. It also engages in block chain, and XR business. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

SEMITEC Corporation engages in the manufacture and sale of electronic components in Japan and internationally. The company offers temperature sensors, IR sensors, wind sensors, surge absorber, current regulating diode, and power thermistor. It also provides thermal barometric pressure and micro pressure sensors, narrow view angle thermopile, rectangular sensor for motors, compact vacuum sensor, thin-film FT thermistor, ultra-thin glass substrate thin-film thermistor sensors, and refrigerant gas sensor module. The company was formerly known as Ishizuka Electronics Corporation and changed its name to SEMITEC Corporation in 2011. SEMITEC Corporation was incorporated in 1958 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

MFS, Inc. provides online mortgage loan services in Japan. The company develops and operates mortgage comparison diagnostic service Mogecheck and the comprehensive real estate platform INVASE. MFS, Inc. was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Chiyoda, Japan.

Stream Co.,Ltd. engages in the Internet shopping management business in Japan. It is involved in internet mail order, rental, beauty and healthcare, 3PL, and various sales support businesses. Stream Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Yotai Refractories Co., Ltd., manufactures and sells refractories and ceramics in Japan and internationally. It operates through Refractories and Engineering segments. The company offers fireproof bricks from various materials, including alkaline, high alumina-made, clay-made, and silica bricks; ceramic and environmental system-related furnaces; and monolithic refractories for the steel, non-ferrous, cement, glass, environmental equipment, electronic parts, and chemical and pottery industries. It also provides engineering services, which comprises design, construction, and supervisory services, as well as contract maintenance services. The company was formerly known as Osaka Yogyo Fire Brick Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yotai Refractories Co., Ltd. in June 1987. Yotai Refractories Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1936 and is headquartered in Kaizuka, Japan.

Hokko Chemical Industry Co., Ltd., together with subsidiaries, manufactures and sells crop protection and fine chemicals products in Japan and internationally. The company operates through three segments: Agricultural Chemicals Business, Fine Chemicals Business, and Textile Materials Business. It offers insecticides, fungicides, herbicides, plant growth regulators, pesticides, and related products; resin additives, pharmaceutical and agrochemical intermediates, raw materials for electronics components, functional polymers, organic catalysts, raw materials for functional inorganic materials, fine ceramics, raw materials for agricultural chemicals and artificial intelligence in the electronic materials field, preservatives, antifouling, antiseptic and antifungal agents, epoxy resin curing accelerators and related products; and textile materials. The company also provides raw resin materials, such as photoresist monomers and curing accelerators for epoxy molding compounds, semiconductor encapsulants; and electronic materials. Hokko Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1950 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Foster Electric Company, Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells loudspeakers, audio equipment, and electronical equipment in Japan, China, the United States, rest of Asia, Europe, and internationally. It operates in three segments: Speaker, Mobile Audio, and Other. The company offers various speaker products, including automotive, reflow, micro, USB, general, flat-screen TVs, and 2 in 1 vibration, as well as speaker systems. It also provides mobile audio products, such as mobile phone headsets, headphones, earphones, Bluetooth headsets, and earphone drivers, as well as vibration actuators. In addition, the company offers automotive components and products comprising alarm, eCall, audio, and acoustic vehicle alerting system speakers, as well as actuators, headphones, and alarm buzzers; small acoustic components, such as magnetics buzzers and sounders for alarm sounds; products under the Fostex brand; and logistics services. Foster Electric Company, Limited was incorporated in 1948 and is headquartered in Akishima, Japan.

Powdertech Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells carriers for electrophotography in Japan and internationally. The company offers ferrite carrier materials for electrophotographic applications, such as copiers, printers, and multi-function printers; oxygen absorbers, sensors, and combined products under the WonderKeep, WonderSensor, and SensorKeep brand names; and functional materials for auto parts and electronic components. Powdertech Co., Ltd. was founded in 1952 and is based in Kashiwa, Japan.

Sun-Wa Technos Corporation engages in the distribution of electrical machinery, electronics, and general machinery in Japan and internationally. It sells and constructs mechatronics-related electrical equipment, plant electrical goods, and electrical equipment. The company also electronic components, electronic equipment, office automation equipment, factory automation systems, communication and information equipment. In addition, it engages in the sale of semiconductor manufacturing equipment, industrial robots, clean robots, FA industry-related equipment and devices, printed circuit board and related apparatus, logistical transportation equipment, automotive electronic products, and various inspection equipment. It also provides engineering support for improvement of efficiency of production facilities. The company was formerly known as Yamada Kogyo Corporation and changed its name to Sun-Wa Technos Corporation in April 1993. Sun-Wa Technos Corporation was incorporated in 1949 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Aiming Inc. engages in the planning, production, development, and operation of online games for PCs, smartphones, and home game consoles in Japan and internationally. Aiming Inc. was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Shibuya, Japan.

Medix Inc. provides digital marketing services in Japan. It offers advertising and promotion services, such as search advertising, display advertising, feed ads, social media advertising, video ads, affiliate advertising, and advertising management service for agencies; creative design and production services, including creative consulting, EC site construction/ renewal, web advertising production, site construction and operation management, search engine optimization, and content marketing, as well as digital marketing services comprise web services, apps, DTP, videos, and novelties. The company also provides support to BtoC digital marketing and BtoB digital marketing support; and data-driven marketing services, such as data-driven marketing, data analysis support, CRM utilization support, GA4 usage support, and KARTE utilization support, KPI dashboard construction and organizational marketing support, and support for using BigQuery and BI tools. In addition, it offers tag management tools, overseas advertising distribution and overseas marketing support, in-house support service, and online advertising management services. Medix Inc. was incorporated in 1984 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Wakamoto Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd. engaged in the manufacture and sale of pharmaceuticals, medical devices, and health food in Japan. The company offers Strong and Granule Wakamoto, gastrointestinal drugs for digestion, intestinal regulation, and nutritional supplementation, as well as Wakamoto Intestinal Remedy drug. It also provides AVANTBISE oral tablets, a supplement of bacteria to restore the balance of oral flora; and medicated toothpaste. The company was formerly known as Society for Nutrition and Raising Children Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Wakamoto Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd. in July 1943. Wakamoto Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1929 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Godo Steel, Ltd. manufactures and sells steel products in Japan. The company offers wire rods for tire chains, stapler needles, and fencing applications; H-beams and channels that are used in construction, civil engineering, and other sectors; structural bars, which are used as materials for making parts of construction and industrial machinery, ships, and other equipment; and rails. It also provides deformed bars, including screw rebars that are used as construction and civil engineering materials; EG joints and anchor plates, and friction welding; and billets. In addition, the company offers reinforcing bars, wire products, firebricks, and ballasts; trucking services; and industrial waste disposal services, as well as sells machinery, and raw materials for steel making. Further, it is involved in electric furnace dust disposal business; and manufacture and sale of crude zinc oxide, and organic and compound fertilizers. Godo Steel, Ltd. was incorporated in 1937 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Nippon Television Holdings, Inc. operates as a media and content company in Japan. The company engages in the production of broadcasting programs; digital broadcasting; technical production related to studios, live broadcasting, master technology, EJ news gathering, editing, postproduction, animations, etc.; and programming, content production, closed captioning, library, etc. It is also involved in sporting and NTV events; the management of NTV school; art design, and lighting and sound effects; design of sets, flip charts, and TV graphics; production of pamphlets, posters, etc.; intellectual property management; management of music publishing, CD master, and merchandising rights; production CDs and DVDs; rental of recording studios; and operation of fitness clubs, museums, and insurance agencies. In addition, the company engages in the production and construction of exhibitions, sales promotion events, international sports events, theme parks, amusement facilities, national ceremonies, etc.; production of program-related merchandise goods; construction management, printing, and renewable energy business; ICT, development of apps for business, web development, video streaming, infrastructure solutions, and advertising; production of animation, TV programs, commercial films, graphic designs, illustrations, characters, and other content; copyright management; and internet content streaming. Further, it engages in the provision of software and systems for VOD and live streaming platforms and players; news gathering, reporting, and production of information, sports programs, etc.; gathering and analysis of international media news; shooting, engineering; 3D computer graphics; services to program and technology production, clerical, and management duties; e-commerce, esports, and talent production agency businesses; contractual production; and influencers network and production business. The company was incorporated in 1952 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Sac's Bar Holdings Inc. engages in the retail sale of bags, fashion goods, and related accessories in Japan. It also offers ladies' bags, luggage, small items, and other products. In addition, the company is involved in retail of purses, wallets, and miscellaneous goods; planning, manufacturing, and selling of canvas bags and accessories; and sells men's and travel bags. It operates approximately 600 stores. The company operates shops under the SAC'S BAR, GRAN SAC'S, LAPAX, DOUX SAC'S, and NAUGHTIAM brand names. The company was formerly known as Tokyo Derica Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Sac's Bar Holdings Inc. in October 2014. The company was incorporated in 1974 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Daiichi Kensetsu Corporation engages civil engineering and construction contracting businesses in Japan. It undertakes civil engineering works related to railways and surrounding areas; public works; construction works; construction of new railway tracks and railroad crossings for conventional lines; and maintenance of railway tracks. Daiichi Kensetsu Corporation was incorporated in 1942 and is headquartered in Niigata, Japan.

O'will Corporation engages in the import/export and sale of food and drink materials in Japan and internationally. The company provides vitamin, calcium, amino acid, emulsifier, stabilizer, nutritional fortifier, dietary fiber, flavoring, high-fructose corn syrup, granulated sugar, fruit sugar, liquid sucrose, refined white sugar, and other food additive products. It also offers pasteurized milk, concentrated milk, powdered milk, cream, fermented milk, butter, cheese, and other dairy products; and fruit and vegetable juices, puree, fresh fruits and vegetables, canned foods, frozen fruits and vegetables, powders, extracts, and other fruit and vegetable products, as well as imports fish eggs, sushi toppings, and other processed marine products from overseas. In addition, the company provides green, matcha green, oolong, black, rooibos, blended, cocoa, herb, and other tea products, as well as other beverages. Further, it offers wastewater treatment systems, smart ceiling fans, and nozzle type steam traps. O'will Corporation was incorporated in 1986 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Tone Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells work tools, power tools, torque management equipment, and bolt fastening equipment under the TONE brand name in Japan, Asia, North America, Europe, and internationally. The company offers tool set, storages, automotive and cycle tools, torque wrenches, titanium tools, air tools, and accessory parts. It also provides labor-saving effort tools comprising electric tools, nutrunner, shear wrench, torshat, power digi torque/power wrench, and equipment socket. In addition, the company offers work tools consisting of socket wrench set, socket adapter, hammer/blow tool, handle, T and L wrench, drivers, bits, adjustable wrench/pipe wrench, spanner/box wrench, and pilers. It serves general, aerospace, construction, automotive, bridge, plant engineering, transportation, and alternative energy industries. The company was formerly known as Maeda Metal Industries, Ltd. and changed its name to Tone Co., Ltd. in November 2013. Tone Co., Ltd. was founded in 1938 and is headquartered in Arakawa, Japan.

Terasaki Electric Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells marine and industrial systems, circuit breakers, and medical devices in Japan, Asia, and Europe. The company offers power distribution system, control and monitoring system, energy-saving and environment-friendly system, crew education and training system, onboard data platform, and marine computer; industrial power distribution control and cogeneration system; circuit breakers, such as moulded case, air, multi cable transit, and other products; and develops, designs, and manufactures medical equipment and clinical testing equipment. It also offers starter panels; and manufactures and sells electrical equipment, such as low-voltage circuit breakers, including low-voltage molded circuit breakers, air circuit breakers, and earth leakage circuit breakers, etc. In addition, the company provides retrofit solution and lifecycle services for electrical equipment, as well as engineering services in power distribution and control for marine, railway, and industrial applications. Terasaki Electric Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1923 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Forside Co.,Ltd., an investment holding company, engages in prize, content, event, master rights, AI-related, and logistics-related businesses in Japan. The company involved in the planning, manufacturing, and selling of prizes for crane games and other prize games; operates Mobibook, an e-book distribution site; and publishing business. It also exhibits and sells famous content at event venues in commercial facilities. In addition, the company engages in the development of business tools; sale of GPU servers; general freight trucking and freight forwarding businesses; human resources services; and provision of temporary staffing, contract work, IT solutions, and transportation services, as well as act as a sales agent. The company was formerly known as SmartEbook.com Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Forside Co., Ltd. in April 2015. Forside Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
FORCIA, Inc. provides search business solutions in Japan. It primarily offers search platform development and consulting services. The company was incorporated in 2001 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Showa Shinku Co., Ltd. produces and sells vacuum equipment and components for quartz devices, optical thin films, and electronic devices in Japan, China, Taiwan, and internationally. It operates through Vacuum Technology Application Equipment Business and Service Business segments. The company offers vacuum deposition equipment; arc-discharge-type ion plating equipment; sputtering equipment; atomic layer deposition equipment; etching equipment, such as single wafer and batch type RIE equipment; ashing equipment, including plasma cleaning equipment; wafer trimming equipment; lord lock and in-line type ion beam frequency adjustment equipment; in-line type and high vacuum annealing equipment; film thickness control systems comprising optical film thickness control systems, and wireless temperature and crystal monitors; vacuum equipment for the aerospace industry; vacuum metallurgical equipment for dissolution, heat treatment, sintering, and degassing; multi-color and monochrome optical monitor for thin films; and IAD cold cathode ion source. It also provides SEARCHROID, an image recognition system; EPIoT, an edge computing system for predictive maintenance; hall accelerated ion source/plasma bridge neutralizer; high power RF ion source; ion source for etching; high usage efficiency cathode; and power saving device for oil diffusion pumps. In addition, the company offers modification and repair work. Its products are used in smartphone, automobile, digital camera, endoscope, tablet PC, and light-emitting diode applications. The company serves optical and electronics component industries. The company was formerly known as Showa Shinku Kikai (Showa Vacuum Machinery) Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Showa Shinku Co., Ltd. in 1978. Showa Shinku Co., Ltd. was founded in 1953 and is headquartered in Sagamihara, Japan.

Denyo Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in manufacturing and selling of engine-driven generators, welders, air compressors, and other special machinery in Japan, the United States, Asia, and internationally. The company offers single phase, three phase, and ultra-silence generators; gasoline and diesel welding machines; and box type, trailer type, after cooler type, and dry air type air compressors. It also manufactures, sells, services, leases, and rents industrial electrical machinery and parts. The company was formerly known as Japan Power Welding Machine Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Denyo Co., Ltd. in July 1966. Denyo Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1948 and is headquartered in Chuo, Japan.

Netyear Group Corporation operates a digital marketing platform in Japan. The company engages in the provision of consulting services on generative AI utilization; UX and innovation design; strengthen CRM; digital and Business to business marketing; and regional revitalization support services. It also engages in the digital content planning and production; system development; planning and sales of marketing tools; data analysis and effectiveness measurement; and social media marketing support business. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Atlas Technologies Corporation provides fintech consulting and project execution support services in Japan. The company offers consulting and project implementation support services in the insurance field; and services in the IT risk and PMO support fields. It is also involved in planning, consulting, project management, development, and operation of fintech businesses. The company serves banking and capital markets, payment, and insurance industries. Atlas Technologies Corporation was incorporated in 2018 and is headquartered in Chiyoda, Japan.

Toyo Denki Seizo K.K., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells electrical machinery and equipment for transportation, industry, ICT solutions, and related businesses in Japan and internationally. It operates through three segments: Transportation Business, Industrial Business, and ICT Solutions Business. The company engages in the manufacturing, sale, and related construction for electrical equipment used in rail vehicles, magnetic levitation vehicles systems, light rail vehicles, alternative rail vehicles and special purpose vehicles, as well as electric storage systems for railway applications. It is also involved in the manufacturing, sale, and related construction services for motors, inverters, testing equipment, water supply and sanitation equipment systems, power generating equipment, alternative power generating systems, and in-wheel motors; and automatic commuter ticket vending machines, onboard ticket vending machines, smart card vending machines, remote monitoring systems, and information systems equipment. The company was incorporated in 1918 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Cosel Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells electrical components and EMI filters in Japan and internationally. The company operates through five segments: Sales Business, North American Sales Business, European Production and Sales Business, Asian Sales Business, and Chinese Production Business. It offers AC-DC power supplies and DC-DC converters; and three- and single-phase EMI filters and DC input EMI filters, as well as semiconductor devices, such as IC and FET products, transistors, diodes, etc. for use in industrial and consumer equipment. The company was formerly known as Elco Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Cosel Co., Ltd. in April 1992. Cosel Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1969 and is headquartered in Toyama, Japan.

Ebara Foods Industry,Inc. produces and sells food condiments in Japan. It offers sauces, ketchup, and seasoning. The company sells its products under the Ohgon no aji and Sukiyaki no tare. EBARA Foods Industry,Inc. was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.

Property Technologies Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides technology solutions and other housing-related services in Japan. It offers KAITRY, a platform with AI assessment model for the purchase and sale of used housing, used detached housing, and renovated used housing, as well as used condominiums. The company was incorporated in 2020 and is headquartered in Shibuya, Japan.

Iwabuchi Corporation manufactures and sells electrical overhead wire hardware for electric power, communication, signals, broadcasting, and railway industries in Japan. The company offers power transmission and distribution equipment parts; communication equipment; broadcasting and supporting equipment; synthetic resin electrical insulation materials; and other electrical connection equipment. It also undertakes construction, civil engineering, electrical, telecommunication, designing, supervision, and facility contracting works. In addition, the company provides distribution line, CATV/information communication, traffic lights and road signs, school physical education facility, and disaster prevention radio services. Further, it offers seismic technology, contract testing, and renewable energy related services, as well as services for EV charging stations. Iwabuchi Corporation was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Matsudo, Japan.

Yutaka Trusty Securities Co., Ltd. trades in commodity futures in Japan. It engages in the commodity derivative trading; and financial instruments trading, including exchange-traded stock index margin trading, exchange-traded foreign exchange margin trading, and stock index futures trading. The company also offers intermediary services, as well as gold bullion sales, and platinum club activities. In addition, it engages in the real estate management business, which manages training facilities, etc. The company was formerly known as Yutaka Shoji Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yutaka Trusty Securities Co., Ltd. in November 2020. Yutaka Trusty Securities Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1957 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Tsubakimoto Kogyo Co., Ltd. engages in the sale of machinery, equipment, parts, and accessories in Japan. It offers power transmission products, such as motion controllers, sensing/inspection/measurement equipment, motors and geared motors, linear servo devices, servo motors, actuators, chains and belts, couplings, reducers/accelerators, clutches and brakes, and peripheral equipment. The company also provides facilities and equipment for housing/materials/ceramics, food, paper/newspapers, chemicals/films, medicine/medical care, automobiles, tire/rubber factory systems, information systems, logistics, precision machinery and assembly systems, environment, aircraft, and trains and railway industries. In addition, it offers nonwoven fabrics, materials and moldings, engineered products, and other products; and sensing products, including sensors, lighting, cameras/lens, image processing systems, and IoT/AI/other products. Further, the company is involved in surveying, design, management, and contracting of civil engineering and construction work. The company was formerly known as Tsubakimoto Shoten Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tsubakimoto Kogyo Co., Ltd. in July 1943. Tsubakimoto Kogyo Co., Ltd. was founded in 1916 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Yamada Servicer Synthetic Office operates as a servicer company in Japan. It operates through three segments: Servicer Business, Dispatch Business, and Real Estate Solutions Business. The company offers management and collection of purchased and entrusted receivables; worker dispatch services; and consulting services for restructuring and propose concrete support measures. It also provides real estate and development consulting services; surveying works; and debt investigation and advisory services. The company was formerly known as Yamada Servicer Synthetic Office Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yamada Servicer Synthetic Office in March 2025. Yamada Servicer Synthetic Office was incorporated in 1981 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.

Japan Medical Dynamic Marketing, INC. develops, manufactures, imports, and sells medical devices in Japan and the United States. The company provides trauma devices, including nails, screws, plates, and other products surgically implanted in the fracture site; joint prostheses, which replaces natural joints and restores functions damaged or lost due to disease or injury; spinal fixation devices to fix spinal instability directly through corrective surgery; and artificial bones that are used to fill gaps in bone defects caused by bone fractures or bone tumors. It offers its products to doctors and hospitals. The company was incorporated in 1973 and is headquartered in Shinjuku, Japan.

TDSE Inc. primarily provides consulting services on information processing and computer systems in Japan. The company offers DX and analytics consulting, SNS analysis, analysis base construction, and analysis operation and application development services; and IoT data utilization, learning utilization, and data scientist development support services. It also provides Scorobo, an artificial intelligence engine for use in finance, digital marketing, manufacture, social infrastructure, human resources, and telematics industries; and NetBase, a social listening tool for enterprise social analytics. The company was formerly known as Tecnos Data Science Engineering Incorporated and changed its name to TDSE Inc. in November 2021. TDSE Inc. was incorporated in 2013 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Petgo Corporation operates an e-commerce platform for pet health care products. The company also operates a DX platform to manage pet data. It owns and operates stores for dog and cat consumer goods. It also engages in a dog sitter matching business. Petgo Corporation was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Writeup Co.,Ltd. provides management support services in Japan. It operates through two segments X Solutions and Content Businesses. The X Solution business segment provides support for the introduction of IT tools, human resource development support, marketing support, support for securing funds, etc. It offers services, including J system, that diagnoses subsidies that can be utilized to request applications online; JD Net is a joint purchasing and development network; and J consulting, which provides management consulting on solving management issues. The Content business segment plans and provides optimal web marketing support measures to address various marketing issues faced by client companies. It also offers services, including email marketing support, social media activation support, and content production. Writeup Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 2002 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Buffalo Inc., through its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and sells digital home appliances and computer peripherals in Japan and internationally. The company offers Wi-Fi, Wired LAN, Hard Disk) / NAS, SSD, Blu-ray/DVD/CD drive, memory, USB memory, memory cards/card readers/writers, audio/visual equipment, cable, mouse, keyboard and input devices, web camera/headset, smartphone accessories, tablet accessories, power supply related products, accessories and storage, tv accessories, and other peripherals. It is involved in Development, manufacturing and sales of equipment, construction, installation and maintenance of network infrastructure, data recovery services, and network storage; development and sales of storage software and direct marketing; exchange services and data; manufacture and sale of erasing products; planning, development, sales, and sales of audio equipment and related products; and procurement and management of materials. The company was formerly known as Melco Holdings Inc. and changed its name to Buffalo Inc. in April 2025. Buffalo Inc. was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Mitsumura Printing Co., Ltd. engages in printing, industrial materials and electronic component manufacturing, and real estate rental businesses in Japan. The company offers commercial printing, antivirus, antibacterial, direct mail, calendar, and clear file printing services, as well as publication and art printing services. It also provides art, newspaper, and panorama printing services; form printing, and label slip and delivery packs; anti-counterfeiting printing products; and packaging materials, and shopping bags and boxes. In addition, the company engages in digital content activities comprising website production, e-book / e-catalog production, video content production, photographing / video editing, and AR content; POP and in-store promotion tools; and digital and on-demand printing services. Further, it provides etching precision and screen printing products. Mitsumura Printing Co., Ltd. was founded in 1901 and is headquartered in Shinagawa, Japan.

Kohsai Co.,Ltd. engages in the jewelry business in Japan. It offers jewelry accessories, such as rings, and pendants; and jewelry parts, including earring parts, and clasps under the MILLENNIUM TANZO, and etna brand name. The company was formerly known as Kosaikogei Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Kohsai Co.,Ltd. in August 2017. The company was founded in 1955 and is headquartered in Kai, Japan. Kohsai Co.,Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Estio Co., Ltd.

Zojirushi Corporation manufactures and markets household products in Japan and internationally. The company offers rice cooker; microwave oven; kitchen appliances, including hot plate, toaster oven, electric cooking pot, grill pan, multi roaster, coffee maker, blender/juicer, tabletop IH cooking heater, home bakery, mochi pounding machine, dish dryer, and other kitchen supplies; pots and kettles; household appliances, such as humidifier, futon dryer, and air purifier; water bottles and tumblers; lunch box; and commercial products, including soup jar and cookware, electric rice cooker, chocolate warmer, electric pot/kettle, humidifiers and air purifiers, pot cool pitcher, vacuum drink dispenser, coffee maker, and insulated food container. Zojirushi Corporation was founded in 1918 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Yamaura Corporation engages in the construction business in Japan. The company is involved in the planning, design, and construction of architecture and civil engineering; development business, housing, condominiums, real estate transactions, and management; medical and welfare business; and store development. It also engages in the planning, design, production, and construction of automatic control and information communication systems, environmental and energy systems, steel structures, bridges, and mechanical systems; and buying and selling real estate, rental and residential land development, condominium business, etc. The company was founded in 1919 and is headquartered in Komagane, Japan.

Buffalo Co.,Ltd. operates as a franchisee of AUTOBACS stores in Japan. The company offers tires and wheels; child seats, carriers, chains, car interior accessories, and dress-up items; accessories and maintenance supplies; car electronics, including car navigation, car TV, drive recorder, DVD/CD player amplifiers, ETC in-vehicle devices, and connectors; and engine oils and batteries.
