The company offers web solutions, including web and electronic form, SMS/email delivery, and website construction; data print processing services comprising full-color variable and address printing, cards, and barcode outputs; mailing services, such as enclosed and sealed, inspection equipment/check, matching, matching, and categorization, and post office delivery; business process outsourcing services consisting of application form receptions, survey results, my number reception, and year-end tax adjustments; and business form printing services for invoice, pressure-sealed postcards, seals and labels, environmentally friendly products. It also provides planning, production, commercial printing, and redesign services for brochures and flyers, universal designs, posters and stickers, and promotional material designs, as well as various tool creating services, including survey results reports, inventory management, and progress management. Hikari Business Form Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1968 and is headquartered in Hachioji, Japan.

Teikoku Tsushin Kogyo Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of electronic components in Japan and internationally. The company offers resistance sensors, potentiometers, trimmer potentiometers, encoders, switches, fixed resistors, antifreeze-heaters, and customized products. Its products are applied in automotive, game and toy, home appliances, medical and healthcare, and office supply, as well AV, musical and acoustic, house, and industrial equipment. The company was incorporated in 1944 and is headquartered in Kawasaki, Japan.

Ic Co., Ltd. engages in the provision of solutions in the information service field in Japan. It offers IT solutions, including software development, infrastructure design and construction, and system operation support. The company also provides IT services, such as package development for ticket industry. It serves manufacturing, distribution, finance, and service industries. The company was formerly known as Information Creative Co., Ltd., and changed its name to Ic Co., Ltd. in April 2022. Ic Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1978 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

Aichi Tokei Denki Co., Ltd. engages in the provision of water and gas meters, and related equipment in Japan and internationally. The company offers liquid measurement products comprising electromagnetic water meters, residential water meters, portable and electronic water meters, capacitive electromagnetic flow sensors, compact electromagnetic flow sensors, flow sensors, microstream sensors, ovel gear flow sensors, instantaneous flow-rate/integrating flow volume flowmeters, small-size flow sensors, ultrasonic flow meters, and electromagnetic flow meters for agricultural applications. It also provides gas measurement products, such as ultrasonic flow meters for compressed air and nitrogen; ultrasonic flow meter for fuel gas; turbine gas meters for flow management; pressure-reducing valves; intelligent gas meters; digital manometers for town gas and LP gas; and systems. In addition, the company offers private-demand flow sensors and systems, including housing and building equipment and systems, instrumentations, precision machining and other parts. The company was formerly known as AICHI TOKEI MFG. CO., LTD. and changed its name to Aichi Tokei Denki Co., Ltd. in July 1912. Aichi Tokei Denki Co., Ltd. was founded in 1898 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

NANYO Corporation, a general machinery trading company, distributes and rents various machineries in Japan and internationally. It operates through three segments: Industrial Equipment Business, Construction Machinery Business, and Crushed Stone Business. The company offers semiconductor production equipment, inspection equipment, AI and labor-saving equipment, speed reducer and hydraulic system, logistics equipment, and environment-related and other equipment; precision parts processing, FA mechatronics, and ship-related equipment; semiconductor manufacturing equipment; and industrial machines and electronic components. It also provides various construction machineries, attachments, vehicles/trucks, forestry machinery, environment-related equipment, cranes, and other machines. In addition, the company offers ultraviolet rays irradiation systems for dicing films removal, as well as cutting robots in main sewers under the NANYO brand. Further, it engages in the manufactures and sale of crushed rock. The company was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Fukuoka City, Japan.

Nihon Tokushu Toryo Co., Ltd. provides automotive products and paints and coatings in Japan, rest of Asia, and internationally. It offers automotive soundproofing, rust-proof, and anti-corrosive coatings; and paints and coatings for aviation and space industries, as well as insurance agency services. The company was founded in 1929 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Aichi Corporation manufactures and sells mechanized vehicles for electric utilities, telecommunications, construction, cargo handling, shipbuilding, and rail industries in Japan, Asia, Oceania, Europe, and internationally. It offers truck-mounted and self-propelled aerial work platforms, bridge inspection vehicle, and digger derricks. The company was formerly known as Aichi Sharyo Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Aichi Corporation in 1992. The company was incorporated in 1943 and is headquartered in Ageo, Japan.

SUNNEXTA GROUP Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates as an outsourcing service company in Japan. It operates in three segments: Corporate Housing Management Business, Condominium Management Business, and Incubation Business. The company offers corporate housing administrative work related to company housing, dormitories, and parking lots; BPO services for human resources and general affairs, and housing system consultation services; and cost reduction services. It also provides apartment management services, real estate-related services, and reform and renovation services, as well as monitoring security services, insurance agency services, and condominium management digital transformation support services. The company was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Starzen Company Limited engages in the processing, manufacturing, and sale of meat, meat products, and food stuffs in Japan. The company offers fish meat, ham, sausage, bacon, roast beef, roast pork, and hamburgers. It also produces, processes, and trades livestock products, such as pig; imports and exports meat and livestock products; and processes ground meat, and fish products, delicacies, etc; and manufactures and sells noodles. In addition, the company involved in the provision of seasonings, freight transportation; and land management and leasing services. It sells its products to supermarkets, meat specialty stores, department stores, restaurants, fast food chains, convenience stores, co-operatives, food processing manufacturers, meat wholesale traders, and others. It exports its products to the United States, Hong Kong, Singapore, Macau, Thailand, Taiwan, Canada, the European Union, and Australia. Starzen Company Limited was incorporated in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Mitsubishi Research Institute, Inc. provides research, consulting, and ICT solutions to the public and private sectors in Japan. It offers consulting services for management, digital transformation, energy, sustainability, food and agriculture, information and communication technology, regions, communities, mobility, healthcare, human resources, disaster prevention and risk management, and global strategy. The company was incorporated in 1970 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Suzumo Machinery Company Limited manufactures and sells food machines for small kitchens and factories worldwide. The company provides sushi machine; rice serving machine; roll sushi machine; onigiri making machine; rice cooker and mixer; rice weighting and serving machine; sushi wrapping machine; and sushi making machine. It also offers rice cooking net, rice pack, Shari tray, lubricant oil/anti-sticking oil, easy-open sushi wrapping film, anti-fog wrap, and polyethylene disposable gloves, rice container cart. The company was incorporated in 1961 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Applied Technology Co., Ltd. provides engineering services in Japan. The company operates through Solution Services Business and Engineering Services Business segments. It offers manufacturing solutions centered on the manufacturing industry; development of various automatic design systems, structural analysis, and estimation systems for construction and civil engineering fields; disaster prevention and environmental simulation; town development planning and asset maintenance support services; and system development and technical support. The company also provides building information modeling, construction digital transformation, digital transformation, construction information modeling, computer aided design, product lifecycle management, toDIM, BooT.one, geographic information system, toBIM, Space.E, toCIM, and navismaster services. In addition, the company offers consulting services. Applied Technology Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1984 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan. Applied Technology Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Transcosmos, Inc.

Sawafuji Electric Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of electrical equipment, generators, and refrigerators in Japan and internationally. The company offers starters, alternators, HV and DC motors, battery packs, and control devices. It also provides portable refrigerators under the ENGEL brand; gasoline and diesel engine generators under the Elemax brand; and engine welders and retarder. In addition, the company is involved in the provision of transportation and freightage services; and production and sale of coolers and ice boxes, and generators under the ENGEL brand. The company was formerly known as Sawafuji Electric Manufactory and changed its name to Sawafuji Electric Co.,Ltd. in 1934. Sawafuji Electric Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1908 and is headquartered in Ota, Japan.

Takasho Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of various garden supplies and materials in Japan, Europe, China, South Korea, the United States, and internationally. It is also involved in the manufacturing and processing of landscaping and exterior materials, natural bamboo, and wood products; sales of landscaping and exterior materials and construction; website planning, production and operation; publishing and sales of magazines and books; space design and sales of gardens and exteriors; manufacture and sale of lighting equipment; and video design and production. Takasho Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1935 and is headquartered in Kainan, Japan.

NPR-Riken Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells automobile engine parts, marine engine parts, and other products in Japan and internationally. It operates through the Automotive & Industrial Machinery Parts Business and Plumbing & Construction Equipment Business segments. The company offers automotive parts, including piston rings, camshafts, valve seat inserts, cylinder liners, and other parts for internal combustion engines, as well as casting parts for car bodies and seal rings for transmissions. It also provides piston rings used in the main engines for propulsion of large container vessels and seal rings for generator facilities and industrial equipment; piping products for lifelines, disaster prevention systems, and plants; and metal injection molding products. In addition, the company offers thermal engineering products, such as PYROMAX metallic heating element and PYROMAX SUPER ceramic heating element; electromagnetic compatibility products that include anechoic chambers and other products for measuring electromagnetic waves; medical equipment comprising the NiFreeT, a titanium tantalum alloy for bio-implantable devices; and exterior parts for recreational vehicles and infrastructure products that include generators, toilets, and air conditioners. The company was incorporated in 2023 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. NPR-Riken Corporation operates as a subsidiary of Npr-Riken Corporation.

Matsui Construction Co., Ltd. engages in the civil engineering, designing, supervising, and construction business in Japan. The company undertakes shrines, temples, and cultural assets works, as well as government building, office building, education, research, culture, commerce, distribution, production, medical care, welfare, living space, and environmental arrangement. It also involved in the lumber and woodworking activities; manufacturing, processing, and selling of civil engineering and construction materials; owing, selling, leasing, trading, and management of real estate properties; property insurance agency; and brokerage services. In addition, the company manages sports, tourism, and leisure facilities; and engages in buying and selling of electricity and power generation business. Matsui Construction Co., Ltd. was founded in 1586 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Creo Co.,Ltd. engages in the development of information processing systems and provision of related services in Japan. It operates through Solution Service Business, Development, System Operation/Service Business, and Support Service Business segments. The company offers CREO integration-platform for DX, which focuses on business innovation and improvement, and co-creation; gym cloud, a cloud-based business framework for HR and accounting departments; Tramil, a purchasing process management cloud; SmartStage, an IT service management solution; CREO-RPA, an internal control-compliant RPA service; CREO-OCR, a high-precision handwriting recognition using an AI-OCR engine; and BIZ PLATFORM, a business management platform. It also provides ZeeM on Azure, an IT outsourcing service; ZeeM HR payroll/TimePro-VG, a HR/payroll and employment management package; ZeeM human resources and payroll for school corporations; ZeeM labor and social insurance outsourcing service; ZeeM accounting; and ZeeM fixed asset management. In addition, the company offers QuickBinder, a document management system; cloud business solutions, which include building cloud sites and infrastructure development, as well as planning, designing, and operating services; building core business systems; contract development for local government; 2Media, a media content creator solution; N-CLOUD, a resource pool-based private IaaS; and Veva personnel evaluation systems and Yahoo! Safety confirmation services. Further, it provides contract system development; system development, maintenance, and operation; help desk and technical support; social surveys and market research; and outsourcing services, including dispatching engineers to client companies and handling incoming and outgoing calls at call centers. The company was formerly known as Tokai Create CO., LTD. and changed its name to Creo Co.,Ltd. in April 1989. Creo Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1974 and is headquartered in Shinagawa, Japan.

Oiles Corporation manufactures and sells bearings, structural equipment, and construction equipment in Japan and internationally. It offers bearing products, including plastic, resin, multi-layer, metal, and air bearing; dies and mold products; and slide shifters. The company also provides seismic isolators and vibration control devices, damping devices, and architectural products for bridges and buildings; and smoke exhaust/ ventilation systems. Oiles Corporation was founded in 1939 and is headquartered in Fujisawa, Japan.

Yamaya Corporation primarily engages in the retail sale of alcoholic beverages and food products through stores and mail order in Japan. It also operates restaurants. The company was founded in 1952 and is headquartered in Sendai, Japan.

TOBISHIMA HOLDINGS Inc. engages in the construction business in Japan and internationally. The company is involved in the research, survey, planning, drafting, designing, supervision, and operation of civil engineering, construction work and contracting, as well as regional development, urban and marine development, and environmental enhancement; mediation of corporate acquisitions, mergers, company splits, share exchanges and transfers, business transfers, capital alliances, and business alliances; computer-based information processing and hardware and software development; and mediation for the formulation of corporate management strategies, organizational and business restructuring, and corporate revitalization, as well as non-life insurance agency, insurance agency, and life insurance solicitation businesses. It also engages in housing, real estate transaction, and real estate leasing businesses; planning, drafting, designing, holding, maintenance, management, operation, and management of public facilities; supply of energy, such as electricity and heat; contract maintenance and management of buildings and facilities incidental to buildings; entrustment of security and security; acquisition, licensing, and sale of industrial property rights, copyrights, and know-how; planning, design, manufacture, and sale of plant factories; and research and development related to the production of agricultural, forestry, and fishery products. In addition, the company manufactures, procures, sells, and leases construction machinery and equipment, civil engineering, and construction-related materials; produces, processes, and sells agricultural, forestry, and fishery products; provides worker dispatching and fee-based employment brokerage services, consulting services; and engages in projects related to the remediation of environmental pollution. TOBISHIMA HOLDINGS Inc. was incorporated in 2024 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

General Packer Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells various packaging machines and peripheral equipment, and food processing and confectionery production machinery in Japan and internationally. It provides pouch filling-sealing machines, automatic bag forming and filling-sealing machines, automatic N2 gas flushing filling-sealing machines, and special type automatics bag filling-sealing machines, as well as automatic tray and desiccant insert bag feeding packaging machines, non-instructive residual oxygen analyzers, and chocolate manufacturing machines. The company also offers flour packaging, pasta packaging, drip coffee packaging, rice packaging, stick packages outer packaging, intravenous solution bag packaging, ampoule filling gas substitution packaging, medical device packaging, health foods packaging, pet foods packaging, and seed and seedling packaging system. The company was founded in 1961 and is headquartered in Kitanagoya, Japan.

BRIDGE International Group Corp., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the provision of corporate sale services in Japan. It operates through Inside Sales Outsourcing Business, Process Technology Business, and Training segments. The company offers consulting services, such as revenue process, marketing process, inside sales process, field sales process, customer success process design and optimization, as well as RevOps launch and optimization; and marketing, inside sales, and customer success field outsourcing and operations services. It also provides Tech Stack comprising Rev Tech, MarTech, Sales Tech, and Customer Tech selection, implementation, and utilization support services; and role-specific training in the sales process. The company was formerly known as BRIDGE International Corp. and changed its name to BRIDGE International Group Corp. in October 2025. BRIDGE International Group Corp. was incorporated in 2002 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Yuasa Funashoku Co., Ltd. operates as a food trading company in Japan. The company operates through three segments Commercial Segment, Hotel Segment, Real Estate Unit. The Commercial Segment sells food, ingredients, alcoholic beverages. The Hotel Segment operates business hotels, restaurants. The Real Estate Unit is engaged in the rental business of real estate. It also offers processed foods, chilled foods, commercial products, feed, livestock, rice, etc. The company was founded in 1936 and is headquartered in Funabashi, Japan.

Medikit Co.,Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, sells, and exports medical devices related to blood vessels and blood in Japan and internationally. The company offers IV catheters, such as Supercath 5 and Supercath Ztu-V; hemodialysis products, including Supercath PRO, Supercath NEO, and Supercath Clampcath; and intervention products comprising Supersheath sheath introducers and Mongoose angiography catheters. It also provides indwelling needles for artificial dialysis; and needles for blood transfusions and infusions. Medikit Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Bunkyo, Japan.

Sotoh Co., Ltd. engages in the dyeing and processing of woolen, composite fiber, and knitted fabrics in Japan. The company provides textile and synthetic fiber dyeing and processing services; and manufactures and sells textiles. It also engages in the real estate business. The company was incorporated in 1923 and is based in Ichinomiya, Japan.

Kyoritsu Computer & Communication Co.,Ltd. engages in sale of mobile phones and other devices in Japan. The company offers telephone exchange system, smartphone extension system, smartphone linkage solution, and call center reception system; and WAN, wired LAN, wireless LAN construction, server construction, PC setup, remote access system, and PC monitoring system. It also provides Docomo Office Link, which enables to use the nationwide Docomo service area as an office extension area; Anshin Manager/CLOMO, Docomo's mobile device management; WowTalk, a business chat; docodesu car, a cloud-based location information service; CloudSign, an electronic contract service; and smartphone usage support, store, and smartphone class services. In addition, the company offers Microsoft solutions, such as Microsoft Teams, Microsoft 365, Cloud Server Microsoft Azure, and Windows Virtual Desktop; financial accounting system, sales management system, human resources and labor management system, Bugyo cloud edge, and Bugyo collaboration fusion solution; cloud-based business system; and ICT solutions for local governments, schools, and hospitals. Further, it is involved in retail sales and corporate sales of mobile communications equipment, as well as software; and provision of maintenance and operation services. The company was formerly known as Kyoritsu Densetsu Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kyoritsu Computer & Communication Co.,Ltd. in November 1988. Kyoritsu Computer & Communication Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1964 and is based in Minato, Japan.

Branding Technology Inc. engages in the brand, digital marketing, and offshore related businesses in Japan. It operates through Brand Business and Digital Marketing Business segment. The company offers owned media creation through websites, landing pages, banners, brochures, etc.; provides management support services; and engages in content creation activities. It also offers brand, website, advertising operation, SNS management, SEO/MEO, and DX consulting services; website, recruitment site, video, article content, and logo and sales tool production services, as well as web system construction; and search advertisement, display/demand side platform/article advertisement, SNS/video ads, content SEO, email magazine planning and production, and posting/flyer advertisement services. Branding Technology Inc. was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Shibuya, Japan.

BlueMeme Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the DX business in Japan. The company offers Outsystems, a low-code development platform, including rich grid component, SVF cloud connector, Omnext, and document generations services; MarkLogic, a multi-model database; Workato, an integration platform that automates various workflows that require collaboration between multiple applications with low code; Creatio, a no-code BPM platform for business applications that automates and visualizes business processes; and mabl, an AI-based test automation platform that enables low-code automatic testing of workflows, visuals, APIs, browser compatibility, and others. It also provides consulting services, including low-code implementation assessment services, business analysis and requirements definition services, remote technical support for business application development, and proposal for the development of AGILE-DX; contract development services, such as low-code contract development, source code migration services, and BlueMeme digital agent services; seminars and training of low code engineers; and sale and support of software products. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Chiyoda, Japan.

GreenBee, Inc. provides green and digital transformation and technology licensing services in Japan. It provides green transformation products and solutions, including EV and quick chargers, industrial and home energy storage systems, risen hyper-ion solar panels, and smart data logger devices. The company also offers digital transformation services, such as GreenBee Cloud Backup, a subscription-based cloud backup service for smartphones; and Risk Finder, which supports secure Android app development. In addition, it provides Embedded Browser Tourbillon, a browser solution for broadcasting services; VAlution BD, a Blu-ray disc playback software for embedded applications; sMedio True BD/True DVD, a Blu-ray disc player app for Windows; sMedio TV Suite for Windows, a DTCP-IP player app; sMedio Data Transfer, a file transfer with QR code; and sMedio DTCP MOVE, a video management application for NAS devices. The company was formerly known as sMedio, Inc. and changed its name to GreenBee, Inc. in April 2024. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Amifa Co.,Ltd. manufactures and distributes lifestyle products in Japan. The company offers gift wrap products, including paper bag, paper box, gift wrap paper, ribbon, and plastic bag; and DIY or stationery, such as washi tapes, sticky notes, memo pads, journals, tableware, paperwares, etc. It also provides hand-made craft, kitchenware, wrapping materials, display service, and material for sales promotion. The company offers its products 100-yen shop companies, retailers, wholesalers, department stores, stationery shops, and miscellaneous shops. The company was incorporated in 1973 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

Medipal Holdings Corporation engages in the prescription pharmaceutical wholesale business in Japan. It procures healthcare products related to diagnostics, testing, treatment, and administration comprising medical equipment and medical materials, and clinical diagnostic reagents for use from the pre-symptomatic stage; handles PMS services on contract for manufacturers; and invests in orphan drugs and other products. The company is also involved in the wholesale of cosmetics, daily necessities, and OTC pharmaceuticals; and animal health products for companion animals; and food processing raw materials for agriculture, fisheries, and livestock. In addition, it engages in the contract-based epidemiological studies, clinical studies, etc.; creation of a computerized medical supply database and master product databases for medical facilities; life and non-life insurance agency business; cleaning management; management and operation of distribution centers; commissioned delivery and worker dispatch business; planning, management, administration, and product and service development for the class A health dispensing pharmacies service brand; and distributes specialty pharmaceuticals. Further, the company is involved in contract logistics services; information provision services; health insurance claims review, medical coding dispatch, outsourcing and remote education; and creation of a medical supply database and master product databases for medical facilities. It serves hospitals, clinics, dispensing pharmacies, drugstores, home centers, convenience stores, supermarkets, discount stores, animal hospitals, livestock and fish producers, and processed food manufacturers. The company was formerly known as Mediceo Paltac Holdings Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Medipal Holdings Corporation in October 2009. Medipal Holdings Corporation was founded in 1898 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Sumiseki Holdings,Inc. imports, purchases, and sells coal in Japan. It also manufactures, purchases, and sells industrial synthetic diamonds; and collects, processes, and sells rocks. The company invests in coal companies. Sumiseki Holdings,Inc. was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Hagoromo Foods Corporation manufactures and sells various food products in Japan. The company offers tuna products, such as canned tuna and bonito; canned fruits, such as mandarin oranges, white peaches, pineapples, and yellow peaches; desserts comprising boiled azuki beans and zenzai; pasta and sauces; dried bonito flakes, seaweed, and seasonings; packaged rice; and prepared food, including canned sweet corn and pouch series of single-use ingredients, as well as a series of mackerel, saury, and sardines. It also provides fish extract, fish oil, and feed products, as well as pet food. The company was founded in 1931 and is headquartered in Shizuoka, Japan.

Cube Co., Ltd. plans, manufactures, wholesales, retails, and golf-related clothing and accessories in Japan and internationally. It offers casual wear, including tops, knitwear, suits, outerwear, etc. The company is also involved in brand consulting and licensing businesses. In addition, the company sells its products under the MARK & LONA and HORN GARMENT brand names through retail and online stores. Cube Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1994 and is based in Minato, Japan.

Data Applications Company, Limited engages in software development, sales, and consulting related to corporate internal and external data linkage in Japan. The company's product portfolio comprises enterprise data link infrastructure; B2B server for digital business transactions; enterprise Web-EDI system infrastructure; Web-based data exchange system architecture tools; full automation of browser functions for Web-EDI; TCP/IP banking systems; data-handling platforms; non-programming data exchange tools; and EDI client for small and medium-sized businesses. Data Applications Company, Limited was incorporated in 1982 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Nihon Nohyaku Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells agricultural chemicals in Japan, the United States, India, rest of Asia, Brazil, and internationally. It operates through Pesticides; Chemicals Other Than Pesticides; and Others segments. The company offers crop protection products comprising fungicides, insecticides, and herbicides; crop aid products, including bio stimulants; termiticides; agricultural materials; chemical products used for home gardening and greenery; wood chemicals; pharmaceuticals and animal health products, including topical antifungal and flea/tick control agents; veterinary medicines; and feed additives. It also provides agrochemical and pesticide residue analysis; chemical substance safety testing; real estate rental and management; landscaping and greening construction; and logistics and warehousing services. In addition, the company sells chemicals and pesticides for golf courses; home, garden, and greenification products; turf and turf-related materials; adjuvants; termite control materials; and epidemic prevention insecticides. Further, it engages in the planning and construction of gardens and amenity areas; provision of contract manufacturing; storage and transport of agrochemicals; and cultivation and management of fields. The company was incorporated in 1926 and is headquartered in Chuo, Japan. Nihon Nohyaku Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Adeka Corporation.

A-One Seimitsu Inc. produces and sells collet chuck products. The company operates in three segments: Collet Chuck Division, Cutting Tool Division, and Automatic Lathe Cam Division. It provides collet chuck/guide bushes used in automatic lathes, general industrial machines, and special machines; re-grinds special cutting tools; cams used in automatic lathes and dedicated machines; and re-polishing and regrinding of cutting tools used in cutting processes. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Fuchu, Japan.

Akatsuki Eazima Co., Ltd. engages in the design, construction, and maintenance of various facilities and equipment in Japan. The company operates through three segments: Equipment Business, Solar Power Generation Business, and Other Business. It offers building equipment, including air conditioning, sanitary water supply and drainage, constant temperature and humidity, air purification, refrigeration and freezing, soundproofing and insulation, disaster prevention, kitchen, elevator and escalator, solar systems/cogeneration equipment; and building care services, such as maintenance and management of building facilities, regular inspections of various building facilities, and on-site maintenance services for building facilities. The company also provides renewal services comprising survey, design, and construction of renovation works, as well as comprehensive building diagnosis; and civil engineering services, which include water supply and sewerage construction, landscaping, pipe repair, golf course sprinkler system construction, various plants construction, and nuclear power-related facility construction. In addition, it is involved in energy conservation works, such as air conditioning equipment renovation, energy management construction, energy-saving lighting equipment renovation, and structural renovation; solar power generation and sale; and real estate sale and rental. The company was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Mito, Japan.

Modalis Therapeutics Corporation engages in the research and development of therapeutics to treat patients with serious genetic disorders. The company is developing therapies for genetic diseases using its proprietary CRISPR-GNDM an epigenome editing technology that combines dCas9. It also develops various therapeutics for muscle disorders, cardiomyopathy, and CNS disorders. The company was formerly known as EdiGENE Corporation and changed its name to Modalis Therapeutics Corporation in August 2019. Modalis Therapeutics Corporation was incorporated in 2016 and is headquartered in Chuo, Japan.

NS Tool Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells cutting tools in Japan. The company offers micro end mills, micro drills, end mills for aluminum and resin, long neck end mill series for copper electrode, flat drills, and thread mills. It also provides solid carbide end mills for hi-tech industries. The company was formerly known as Nisshin Kogu Seisakusho Co., Ltd. and changed its name to NS Tool Co., Ltd. in 1991. NS Tool Co., Ltd. was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

JANOME Corporation engages in the planning, development, and production of sewing machines in Japan, North America, Europe, Oceania, Central and South America, the rest of Asia, and the Middle East. The company offers home appliances, such as embroidery/sewing, sewing, professional sewing, overlock, and professional embroidery. It also provides industrial equipment, such as servo presses, desktop, and cartesian robots, as well as automatic screw presenters and die casting products. In addition, the company develops systems, constructs software, and outsources system operations control. The company was formerly known as Janome Sewing Machine Co., Ltd. and changed its name to JANOME Corporation in October 2021. JANOME Corporation was founded in 1921 and is headquartered in Hachioji, Japan.

Nitta Corporation engages in the provision of power transmission belts, conveyor belts and units, and other products in Japan and internationally. It operates through six segments: Belt and Rubber Products Business; Hose and tube product business; Chemical Products Business; Other Industrial Products Business; Real Estate Business; and Management Guidance Business. It offers power transmission and conveyor belts, including PolySprint, Polybelt, and Super Endless belts; curve belt list; and conveyor units, such as curve, spiral, non-snaking, and junction conveyor systems. It also provides Hose and tube products comprising thermoplastic hoses and couplings, tubing and tube fittings, clean tube fittings, speed controllers and valves, and disconnect couplings; and industrial wipers and molded rubber products, such as slide, lip, telesco, and cover seals. In addition, the company offers air and chemical filters; filter casting and clean system equipment; bacteria decontamination equipment; particle and microorganism measuring instruments. Further, it provides mechatronics products, including automatic tool changers, swivel joints, and interface units; Intelimer tapes; and RFID magnetic sheets. Additionally, the company offers SOFTmatics, a robot hand used for handling objects; air filter, chemical filter, filter casing and clean system equipment, bacteria decontamination equipment, and particle and microorganism measuring instruments; and thermoplastic tubes, thermoplastic tubes, tubes and fittings for air brakes, thermoplastic tubes, and air spring. It serves civil engineering and construction, automobile, logistic and transportation, environment and energy, industrial machinery, semiconductor, liquid crystal and electronic components, food, medicine, and healthcare industries. The company was formerly known as Nitta Belting Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nitta Corporation in 1982. Nitta Corporation was founded in 1885 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Okaya Electric Industries Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacture and sale of electrical components and equipment in Japan and internationally. The company offers noise suppression products, such as noise suppression capacitors, spark killers, high pulse capacitors, noise filters, and common mode choke coils; surge protective devices (SPD), including module, PCB mounted, and SMD type SPD; LED display devices and lighting source products; and sensor products. Its products are used in air conditioner, refrigerators, cooking appliances, audiovisual and communication equipment, medical equipment, industrial equipment, and urban infrastructure. The company was formerly known as Okaya Radio Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Okaya Electric Industries Co., Ltd. in 1967. Okaya Electric Industries Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1939 and is headquartered in Setagaya, Japan.

Okamoto Industries, Inc. manufactures and sells industrial and household products in Japan and internationally. It offers industrial products, including plastic films; wallpaper for housing, decorative films, moldable ABS and acrylic sheets, and synthetic leather for furniture; automotive materials; agricultural films/work materials; and food wrapping films, absorbent/dehydrant sheets, gloves, and other food sanitation materials. The company also provides adhesive tapes and rubber bands; flexible container bags; medical/welfare products comprising wound dressing materials, medical gloves, autoclaves, masks, and other sanitary materials; and industrial products, such as cleanroom gloves, adhesive mats for entrances, partition films, safety shoes, and other products. In addition, it offers household products consisting of condoms/lubricants, heat patches/heating pads/hot water bags, health goods, portable sanitary products, and gloves; dehumidifiers, cockroach control products; absorbent/dehydrant sheets, food wrapping films, and sheets for cooking; rubber boots, safety shoes, and marine wear; and leather shoes and sneakers. Further, the company engages in the logistics and solar power generation business. The company was incorporated in 1934 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Araya Industrial Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells steel products in Japan and internationally. The company operates through three segments: Steel Pipe-Related Business, Bicycle-Related Business, and Real Estate Leasing Business. The company offers ordinary steel pipes, stainless steel pipes, deformed steel pipes, various shaped steel pipes, and precision parts for OA machines. It also offers wheelchair suspension wheels, wing arms, wheelchair with absolex, and industrial absolex, as well as bicycle rims; and imports and sells bicycles. In addition, the company engages in real estate rental business, including leasing of lands, buildings, and warehouses. The company was founded in 1903 and is based in Osaka, Japan.

Techno Smart Corp. provides liquid crystal-related film and cast film manufacturing devices. It also offers magnetic material coating devices; battery-related manufacturing devices; ceramic sheet manufacturing devices; carbon fiber and ceramic thermal processing devices; high-speed dryers and deodorizing devices for printing; and direct fired, catalytic, and heat storage-type deodorizers. Techno Smart Corp. was formerly known as Inoue Kinzoku Kogyo Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Techno Smart Corp. in October 2012. The company was founded in 1912 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

WILLTEC Co.,Ltd. provides contracted manufacturing services in Japan and internationally. The company operates through Manufacturing Support Business; Construction Support Business; IT Support Business; EMS business; and Other segment. It provides temporary engineer staffing, contract manufacturing, and engineer education services; manufacturing equipment services; after-sales services, such as repair, maintenance, assembly, inspection, parts management, and contact center; robot related services; and human resource consulting and website services, as well as operates franchising of Japanese language schools. It also offers sales, installation, repair, and maintenance of solar power generation systems, storage batteries, EV chargers, and call center operations services. The company was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Gecoss Corporation rents and sells construction machinery and steel products in Japan. The company is involved in the rental and sale of temporary construction materials, such as H-shaped steel, steel sheet piles, iron plates, covering plates, and earth retaining materials. It also design, manufactures and sells erection and demolition work of mountain retaining and gantry, pile driving and pulling work, and obstacle removal work; rents, sells, and manufactures temporary bridges, station building platforms, stairs, shield mounts, road bridges, and bridge fall prevention hardware; rents cars; and rents construction equipment, such as aerial work platforms, backhoe, generators, light temporary construction and unmanned construction robot. In addition, the company undertakes design and construction of pile punching work, erection and demolition, soil cement column wall construction, etc. Further, it provides planning and design, and technical support services for temporary construction works. The company was incorporated in 1946 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Maruzen CHI Holdings Co.,Ltd. engages in the sale of books and magazines in Japan. The company offers academic and other information services; and manages educational facilities, such as libraries. It also engages in the design, supervision, and construction works; publishing books, magazines, etc.; museum management operations and designated manager system; import and sale of books and other publications; production and sale of academic books; buying selling of antiques; management consulting services related to school education business. In addition, the company creates bibliographic information database; and sells office supplies, clothing, and other goods, as well as provides information services using communication networks, etc.; and library management services. Maruzen CHI Holdings Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Maruzen CHI Holdings Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Dai Nippon Printing Co., Ltd.

Sanyo Engineering & Construction Inc. engages in the electric facility construction business in Japan and internationally. The company constructs drainage facilities, engages in internal wiring construction, power supply construction, and air conditioning supply construction. It also offers indoor and outdoor electrical equipment construction, internal communication equipment construction, designs and constructs electrical and instrumentation equipment construction, power transmission and distribution line construction, power generation and transformation facilities, air conditioning equipment construction, water supply and drainage equipment, high and low voltage distribution boards, various distribution boards, distribution boards, control boards, monitoring boards, operation panels, etc. Additionally, it sells and maintains electrical equipment, and generates solar power. The company was founded in 1937 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Tecmira Holdings Inc. provides solutions of hardware, software, and content in Japan. It operates through three segments: Life Design Business, AI & Cloud Business, and IoT & Device Business. The company offers connected devices and application services; customer support, repair, and inspection agency, as well as maintenance and operation support; and system integration, SaaS services that optimize business efficiency and business communication, and cloud services. It also provides services in fields, such as education, health, money, and entertainment comprising CharaTech to provide products, contents, and services that are enhanced by familiar characters; EdTech to provide digital content production and educational services compatible with Education DX; HealthTech to provide health support services; and mobile and cashless payments services. In addition, the company offers contents development, software and system development and operation, and recruitment and business process outsourcing services, as well as information and communication services and software. Further, it provides ICT and IoT product development, manufacturing contract, sales, and customer support services; planning and sales of aiwa products; and planning and production of digital contents, as well as ICT and IoT product development, manufacturing, and quality control services. The company was formerly known as JNS Holdings Inc and changed its name to Tecmira Holdings Inc. in October 2023. Tecmira Holdings Inc. was incorporated in 2004 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Loadstar Capital K.K., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the real estate investment business in Japan. The company invests in various real estate properties, including middle sized office buildings and hotels; sources, procures, invests, and manages assets; and operates OwnersBook, a real estate investment crowdfunding platform. It is also involved in asset management; money lending; real estate rental; hotel management contract; and financial products trading businesses, as well as development and provision of blockchain infrastructure and digital securities. The company was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Chuo, Japan.

E J Holdings Inc., through its subsidiaries, engages in the civil engineering consultant business in Japan and internationally. It offers environment, disaster prevention/maintenance, and government support services; research and development; and survey services. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Okayama, Japan.

Fujicco Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells traditional Japanese processed food products in Japan. It offers delicatessen, including packaged delicatessen, daily delicatessen, soup stock/broth, seasonings, and Chinese prepared foods. The company also provides kombu products, such as kombu boiled in soy sauce, salt-dusted dried kombu, thin shaved dried kombu, kombu for Japanese soup, and foods for Japanese new year's. In addition, it offers bean products comprising boiled and seasoned, water boiled, steamed beans, and bean snacks; yogurt products consisting Caspian Sea yogurt and seed culture, yogurt made from soybeans, yogurt-maker, and supplement of lactic acid bacterium; and desserts, including fruits therapy and fruit jelly with Nata de Coco. Further, the company provides health foods consisting of boiled black soybeans with vinegar and denta flora; and health food materials, including soybean isoflavones, black soybean polyphenols, and kombu minerals. The company was incorporated in 1940 and is headquartered in Kobe, Japan.

Atsugi Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells legwear and innerwear products in Japan. It offers pantyhose, stockings, and lingerie products for women. The company also provides socks for women, children, and men; and elderly care products, such as portable deodorizing toilets. Atsugi Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1947 and is headquartered in Ebina, Japan.

Bell-Park Co.,Ltd. provide services for information and communication equipment, and services in Japan. It offers corporate solutions, such as mobile phone services and various solution services to corporate customers. The company operates and franchises carrier shops, including SoftBank shops, au shops, and Y!mobile shops. Bell-Park Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Alpha Systems Inc. engages in the development of software for telecommunications systems in Japan. The company develops software for backbone communication systems, such as node systems, mobile network systems, and network management systems. It also develops open systems, including portal sites for online businesses and related work-process systems; online application systems and databases for public works projects; systems for management of production and distribution; and intranets for corporate information management. In addition, the company develops embedded systems to control electronic devices, including printer machines, car-mounted audio and navigation systems, DVD/HD recorders, and digital cameras, as well as interface technology between UPnP and ZigBee. Further, the company offers system integration, system operation and maintenance, and product sales services. Alpha Systems Inc. was incorporated in 1972 and is headquartered in Kawasaki, Japan.

Airtech Japan, Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells clean air systems in Japan. The company offers cleanrooms/BSL-3/CPF; air showers/pass boxes; clean booths/SS-MAC series/fan filter units; clean benches/biosafety cabinets/isolators; infection prevention products. It also provides air curtain/insect control/cold storage air curtains; cleanroom equipment and supplies; biohazard systems; and dust/chemical dust removal devices/deodorizing. Airtech Japan, Ltd. was incorporated in 1973 and is headquartered in Taito, Japan.

Space Co.,Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the planning, design, supervision, and construction of commercial facilities in Japan. The company's commercial facilities include shopping centers, department stores, specialty stores, and restaurants. It is also involved in the planning, design, supervision, and construction of museums and other cultural, sports, and entertainment facilities, as well as urban development, regional development, and environmental improvement projects; and planning, design, production, sale, and import and export of exhibition equipment and display fixtures, indoor and outdoor decorative items, and furniture. It also engages in the purchase and sale of secondhand goods and entrusted services; and business incidental to all preceding items. In addition, the company plans, designs, supervises, and executes construction and interior finishing works; and plans, designs, supervises, and constructs projects related to shows and exhibitions. Further, it is involved in the planning, design, and production related to public relations and advertising; research, consultation, and publishing related to various items; provision of information; and real estate dealings, leasing, and brokerage activities. Space Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

GENOVA, Inc. engages in the medical platform and smart clinic businesses in Japan. It offers Medical Doc, a platform that distributes articles for medical institutions, patient experience articles, treatment videos, and medical-related articles. It also provides Smart Clinic, an online medical treatment and consultation service, which offers medical treatment at home or work for users without going to a hospital. In addition, the company offers NOMOCa-Stand, a smart and simple automatic payment and reception machine; NOMOCa-Regi, a self-pay machine dedicated to the clinic; NOMOCaAIchat, an AI chat automatic response system; and CLINIC BOT, an AI Chatbot System. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Harima B.Stem Corporation provides building maintenance and management services in Japan. The company offers daily and regular cleaning services, as well as glass, exterior wall, and lighting fixture cleaning services; facility management services comprising electrical equipment, air conditioning equipment, and water supply and drainage sanitary equipment management; security services consisting of crime and disaster prevention, facility security operations, traffic and crowd control, and parking lot management; patrol and environmental sanitation law inspection; inspection, construction, and maintenance of water supply and drainage sanitary, air conditioning, electrical, building, and firefighting equipment; and building inspection and repair services, as well as operates a 24-hour equipment emergency center. It also provides management services for condominiums; maintenance and management of common areas; and maintenance services for investment projects. In addition, the company engages in public-private partnership and private finance initiative projects for government buildings related, cultural and educational, sports, and other facilities. Further, it provides virus and mold prevention solutions, such as high-power UV generators and germicidal lamps; and hotel room maintenance, reception and public relations, restaurant and cafeteria management, and telephone exchange services. Harima B.Stem Corporation was incorporated in 1961 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.

Okuma Corporation manufactures and sells machine tools in Japan, the United States, Europe, and Asia/Pacific. The company offers 5-axis vertical machining centers, multitasking machines, super multitasking machines, CNC lathes, machining centers, double-column machining centers, grinders, automation, and IT/CNC. It also provides solutions for automotive, semiconductor, wind power generation, aircraft, medical equipment, construction machinery, and die/mold industry industries. The company was founded in 1898 and is headquartered in Niwa, Japan.

Nireco Corporation provides process control, Web control, and inspection systems in Japan. The company offers control and measuring systems, including electro-hydraulic actuators, eddy current level meters, edge position control systems, and automatic marking systems for steel and non-ferrous metal production lines. It also provides Web control products, which include edge position control systems, tension control systems, automatic register control systems, printing quality inspection systems, and gluing control systems. In addition, the company offers inspection systems, such as defect inspection systems for plain surfaces, pouch packaging inspection systems, analyzers, and fruit and vegetable quality analysis systems, as well as fish selectors. Further, it provides laser devices and optical components. The company was formerly known as Nippon Regulator Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nireco Corporation in November 1984. Nireco Corporation was founded in 1931 and is headquartered in Hachioji, Japan.

Otani Kogyo Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of overhead wire hardware for power distribution and communication lines, and public hearing and CATV in Japan. The company offers overhead wiring hardware, telecommunication line hardware, and community and hardware. It also provides transmission angle steel towers, outdoor steel structures for substations, equipment stands, communication radio towers, and solar panel mounting frames; headed and irregular shape studs; and lower and upper isolation base plates, as well as scribing displacement meters. The company was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Shinagawa, Japan.

Rix Corporation manufactures and sells machinery and equipment, measuring instruments, and consumables for steel, automobiles, electronics, semiconductors, rubber and tires, machine tools, environment, pulp and paper, ship building, medicine, high-function materials, and food industries in Japan. The company provides rotary; rocky insulator; Nitte lights; lubricants under FRICTTLE name; hardlock nuts, bearing nuts, and set screw; and oil seals, O-rings, iron rubbers, mechanical seals, welded bellows, flexible circuits, etc. It also offers Auto Flush, a system that reduces leakage; oil skimmers; and vivid screen. In addition, the company engages in the construction, manufacturing, and sale of pipes and steel structures, as well as bearing regeneration, new bearing and part manufacturing, precision grinding, polishing, universal joint repair, and related equipment sales; manufacture, sale, and maintenance of automobile parts cleaning equipment and other industrial machinery; import and sale of anti-rust agents, moisture inhibitors, and adhesives; and coolant automatic dilution device manufacturing, electrical and control software design, control panel manufacturing and wiring work, and robot control. Further, it provides phenolic resin molded products; FRP corrosion-resistant pumps, fans, dampers, strainers, and scrubbers; washing machines for automobile parts and semiconductor; and jigs and tools, FPD manufacturing equipment, electronic and optical component manufacturing equipment, consumable parts, dry vacuum pumps, air compressors, valves for tire curing presses, tire manufacturing equipment, and hydraulic equipment. Additionally, the company is involved in the sale and repair of vacuum equipment; maintenance and management services for semiconductor manufacturing equipment; and design, manufacture, assembly, and maintenance of processed products and overhaul of machine tools. Rix Corporation was founded in 1907 and is headquartered in Fukuoka City, Japan.

POVAL KOGYO Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells general bonding and resin processed items in Japan, rest of Asia, and internationally. It operates through General Adhesive and Resin Processing Business; and Special Design Machinery Business segments. The company offers belt-related products, including special conveyor, functional, drive, transmission, and urethane timing belts; polishing-related products, such as polishing pads; mounts and cushioning components that are used in polishing glass; and other products comprising nonwoven fabrics and urethane foam products. It also provides machinery for the food industry. POVAL KOGYO Co., Ltd. was founded in 1957 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

Seiko Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacture and sale of industrial machinery in Japan. It operates through five segments: Industrial Machinery Business, Cold Forging Business, Electrical Equipment Business, Vehicle-Related Business, and Real Estate Leasing Business. The company manufactures and sells packaging machinery products, sterilization equipment, food processing machinery, industrial machinery, and factory automation production systems, as well as cold forged products. It is also involved in the sale of electrical equipment, such as factory automation equipment, air conditioning equipment, refrigeration equipment, and solar power generation equipment; installation of air conditioning equipment; sale of vehicles and related products; and real estate rental, parking lot management, and car rental. Seiko Corporation was incorporated in 1939 and is headquartered in Shizuoka, Japan.

Aoyama Trading Co., Ltd. engages in the business wear, credit card, printing and media, sundry sales, repair service, franchisee, real estate and other businesses in Japan. It offers suits, shoes, and casual clothing and other men's items; and ladies suits for job hunting, formal wear, and others. The company also issues and manages credit cards, as well as manages finance; provides sales promotion services, such as distributing flyers and direct mails. In addition, it offers repair services for shoes and key duplication under the Mister Minit brand; sells general merchandise; and operates stores, restaurants and fitness gyms. Further, it operates in the web media business. Aoyama Trading Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1964 and is headquartered in Fukuyama, Japan.

Takamatsu Construction Group Co., Ltd. engages in the construction business in Japan. The company operates in Architecture, Civil Engineering, and Real Estate Segments. It is involved in construction for-lease apartments, condominium, public facilities, educational and cultural facilities, commercial facilities, accommodation and leisure facilities, logistics facilities, warehouses, factories, medical and welfare facilities, waste disposal plants, and skyscrapers, etc. The company also develops infrastructure, including rivers, roads, railways, ports, airports, dams, tunnels, bridges, residential land development, water supply and sewerage systems, soil and water conservation, ocean civil engineering, underwater civil engineering, and renewable energy works. In addition, it engages in the purchase, brokerage, and sales of other real estate services; and operation of serviced nursing-care facilities for the elderly. Further, the company provides maintenance and preservation of fishing ports, and slope protection works. The company was founded in 1917 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

p-ban.com Corp. designs, manufactures, and sells printed circuit boards in Japan. It operates p-ban.com, an e-commerce site for printed circuit boards. The company also offers PCB design, manufacturing, and mounting services; parts procurement services; and circuit design, development and mass production support, and technical consulting services. In addition, it provides other services comprising harness processing, metal mask manufacturing, gene, board design, circuit board calendar, and circuit board collection and recycling support services. p-ban.com Corp. was incorporated in 2002 and is headquartered in Chiyoda, Japan.

Kuriyama Holdings Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells of various hoses, rubber, and plastics products in Japan, the United States, Canada, Europe, and internationally. The company operates through North American Business, Industrial Materials Business, Sports and Construction Materials Business, Europe/South America Business, and Other Business segments. It offers molded hoses and module; rubber and thermoplastic; coupling components, hose clamps, plastic connectors, and metal fittings products; and deck materials, rubber linings, and expansion joints for power production, plants, and shipbuilding. The company provides commercial facility tiles, train station platforms and concourse tiles, and outdoor tiles and blocks under the Kuriyama brand; and sports flooring materials, including all-weather rubber track, elastic sports flooring sheets, and long-pile artificial turf. In addition, it offers ocean and antibacterial mats; and oil-free antibacterial and reactive dye mops; hygiene-related products and water purifiers; and aromatics and sponges products, as well as engages in real estate management business. It sells its hoses products under the Kuri Tec, tigerflex, Accuflex, PIRANHA, HOSE TEC, and ALFAGOMMA brands for use in beverage, agriculture, mining, and infrastructure industries; and its rubber and TPU hose products under the OROFLEX, ARMTEX, ARMTEX BLINDEX, and Blue Devil brand names. The company was formerly known as Kuriyama Corporation and changed its name to Kuriyama Holdings Corporation in 2012. Kuriyama Holdings Corporation was founded in 1938 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

BeeX Inc. develops, maintains, and operates cloud applications in Japan. The company offers SAP system-related services, which include SAP system cloud migration/environment construction, SAP S/4HANA conversion, SAP basis operation and maintenance, analytics solution, SAP solution manager cloud, and AWS environment construction. It provides cloud construction services, such as migration/environment construction and consulting services for multi-cloud, windows server, and AWS cloud; Pitatto consulting; digital transformation ready services, such as system of engagement (SoE), a system that serves as a point of contact for Web services and mobile customers; system of record (SoR), a system for recording purposes, such as an accounting system or a personnel system; and system of insight for analyzing businesses and customers based on the data existing in SoE and SoR. In addition, the company offers managed services, such as multi-cloud operation and maintenance; security services; and SAP basis operation and maintenance services. Further, it provides BeeX service console products; AWS operation and maintenance services; and BeeXPlus, a cloud service that could centrally manage various external collaborations, including invoicing operation support and security, as well as resale, account management, and technical support for AWS, Azure, and Google cloud platform. The company was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Tokyo, Japan. BeeX Inc. is a subsidiary of TerraSky Co.,Ltd.

Tomita Electric Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells ferrite cores and electronic components in Japan, Asia, and internationally. The company offers soft ferrite cores; and coils and transformers. Its products are used in switching power supply transformers, high frequency transformers, transformers for telecommunications, high frequency EMI filters, and low frequency noise filters, as well as in televisions, videos, computers, inverter lighting equipment, gas kerosene ignition equipment, and industrial control equipment applications. Tomita Electric Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1952 and is headquartered in Tottori, Japan.

MRSO Inc. engages in the healthcare platform management and vertical SaaS provision to medicals, governments, and corporations in Japan. The company's web reservation system is used to manage reservations for various health checkups and vaccinations conducted by government agencies. It also provides website design services for medical facilities; healthcare BPO services; medical system development services based on MRSO operation; management system for medical facilities; Health Plus medical business support system; and medical tourism services, as well as operates a web media that offers articles on the theme of body and health. MRSO Inc. was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Sanei Ltd. manufactures and sells plumbing fixtures in Japan. The company provides mixer taps, sensor touch faucets, wash basins, single faucets, showers, branch valves, faucet parts, valves, piping systems and materials, bus and air conditioning peripherals, and tools; and interior, kitchen, washroom, washing machine accessories, toilet, and gardening accessories. Its faucets are used in hotels, hospitals, and long-term care health facilities. The company was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Mirai Industry Co.,Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacture and sale of electrical equipment materials, water supply and drainage equipment materials, and gas equipment materials in Japan. The company offers flexible synthetic resin conduit, rigid polyvinyl chloride conduit, cable wiring switch boxes, and underground pipes. It also manufactures and sells wiring equipment, including switches and outlets; manufactures and sells labor-saving machines, resin molding molds, and vending machines; and manufactures and sells synthetic resin materials. In addition, the company involved in the general construction; building management and maintenance; construction consulting businesses; agricultural materials that reduce agricultural work; sapling guard to protect seedlings from damage; angle-adjustable shelf bracket; and support material for arranging bricks neatly. Further, the company engages in the road freight transportation, data center, and cable television activities, as well as provision of fire protection materials and plumbing equipment. Mirai Industry Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1965 and is based in Wanouchi, Japan.

Remixpoint, Inc. engages in the development and sale of energy management systems and energy-saving support consulting services in Japan. The company operates through four segments: Energy Business, Resilience Business, Financial Investment Business, and Others. It also provides electric power retail services, energy saving and subsidy support and consulting, energy management, and zero energy building services; and sells storage batteries for home use and infectious disease prevention products. Further, it provides antibacterial/antiviral coating, lighting strike suppression lighting, MA-T visualization of closed/dense, water dispenser, spatial environment improvement, AI face recognition and body temperature detection, and power supply. Additionally, the company offers services related to cryptocurrency investment, stock investment, and loans, as well as marketing consulting services. Remixpoint, Inc. was incorporated in 2004 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Enigmo Inc. plans, develops, and operates internet business in Japan. It operates BUYMA, a marketplace for buying fashion items from personal shoppers; BUYMA TRAVEL, a website that provides private local tours to Japanese travelers living abroad; and STYLE HAUS, a platform that offers fashion, lifestyle, and cosmetics recommendations. The company was incorporated in 2004 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

PostPrime Inc. operates a platform that features content related to economics, finance, and investment. It provides content through live streams, videos, and audios. The company also operates PostPrime, a financial and economic information platform that allow users to register as members and post information. PostPrime Inc. was founded in 2020 and is based in Minato, Japan.

Just Planning Inc. provides solutions for the food and beverage industry in Japan. The company develops and sells ASP store management and POS order entry systems for restaurants. It offers sales management, attendance management, purchase management, ordering system, etc. The company also provides introduction and operation support services of consulting for store and headquarters systems; and sells various consumables. Just Planning Inc. was founded in 1994 and is based in Ota, Japan.

Maruzen Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of commercial kitchen equipment for the domestic market. It offers fryers, steam convection ovens, dishwashers, gas ranges, noodle cookers, small bakery equipment, Gyoza grills, gas burner, and other products. The company also engages in manufacturing, purchasing, and sales of large bread making machinery. The company is also involved in the leasing of building. Maruzen Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1961 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Shimojima Co., Ltd. engages in the wholesale and retail of paper products, plastic products and packaging materials, and in-store materials primarily in Japan. The company operates through three reporting segments: Paper Products, Chemicals & Packaging Materials, and Retail Supplies. It offers paper bags, wrapping paper, and paper containers; plastic bags, adhesive tapes, food packaging materials, strings and ribbons, and other packaging materials; and in-store display materials, stationery and office supplies, goods for in-store use, apparel-related materials, and horticulture-related materials. It also provides OPP bags, boxes, kitchen goods, tableware, hygiene and cleaning supplies, event supplies, and ceremonial goods. The company was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Nippon Tungsten Co., Ltd. provides metal material products, primarily tungsten, and fine ceramic products based on powder metallurgy technology. Its products include tungsten wire and rod, tungsten ribbon, and tungsten wire for discharge; TD/TCP/contact point for starters, electrical contact point parts, electric discharge machining electrode, C-EDM electrodes for electric discharge machining, and tungsten and molybdenum resistance welding electrodes. The company also offers NT die cutter, mechanical seal ring, cemented carbides, and MAZELLOYs; conductive ceramic for press die, ceramic materials, and porous ceramics; and HEAVY ALLOY and Fine bubbles generators. In addition, it engages in the renewable energy power generation business and sale of electricity. Nippon Tungsten Co., Ltd. was founded in 1931 and is headquartered in Fukuoka City, Japan.

Kaga Electronics Co.,Ltd. sells electronics parts, semiconductors, PCs, and peripherals in Japan, North America, Europe, and Asia. It operates through the Electronic Components Business, Software Business, Information Equipment Business, and Other Businesses segments. The Electronic Components Business segment offers, manufactures, and sells semiconductors, general electronic components, EMS, etc. The Information Equipment Business segment sells personal computers, PC peripherals, various home appliances, photo and video related products, and original branded products; builds LAN systems; offers printers and digital cameras; scanners, HDDs, DVDs, network construction and provides installation services. The Software Business segment engages in the production of CG images and the planning and development of amusement-related products. The Other Businesses segment is engaged in the repair and support of electronics devices; the manufacture and sale of amusement machines; and the sale of sporting goods. It also provides PC recycling services; and installation services. The company was incorporated in 1968 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Totetsu Kogyo Co., Ltd. engages in the railway track maintenance, civil engineering, architectural, and environmental businesses in Japan. The company is involved in the repair and reconstruction of railway tracks, as well as building new railway tracks for the Tohoku Shinkansen, and other public and private sectors. It also engages in the construction, renovation, and reinforcement of elevated and standard bridges, tunnels, motorways, and multilevel crossings; and setting up railway platform edge doors for passenger protection. In addition, the company is involved in the construction and maintenance of station buildings for railway lines, apartment houses, office buildings, hotels, shops, schools, etc. Further, it offers environmental technology and services, such as constructing solar power generation systems, greening of buildings, draining disposal systems, removing asbestos, implementing energy conservation systems for air conditioning, etc. Totetsu Kogyo Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1943 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Yorozu Corporation designs, develops, manufactures, and sells auto parts, agricultural machinery parts, and manufacturing equipment in Japan, the United States, Mexico, China, and internationally. The company offers front and rear suspension members, rear beams, links, brake pedals, and oil pans, as well as other parts, such as suspension modules, engine mounts, splash guards, and body parts for cars, trucks, and tractors. It also provides dies and production equipment. The company was formerly known as Yorozu Automotive Works and changed its name to Yorozu Corporation in June 1990. Yorozu Corporation was incorporated in 1948 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.

Tanabe Engineering Corporation engages in plant construction and machinery production activities in Japan. The company offers plant engineering services, including planning, design, purchasing, construction, trial operation, and maintenance. It also engages in the design and construction of electric instrumentation and control systems fitting, as well as the integrated construction of machinery and electricity; and provision of automated/work-saving equipment for industrial fields, such as automobile, liquid crystal, pharmaceutical, etc. Further, the company designs and produces thermal machinery/industrial furnaces. The company was incorporated in 1969 and is headquartered in Joetsu, Japan.

Sankyo Seiko Co., Ltd. engages in the fashion, textile, and real estate businesses in Japan and internationally. The company provides various women's and men's wear, loungewear, sports, and outdoor products. It is also involved in the leasing business, building maintenance, and interior decoration work business, including rental of offices, halls, and buildings. In addition, the company engages in the brand licensing business. It offers its products under the DAKS and LEONARD brands. It also imports/exports its branded products. Sankyo Seiko Co., Ltd. was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Airman Corporation engages in the manufacture and sale of construction machinery, including construction equipment for heavy machinery and industrial machinery in Japan and internationally. The company also engages in the manufacture and sale of air compressors under the AIRMAN brand. In addition, the company offers engine compressors, engine generators, aerial work platforms, motor compressors, emergency generators, scissors lifters, and mini excavators. The company was formerly known as Hokuetsu Industries Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Airman Corporation in April 2025. The company was incorporated in 1938 and is headquartered in Tsubame, Japan.

Institution for a Global Society Corporation engages in the provision of assessment and education solutions worldwide. The company offers GROW360, an artificial intelligence (AI) enabled assessment solution that scientifically measures the competency and traits of the official/prospective organization's employees, as well as optimal organization development and predictive recruitment solutions for large corporations, public institutions, and international organizations. It also provides Ai GROW, an assessment tool for educational institutions to quantify the ability, qualities of the students, and the effect of education, as well as used to design a curriculum. In addition, it offers DxGROW, which induces biased decision-making related to digital transformation projects; GROW Academy, a video content platform that provides the framework to improve the presentations of the students; and ONGAESHI, a service that combines free reskilling and recruitment. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Chuokeizai-Sha Holdings, Inc. engages in publishing business in Japan. The company publishes books and magazines related to law, economics, management, accounting, taxation and information, certifications and qualifications, and other social sciences.
