It is involved in development and sale of condominiums; real estate brokerage activities; sale of real estate properties; general and detached house contracting activities; operation of a variety of facilities, including hotels, golf courses, fitness gyms, and service areas; operation of supermarket; and provision of electricity. The company also offers human resource services, including temporary staffing, recruitment, and outsourcing, as well as logistics services; nursing care and medical management support services; and travel planning and advisory services. The company was incorporated in 1964 and is based in Takamatsu, Japan.

MEDIA DO Co., Ltd. engages in the eBook distribution business in Japan. The company operates through two segments: eBook Distribution and Strategic Investment. It plans, edits, publishes, and sells of book and magazines; distributes books; conducts of publishing workflow management and bibliographic information management services; and provides e-commerce solutions. The company operates text summary site; outsourcer; eBook agency; anime/manga community site; basketball team; and the NetGalley website, as well as novel posting website, and other pulishing-related businesses through EVERYSTAR posting website. It also involved in the coloring, eComics, and software development, and print on demand publishing services. It sells its eBook content to eBook retailers. The company was formerly known as Media Do Holdings Co., Ltd. and changed its name to MEDIA DO Co., Ltd. MEDIA DO Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

PCA Corporation develops and sells computer software in Japan. The company offers accounting solutions for bill management option, consolidated settlement option, data linkage option, workflow, payment management, cost management, cost management for construction industry, international trading, and consolidated accounting. It also provides HR management solutions used for time clock, shift management, attendance management workflow, payment statement electronic distribution, social insurance and labor insurance management, payment record, daily payroll, and business form design. In addition, the company offers sales/purchasing software solutions for order entry simultaneous entry option, sales/purchase simultaneous entry option, convenience store receiving agent option, data linkage option, specified slip issuance, POS cash register, sales force automation, customer management, handy terminal, EDI, and business form design. The company was incorporated in 1980 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Kobelco Wire Company, Ltd. engages in the provision of wire rod products in Japan. The company offers PC steel products for used in bridges, buildings, and other constructions; wire products for automotive products and office automation equipment; and stainless-steel wire, titanium wire, titanium alloy wire, and special alloy steel wire for industries, including housing, automotive, machine tools, telecommunications, medical, and household products. It also provides wire ropes for cranes, national land development projects, construction, fishery, and forestry industries. The company was formerly known as Shinko Wire Company, Ltd. Kobelco Wire Company, Ltd. was incorporated in 1954 and is headquartered in Amagasaki, Japan.

Youji Corporation engages in the provision of physical education services for children in Japan. It operates in early childhood physical education instruction related business and consulting related segment. The company offers physical education guidance for kindergarten and elementary school students; travel planning and arrangement services; kindergarten and nursery school management consulting services; public instructions; and kindergarten staff recruitment and labor management support services. It also operates daycare centers and cram schools. Youji Corporation was incorporated in 1972 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Komatsu Wall Industry Co., Ltd. engages in the design, manufacture, construction, sale, and service of movable and fixed partitions, toilet booths, and low partitions in Japan. It offers school partitions, lightweight steel doors, interior metal works, and other products. Komatsu Wall Industry Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1968 and is based in Komatsu, Japan.

Daiko Tsusan Co.,Ltd. operates as a trading company in the fields of CATV and information and telecommunications in Japan and internationally. The company is involved in manufacturing, selling, leasing, and rental of information communication cables, materials, equipment and accessories, tools and measuring equipment; and office automation equipment and software. It also offers Cable television, information and communications consulting, as well as undertakes design and construction, and maintenance works. Daiko Tsusan Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1975 and is headquartered in Matsuyama, Japan.

Bushiroad Inc engages in the entertainment and sports businesses in Japan, the United States, rest of Asia, and internationally. It is also involved in the planning, development, production, and sale of trading card and digital games; planning, creation, and production of comics and anime programs; the planning and production of music content and pro-wrestling events; and the operation of a voice actor office, as well as merchandising and advertising agency businesses. In addition, the company provides Bushiroad Main IP and TCG products, including CardFight!! Vanguard, Weiß Schwarz, BanG Dream!, Revue Starlight, NEW JAPAN PRO-WRESTLING, and STARDOM; organizes trading card game tournaments and events; and develops and releases trading card game supplies, such as card sleeves and rubber playmats. Further, it plans, manages, and distributes mobile, online, and console games under the BUSHIROAD GAMES brand name; offers music software, such as music CDs, live and stage videos, and Blu-ray theatrical versions; and manages live music and music-related events, live viewing, and online streaming, as well as stage production. Additionally, the company creates and distributes character goods to toy stores, general retailers, and hobby shops; provides capsule toys, prizes, and promotional events; and offers concert merchandise, which includes light sticks, t-shirts, and towels, as well as voice actor goods and arcade prizes. Bushiroad Inc. was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Nakano, Japan.

Tea Life Co., Ltd. provides health, beauty, and lifestyle-related products in Japan. It also provides Metabo, Pu-erh, and Rooibos tea, as well as health supplements, cosmetics, and wigs through mail-order catalogs and website. The company also sells its products through through online retail and wholesale channels. Tea Life Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1983 and is headquartered in Shimada, Japan.

Teikoku Corporation engages in the manufacture and sale of electrical and general machinery and equipment. It offers canned motor pumps; metering pumps; canned motor agitators; electric oil pumps; protection devices for canned motor pumps; high temperature molten salt circulation pumps; sealless gas blower for SF6 gas; rotating direction indicator for motors; and roll stabilizer motors, as well as spare parts. The company also provides inspection, on-site and in-house repair, and maintenance services, as well as after-sales services. Its products are used in various fields, such as fine chemical, pharmaceutical, food industries, petrochemical plants, nuclear power plants, and electrical substations. The company operates in Japan, the United States, China, Taiwan, Singapore, Germany, India, and South Korea. The company was formerly known as Teikoku Electric Mfg.Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Teikoku Corporation in April 2026. Teikoku Corporation was incorporated in 1939 and is headquartered in Tatsuno, Japan.

Synchro Food Co., Ltd. operates various platforms for the food and beverage industry. The company's platforms include Restaurant.com, a Website that supports restaurant opening and operation; Recruit Restaurant.com, a restaurant job information site; Store Design.com, a matching site for finding store design companies; Job @ Interior Design, a job search site for the interior industry; Mobimaru, a kitchen car share matching site; and Gourmet Baito-chan, a part-time job recruitment service for short SNS videos; and Nougyou Job, a job information site for the agriculture, forestry, and fishery industries. Synchro Food Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

HOUSEI Inc. engages in the information systems business in Japan and internationally. The company offers page production, advertising management, page management, and sales management for newspaper companies; production and editing software, layout management, and content management, and systems related to print publication for publishers; apps and cloud services; contract system development; IT engineer dispatch services for manufacturing, finance, and service industries; school report systems and automated grading software; product solution development and logistics; and IT services. It also provides software platforms, such as imprai ezBI, imprai, imprai ezCheck, Pixtock, British Spirit, eRESERvest, NOVO, WelcomID, Square Box, ezRepo, Customer IQ, Megalith, Dandelion, ezOrder Solution, Mobius, Bottle Keep Benrikun, ElecRoc6090 SP, SkyEdit IBIS automatic typesetting, FORE C, Founder Pack, EagleRIP Flexo 5.1, Advertising System, Bargain Manager Ver4.1, Fangzheng Chine outline font, Hoseiji Library, Halftone dots, DocuDefend, SuperLine, ElecRoc 5, FNP-X, Electronic Publishing, News Media Stand, and EagleDot. The company was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Tamai Steamship Co., Ltd. operates as a logistics company in Japan. The company engages in the owner-operator business; transporting bulk cargoes, such as grain, cement clinker, blast furnace slag, gypsum, and steel products, as well as aluminum hydroxide; transporting marine cargoes; and coastal and deep-sea operations. It also owns and operates real estate. The company was founded in 1929 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

Kaji Technology Corporation manufactures and sells high-pressure air and gas piston compressors for various applications worldwide. It offers gas, trunk-piston, hydrogen, CNG, and PET compressors; water-cooled/air-cooled type, lubrication/oil-free/oil-less, petrochemical and industrial gas, and PET bottle molding compressors; and SF6 recovery systems, as well as compressors for electric power/test/general industries. The company also provides natural gas vehicle compressors for fuel filling; compressors for fuel cell vehicle filling; and various gas collection and refining equipment. The company was formerly known as Kaji Iron Works Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kaji Technology Corporation in 1991. Kaji Technology Corporation was founded in 1905 and is headquartered in Sakai, Japan.

Green Earth Institute Co., Ltd. engages in the production and sale of carbon neutral biofuels and green chemicals in Japan and internationally. The company offers jet fuels; bioplastics used for food, feed, and cosmetic additives; and ethanol for cosmetics. Green Earth Institute Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

KENKO Mayonnaise Co.,Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells salads and delicatessen, mayonnaise, dressings, sauces, and egg products in Japan and internationally. It operates through Seasonings and Processed Foods Business, Deli-related Business, and Other segments. The company offers salads under the Fashion Delica Foods brand to restaurants, bakeries, and convenience stores. It also provides various processed egg products, including egg salad for sandwiches and snack breads, Japanese style rolled omelet for lunch boxes, narrowly stripped cooked eggs for cold Chinese noodles, and boiled eggs for oden soup; and recipes. In addition, the company operates Salad Cafe, a retail and website salad shop; and offers halal-certified products. It exports its products to approximately 50 countries. KENKO Mayonnaise Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1958 and is headquartered in Suginami, Japan.

Topy Industries, Limited engages in the steel, automotive, industrial machinery components, and other businesses in Japan. It provides section steel, such as H-section steel, channel steel, equal and unequal angle steel, unequal non-isopachous steel, flat steel, R-flat steel, bulb plate, ultra-thick wide flat, and deformed section steel products, including rims, super giant off-the-road rim wheels, track shoes, forklift mast materials, segment components, HSST rails, and Z-steel products, as well as deformed bar steel products and compact coil TACoil. The company also offers steel wheels, aluminum wheels, and construction machinery wheels for passenger cars, trucks, buses, and construction machinery; and undercarriage components, such as tracks, rollers, cutting edges for motor graders, and city pads, as well as shoes, links, pins, and bushes parts. In addition, it provides crawler robots and synthetic mica products. The company was founded in 1921 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Kyodo Paper Holdings, together with its subsidiaries, sells paper and paper products in Japan. It operates through Western Paper Wholesale Business, Real Estate Rental Business, and Logistics Business segments. The company distributes commercial printing, communication, specialty, functional, and household paper, as well as paperboards under the Papyru Plus and other private brands. It also engages in paper consulting; paper processing; warehousing; automobile transportation; real estate leasing and management; and insurance agency businesses, as well as the sale of chemical products, office equipment, and industrial equipment. The company was formerly known as Kawachiya Paper Co., Ltd. Kyodo Paper Holdings was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Taito, Japan.

Aisan Technology Co.,Ltd. designs, develops, distributes, and maintains CAD systems for the public survey, registration surveying, civil engineering, and construction industries in Japan. The company offers surveying system solutions comprising WingNeoINFINITY; ATM'S Home; e-collector; and LASPORT, a land system port; and AreaScan. It also provides MMS/point cloud services, which includes WingEarth, a point cloud processing tool, mobile mapping system, MMS post-processing solution, and point cloud encyclopedia. In addition, the company offers mobility solutions including high precision 3D map data and position solutions, 3D data processing software, autonomous driving system development and smart city solution, and other solutions, such as drone surveying solution, and HandzReco, a character recognition engine. Aisan Technology Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1970 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

Careerlink Co., Ltd. provides human resource services in Japan. It offers personnel services for BPO-related businesses, including dispatching of personnel to BPO businesses that are suffering from labor shortages; CRM-related services; general office work services, such as dispatching of human resources for various general administrative work and office work. Careerlink Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

ENDO Lighting Corporation plans, designs, manufactures, and sells light fixtures in Japan and internationally. The company offers downlights, spotlights, linear, and indirect lights. It also sells interior furnishings and supplies. It delivers its lighting products to department stores, offices, factories, public facilities, and other properties, as well as various specialty stores. ENDO Lighting Corporation was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Yamazen Corporation provides production equipment and consumer goods. The company FMS and FMC, industrial robots, machining centers, CNC lathes, CNC grinding, CNC milling, electrical discharge, CAD/CAM, lamination devices, measuring and automation peripheral equipment, accessories, conventional machine tools, injection molding and laser processing, other metal sheet forming and processing machines, etc.; industrial solutions/tool and engineering; metal forming/plate machines, die-cast molding machines, and machine tools accessories; and home appliances, interiors, exteriors, gardening and outdoor products, daily goods, healthcare and sanitary goods, industrial tools, car parts, etc. The company also provides kitchen, cooking, bathroom, washbasin, and sanitary appliances; water boiling, air conditioning and ventilation, solar power generation, storage batteries, floor heating, solar thermal water heating, stored-heat heating systems, office, home, nursing care, IoT, BCP-related, and construction equipment; interior and exterior architectural, electrical equipment, and construction materials; window and structural building frames; foundations; and plumbing equipment and materials. In addition, it offers sales promotion, event, PR, media advertising, marketing, housing magazine publication, and consulting services; accident/life insurance agency services; industrial machinery, FA systems, and logistics services. Further, the company engages in editing, producing, and printing various publications; design and manufacture of industrial equipment for automation and energy saving; marketing and research works; and planning and supporting seminars and exhibitions. It is also involved in planning, engineering, and consulting of FA systems; and provision of automated plants, production lines, automated and labor-saving, industrial robot systems, measuring, cleaning, and others equipment. The company was incorporated in 1947 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Maruichi Steel Tube Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells steel tubes, surface treated steel sheets, and poles in Japan, North America, and Asia. The company offers steel tubes for various applications, such as scaffolding, structural columns, automotive parts, greenhouse flaming, gas/water pipes, electrical conduits, tapered poles and other fabricated products, and surface treatment; and corrosion resistant steel sheets. It also provides steel structures comprising lighting poles, traffic light poles, lighting towers, traffic sign poles, and ETC gantries under the Maruichi Pole brand name. The company was incorporated in 1947 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Nippon Denko Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the ferroalloys, functional materials, incineration ash resource recovery, aqua solutions, and electric power businesses in Japan. The company offers ferroalloys products, including high and low carbon ferromanganese, silomanganese, and ferrosilicon; warehousing, port cargo handling, and functional materials, such as zirconium and boron oxide, metal hydride and boron alloys, storage alloys, manganese inorganic chemical products, and cathode materials for lithium-ion batteries. It also provides eco-melt systems and the utilization of ECOLAROCK, as well as melting and solidification, detoxification treatment/recycling; and aqua solutions comprising wastewater treatment equipment and pure water production systems. In addition, the company is involved in the electric power business and operates dams and power plants. Nippon Denko Co., Ltd. was founded in 1925 and is based in Chuo, Japan.

Fuji Die Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of wear-resistant tools in Japan and internationally. It offers Tools for drawing, extruding, and rolling processes, which are used in transportation machinery, construction materials, and infrastructure-related facilities; tools and dies for manufacturing beverage and food cans; molds for manufacturing optical elements; forging molds and tools; and high-pressure tools, as well as cemented carbide for motor lamination stamping and nano grade cemented carbide. The company was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Rinnai Corporation manufactures and sells thermal equipment in Japan, the United States, Australia, China, South Korea, and Indonesia. The company offers water heaters, including hot-water units, bath hot-water units, hot-water and heating units, and gas/solar hybrid hot-water and heating systems; kitchen appliances, such as tabletop stoves, built-in-stoves, ovens, range food, dishwashers, and rice cookers; and air conditioning appliances comprising fan heaters, fan-forced heaters, and infrared heaters. It also provides commercial-use ceramics grills, gas stoves, and rice cookers; and clothes dryers, and infrared burners and parts. The company sells its products under the Rinnai brand. The company was formerly known as Rinnai & Co. and changed its name to Rinnai Corporation in 1971. Rinnai Corporation was incorporated in 1920 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

Riken Vitamin Co., Ltd. engages in the food ingredient, food and chemical improving agents, health care, consumer and commercial products, and vitamins businesses in Japan. It offers dressing, such as non-oil dressings; seaweed; and extract / seasoning, soup, soup stock, retort-packed food, salad-related products, seafood / meat extracts, and cut wakame. The company also provides food improving agents, including food emulsifiers, processed oils, natural colorants, and vitamin E, emulsification, anti-staling, foaming, coagulation, anti-sticking, texture improvement, coloring, nutritional enhancement, and antioxidant to food manufacturers; and chemical improving agents for anti-fogging, plasticization, lubrication, anti-static, thickening, cleaning, mold release, dispersion, and antioxidant. In addition, it offers health care products comprising crocetin, a natural yellow colorant; mekabu fucoidan, a viscous ingredient; carotenoids; vitamin; and improving agents, such as pork extract. The company was formerly known as Riken Vitamin Oil Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Riken Vitamin Co., Ltd. in 1980. Riken Vitamin Co., Ltd. was founded in 1917 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Bridge Consulting Group Inc. provides business management consulting services focused on initial public offering (IPO) support in Japan. The company's consulting services comprise IPO support services, such as IPO comprehensive support, preparation of financial statement disclosure material, creation of various explanatory materials, financing, and review; risk management services, including internal control and audit support, overseas subsidiary management, IT audit, and other risk management services; and financial advisory services comprising merger and acquisition advisory, due diligence, corporate valuation, post merger integration, and others, as well as accounting and financial reporting services. It also provides human resources services, including temporary staffing; and operates Accountant.job, a working platform that provides various work styles and career support for certified accountants, as well as offers business management services to companies. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

Nakanishi Mfg. Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells commercial kitchen equipment primarily in Japan. The company also operates in real estate rental business. It offers cooking, heating, cooling, rice cooking cleaning, disinfection and storage, hospital, and welfare equipment. The company offers its products for schools, hospitals, business establishments, fast food shops, restaurants, bakeries, etc. The company was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Rococo Co. Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides various information technology solutions in Japan and internationally. It operates in two segments, ITO & BPO Business and Cloud Solution Business. The company offers ServiceNow, a business application that integrates internal process; IT outsourcing services, including operation/maintenance support, PC-LCM, device set-up services, building IT infrastructure, and cloud IT asset management; and business process outsourcing services, such as help desk and customer center. It also provides facial recognition systems comprising AUTH thru, a facial recognition access control system; AUTH thru KEY, a facial recognition access control system and electric lock; AUTH BrAC, a facial recognition alcohol check; and Work-Reco, a facial recognition worker record. In addition, the company offers ticketing and management support services, which includes tike-uke, a ticketing system; tike-loto, a ticket lottery/seating system; ticket data management; Re-tass LIVE for one-to-one streaming services; and METAWORKS, an automatic typesetting software. Further, it provides Microsoft power platform and system/application development services; and employee attendance mamagement services, such as RocoTime, an employee attendance management system and RocoTimexAUTH, a facial recognition system for clocking in and out. The company was incorporated in 1994 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

IDEA Consultants,Inc. provides integrated consultancy services on social infrastructure development and environmental conservation projects in Japan and internationally. The company offers research, planning, designing, managing, evaluating, and consulting services related to construction and environmental conservation and improvement; environment work related services, such as surveys, forecasts, analysis, impact assessments, and environmental conservation measures; and physical and chemical analysis, and testing of water quality, air quality, soil, waste, tap water, food, etc. It also manufactures, sells, and leases environmental research and analysis equipment; provides industrial and domestic waste recycling, building and structure design and management, and civil engineering and construction work services; and engages in surveying and geological surveys, as well as real estate acquisition, sales, leasing, brokerage, maintenance, and management services. In addition, the company purchases and sales machinery, equipment, parts, and tools; provides staffing services; and produces and sells honey, royal jelly, pollen, etc. Further, the company offers environmental consulting services, including environmental assessment/environmental planning, conservation, restoration, and creation of the natural environment, environmental survey, chemical analysis and risk assessment, life science, and sustainability management support; construction consulting services comprising land conservation, transportation/logistics infrastructure, urban and regional development, and disaster response and recovery/reconstruction; and information system, such as disaster prevention/environment/construction system development, system operation support, meteorology, disaster prevention, and life information service, as well as infrastructure management services. The company was founded in 1953 and is headquartered in Setagaya, Japan.

Nippon Rietec Co.,Ltd. engages in the railway electrical equipment construction business in Japan. The company's offers signal equipment, train track equipment, power generation and transformation equipment, electric light and power equipment, and information and communication system constructions, as well as transmission line equipment. It also constructs signage and landscape sign, traffic signals, and road information control systems. In addition, the company provides indoor/outdoor electric installation work, and solar power generation systems; and overhead power line and information and communication facilities, as well as leases land and buildings. Nippon Rietec Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1945 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Kitazawa Sangyo Co., Ltd. sells food processing machinery and cooking equipment in Japan. It operates through Commercial kitchen related business and Real estate leasing business segments. The company is also involved in the sale of confectionery and bakery equipment; design, manufacture, and sale of kitchen equipment, freezing/refrigeration equipment, and food processing equipment; cleaning and storage equipment; mass cooking equipment; and inspection, maintenance, and repair of kitchen equipment. In addition, it engages in the design and construction of hotels and restaurant kitchens, as well as lunch facilities in hospitals, schools, etc.; and sale of commercial furniture. Kitazawa Sangyo Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1951 and is headquartered in Shibuya, Japan.

Fukoku Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells rubber, metal and synthetic resin, and bio and medical related products in Japan, Southeast Asia, India, the United States, Europe, China, South Korea, and internationally. It operates through the Functional Products Business, Anti-Vibration Business, Life Sciences Business, Metal Processing Business, and Hose Business segments. The company offers wiper blade rubbers that are used in automobiles, railways, ships, and aircrafts; and seal products, which are used in automobiles, pneumatic devices, and industrial machinery. It also provides anti-vibration products comprising suspensions, rotating systems, and engine accessories for automobiles; shock absorbers and railroad track pads for railcars; and construction and industrial machinery. In addition, the company offers standard, semi-custom, and nonmagnetic ultrasonic motors that are used for camera lenses, rotational positioning for surveying instruments, and stages of semiconductor-related equipment; and ultrasonic atomizer products. Further, the company provides cell culture bag products; OA-related products, such as digital photo printer rollers and pads, and ink jet printer components; urethane products and microchannel chips; dampers, mounts, and urethane; metal parts for trucks and construction machinery; and hoses and other rubber products. The company was formerly known as Fukoku Rubber Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Fukoku Co.,Ltd. in January 1986. Fukoku Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1953 and is headquartered in Saitama, Japan.

Suzuden Corporation engages in purchasing and selling products related to electrical and electronic components in Japan. It offers FA equipment, including RFID equipment, sensors, and graphic control panels; information and communication devices, computers for industrial use, office equipment, accessories, and software; connectors, switching power supplies, and noise filters. The company provides materials for electric facilities comprising of wattmeter, terminal blocks, and electric cables. Suzuden Corporation was incorporated n 1952 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. The company is a subsidiary of Yamato Corporation.

Tokyu Construction Co., Ltd. engages in the civil engineering and building construction businesses in Japan. It constructs railways, roads, tunnels, bridges, and other construction projects; undertakes reconstruction works after earthquakes, etc.; and commercial facilities, hotels, offices, housing, factories, hospitals, and distribution centers, and wooden building, as well as offers renovation services. The company also involved in the real estate properties development and leasing business; revitalization of old properties; and PPP/concession business. Tokyu Construction Co., Ltd. was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Yamashita Health Care Holdings,Inc. engages in the supply of medical equipment in Japan. The company offers diagnostic imaging devices, such as MRI and CT, endoscopic systems, operating tables, and surgical equipment comprising electric scalpels, orthopedic implants, various catheters, and disposable medical materials; plans, outsources, manufactures, consigns, imports, and sells implants that are embedded in the body in the field of orthopedics; and sells and maintains medical equipment, which include dialysis machines/dialysis consumables, peritoneal dialysis, lithotripsy, and stents. It also provides consulting services related to the construction of nursing care facilities, M&A, and support to medical and nursing care institutions; and develops reservation solutions for hospitals consisting of search portal sites for hospitals and clinics, online reservations, posting agency for customer satisfaction surveys, and network security systems sales. In addition, the company offers network integration and software design and development; equipment used in physical therapy and rehabilitation, as well as related consumables such as surgical gowns, gloves, and bandages; manufactures and sells medical devices, and conduct contract research on medical ultrasound, as well as the development, sales, and consulting of medical devices and peripheral devices that use ultrasound. Yamashita Health Care Holdings,Inc. was founded in 1926 and is based in Fukuoka City, Japan.

Robot Home, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the AI/IoT and robot home businesses in Japan. The company an automated property management platform; consulting services with a focus on public affairs; property management services; platform for the consideration, purchase, management, and sale of income-producing real estate; rent guarantee, collection, reminders, and tenant support for rental property owners; and restoration and cleaning services. It also develops and sells IoT devices. The company was formerly known as TATERU, Inc. and changed its name to Robot Home, Inc. in April 2021. Robot Home, Inc. was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Chuo, Japan.

Quest Co., Ltd. provides IT services and solutions in Japan. It operates through two segments: System Development and Infrastructure Services. The company provides system design, development and maintenance for various business systems; and infrastructure construction to technology services, system operation, monitoring, help desk, and field support. The company was formerly known as Keihin Keisan Center Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Quest Co., Ltd. in April 1988. Quest Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1965 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Mitsuboshi Belting Ltd. manufactures and sells belts, construction materials, etc. in Japan and internationally. The company offers automobile and motorcycle transmission belts and related products, such as timing belts, variable speed belts, v-ribbed belts, raw edge v-belts, worm wheels, and accessory drive systems; and industrial power transmission belts and related products, including v-belts for general industry and agricultural machinery, timing belts for general industry, RIBSTAR belts, polyurethane belts, FLEXSTAR belts, pulleys, and couplings. It also provides conveyer belts, systems, and related products comprising mamaline, LOGISTAR, and tailormade solutions; and engineering plastic materials and processed products, such as molecular weight and density polyethylene, cast-nylon, clean-PE products, polyacetal, polyetheretherketone, polyphenylenesulfide, and polytetrafluoroethylene. In addition, the company offers waterproofing materials for construction and related products; civil engineering water-shielding materials; electronic and coating materials consisting of conductive pastes, resistive pastes, sintering auxiliary agent, cushioning materials, metallized ceramic substrates, and decorative paints; and star wipers. The company was formerly known as Mitsuboshi Chotai Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Mitsuboshi Belting Ltd. in May 1961. Mitsuboshi Belting Ltd. was founded in 1919 and is headquartered in Kobe, Japan.

Toami Corporation engages in the production and sale of welded wire mesh products under the TOAMI brand name in Japan. It operates through two segments, Civil Engineering and Construction Materials Business, and Civil Engineering and Construction Work sales. The company offers special welded wire mesh products, reinforcing bar processed products, mesh fences, etc., as well as C-panel wall construction products. Its products are primarily used in civil and architecture works, concrete, and other. The company was founded in 1887 and is headquartered in Shijonawate, Japan.

AirTrip Corp. engages in the online travel agency business in Japan. The company operates AirTrip, a website that allows users to compare and book domestic and international travel content, and offers domestic and international airline tickets and hotel products to other media outlets as travel content. It also offers inbound travel agency services and Wi-Fi router rental services for tourists visiting Japan, as well as e-mail magazine distribution, live distribution, and web media services. In addition, the company provides Kanzashi Cloud, a comprehensive accommodation plan management tool, and Wakizashi Cloud, an automation tool for cancellation fee collection. Further, it engages in IT offshore development and investment businesses, as well as regional revitalization projects, including tourism and HR tech. Additionally, the company operates a matching platform for recruitment talent, engages in the car rental business, and provides education and training for engineers and career support. The company was formerly known as Evolable Asia Corp. and changed its name to AirTrip Corp. in January 2020. AirTrip Corp. was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Tomen Devices Corporation engages in the trading of semiconductors and electronic components in Japan and internationally. It offers memory semiconductors, including dynamic random access memory (DRAM), flash memory, solid state drive (SSD), and multi chip packages (MPC) and embedded MPCs (eMPCs); system LSI semiconductors comprising system on a chip (SoC) and application specific integrated circuit (ASIC), display drive IC, and CMOS image sensors; display products, such as liquid crystal display (LCD) and organic light emitting diode (OLED); and LEDs and multi-layered ceramic capacitors. The company was incorporated in 1945 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Tomen Devices Corporation operates as a subsidiary of Toyota Tsusho Corporation.

Computer Management Co., Ltd. provides general, infrastructure, and ERP solution services in Japan. The company offers services on system development, financial/medical system development, and helpdesk business process outsourcing services; and system infrastructure solutions. It also provides ERP solutions on SAP S4 HANA for large enterprises; SAP Business ByDesign for medium-size enterprises; and SAP Business One for small and medium-sized enterprises. The company was incorporated in 1981 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Morita Holdings Corporation, through its subsidiaries, engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of ladder trucks, fire trucks, and specialty vehicles in Japan and internationally. The company operates through four segments: Fire Fighting Vehicles, Fire Protection Equipment & Systems, Recycling Machines, and Environmental Conservation Vehicles. It offers fire trucks, including ladder trucks, aerial platform, chemical/water tenders, rescue truck, aircraft rescue and fire fighting vehicles, multi-purpose fire fighting vehicles, and CAFS/water pumps, and maintenance. It also provides recycling machines comprising shredder plants, scrap shears, and scrap baling presses. In addition, the company offers environmental conservation vehicles, such as cesspit emptiers, garbage collectors, container lifters, cleaning vehicles, vacuum tanks, lumbar support wear, and home-visit bathing service cars. Further, it provides fire extinguishers, fire protection-related equipment; hydraulic equipment; designs and constructs waste recycling facilities and other waste disposal facilities; electronic applied machinery and information processing machinery; FRP cabins and bodies for fire trucks; sells portable pumps, fire alarm detectors, and fire trucks and equipment; platform ladders and aerial platforms; and maintenance and aftercare services, as well as engages in the trading, fabrication, repair, and sale of specialized vehicles. The company was formerly known as Morita Corporation and changed its name to Morita Holdings Corporation in October 2008. Morita Holdings Corporation was founded in 1907 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Asahi Co., Ltd. sells bicycles, parts, accessories, and other related products in Japan and China. It offers wholesale and retail general, sports, children's, folding, and electric assist bicycles; and ancillary services, such as maintenance, repair, and other services; and sales of its own branded products to franchised stores. It operates retail and online stores. The company sells its products under the Cycle Base Asahi brand. The company was formerly known as Asahi Gangu and changed its name to Asahi Co., Ltd. in May 1992. Asahi Co., Ltd. was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Hokuriku Electrical Construction Co.,Ltd. engages in the construction business in Japan. The company is involved in electrical contracting, telecommunications, ventilating and air conditioning, plumbing, firefighting facilities, and steel structure works. It also provides businesses related to electrical, steam, and other energy. In addition, the company sells, leases, and manages real estate properties. Hokuriku Electrical Construction Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1944 and is headquartered in Toyama, Japan.

Koatsu Gas Kogyo Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the gas and chemical products businesses in Japan. It provides dissolved acetylene gas for welding, cutting, heating, removing glass and copper wire from molds, pharmaceutical synthesis, and carbon raw materials applications; laser gas and mixed gas for various applications, such as laser processing, welding, sterilization, biotechnology, and food products; separated gas used analytical instruments for measuring the concentration of various air pollutants, automobile exhaust gas and flue gas, and calibration of gas detectors; LP gas/LNG for cutting/heating and fuel applications; agricultural carbon dioxide; gas cylinders; and safety systems. The company also offers chemical products, such as adhesives, PEGAR, a synthetic resin emulsion, and CYANON, an adhesive made from a cyanoacrylate monomer. Further, it offers RF tag related devices and their application systems, which used for railway equipment management and recognition of production lines; GNSS receiver modules; and LSI card and reader writers. Koatsu Gas Kogyo Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1943 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Traders Holdings Co.,Ltd., through its subsidiaries, engages in foreign exchange and securities trading activities in Japan. The company offers Minna no FX, which provides foreign exchange margin trading services; Minna no Option, which provides forex binary options trading services; LIGHT FX, which offers foreign exchange margin trading services; Minna Systre, which offers system trading of foreign exchange margin trading services; and Minna no Coin, which offers crypto asset margin trading services. It is also involved in the investment advisory and agency business; development and maintenance of the financial system; and investment business. The company was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Nippon Hume Corporation engages in the manufacture and sale of pipes and concrete piles in Japan. It offers pipeline products, such as fume tubes and synthetic steel pipes, box and arch culverts, assembly manholes, precast joint grooves, wellman products, jacking internal pressure pipes, propulsion tubes, and antibacterial concrete products; concrete piles; RC segments; and PC and composite wells, and press casts and PRC hollow piers. The company also provides multi-arch systems, precast guard fences, EMC wall railings, and wall railings; and valve boxes, infiltration box culverts, precast flood control basin, and eco concrete products. In addition, the company offers connect holes, precast basements, and other concrete products. Further, it is involved in the construction contracts, optical fiber cable laying, rehabilitation, earthquake resistance, and real estate businesses. The company was incorporated in 1925 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Cube System Inc. provides system solutions in Japan and internationally. It offers system integration services; system development; infrastructure solutions; system infrastructure operation and maintenance services; offshore utilization; and project management office services. The company also offers cloud services. It provides its solutions for finance, distribution, telecommunications, manufacturing, and other industries. The company was formerly known as Customer Engineers Corporation and changed its name to Cube System Inc. in October 1990. Cube System Inc. was incorporated in 1972 and is headquartered in Shinagawa, Japan.

Japan Petroleum Exploration Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, explores, develops, produces, and sells oil, natural gas, and other energy resources in Japan, Europe, North America, and the Middle East. It also owns and manages a gas pipeline network and domestic gas supply; and provides carbon dioxide underground storage. In addition, the company is involved in well drilling; manufacturing and selling petroleum products; insurance agency activities; engineering services contracting; and sale and contracted transportation of crude oil. Further, it engages in the geophysical exploration work, technology development, logging, and mud-logging work contracting; purchase and sale of LNG, petroleum gas, etc.; development of solar, wind, geothermal, biomass, and other renewable energy sources; real estate management; and operation and commissioning of natural power plants. Additionally, the company offers industrial disaster prevention, security, and drilling mud preparations; mud services; and geophysical exploration equipment. Japan Petroleum Exploration Co., Ltd. was founded in 1955 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Wantedly, Inc. engages in the planning, development, and operation of business SNS activities in Japan. The company offers Wantedly VISIT, a company visit application; Wantedly PEOPLE, an application that record customers encounters and share its achievements; wantedly Hire, a recruitment management system; and engagement suite, a simple solution to create a stable organization. Wantedly, Inc. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Rheon Automatic Machinery Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and supplies a range of food processing machines in Japan and internationally. The company provides encrusting machines comprising single and multi-row model, options, and peripheral equipment; and bread making machine such as line; and related equipment for producing confectioneries, breads, savory, and pastry. It also offers automatic machinery services; technical services; and maintenance services, such as periodic inspection, overhaul, and maintenance workshop. Rheon Automatic Machinery Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1963 and is headquartered in Utsunomiya, Japan.

RAIZNEXT Corporation engages in providing engineering and maintanence services in Japan. The company is involved in production, procurement, maintenance, sales, and leasing of equipment and machinery; designing, supervising, and constructing equipment and machinery; and maintenance of installations and equipment. It also provides installation, civil engineering, electrical instrumentation, and plumbing services; and research, development, technical support, and its consignment. The company serves oil, petrochemicals, gas, general chemicals, non-ferrous metals, metal processing, electronic materials, resource recycling, electricity, nuclear power, renewable energy, distributed energy, iron manufacturing, coal, desalination, fodder, biochemical, food products, pharmaceuticals, medical supplies, medical care, information/communications, shipping/transportation, distribution, stockpiles, air conditioning/plumbing, pollution control, accident prevention, and environmental conservation industries. RAIZNEXT Corporation was incorporated in 1938 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.

Takasago International Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells flavors, fragrances, aroma ingredients, and fine chemicals in Japan, the Americas, Europe, and Asia. The company offers flavors for various beverages, including fruit juices, carbonated drinks, flavored water, sports and energy drinks, coffee and tea drinks, dairy drinks, plant-based milk, alcoholic/non-alcoholic beverages, jelly drinks, powder mixes, and liquid food; dairy products, such as ice creams and sweets, custard pudding, jelly, yogurt, fruit preparations, syrups, and dessert sauces; savory products comprising curries, stews, instant noodles, soups, pouch-packed and frozen food, dressings, seasonings, seasoning powders, potato chips and snacks, crab sticks and paste products, ham and sausages, liquid and nutritional food, and spice products; confectioneries, which include candies, chewing gums, compressed mints and tablets, and chocolates; bakery products, such as baked confections, bread, fillings, and coatings; and oral care comprising toothpaste, liquid toothpaste, and mouthwash. It also provides fine fragrances; and consumer fragrances for personal care, including personal wash, body and hair care, skin care, baby care, and men's grooming products, as well as for home care, which consists of air and laundry care, surface and dish care, toilet care, and pest control products. In addition, the company offers aroma ingredients to create fragrances and cosmetics; and fine chemicals comprising active pharmaceutical intermediates, catalysts and ligands, functional materials, and chiral building blocks. Further, it is involved in research; and real estate rental businesses. The company exports its products. Takasago International Corporation was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Ota, Japan.

Riken Technos Corporation engages in compound, film, and food packaging businesses in Japan and internationally. The company offers flexible and rigid polyvinyl chloride, thermoplastic elastomers, electro-conductive compounds and anti-static, biomass plastics, general purpose plastic compounds, etc. for use in extrusion and injection molding applications. It also provides building and decorative, commercial and advertisement, steel plate, window, and car films, as well as films for optics and semiconductors, electrical materials, medical supplies, agriculture, etc. In addition, the company offers food wrap films made from polyvinyl chloride resin under the RIKEN WRAP and HI-WRAP brand names, as well as heat-resistant cooking sheets, plastic bags, cooking papers, cooking gloves, etc. Its products are used in automobiles, industrial components, home appliances, toys, medical supplies, building materials, and construction materials, as well as in IT industries. The company was formerly known as Riken Vinyl Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Riken Technos Corporation in October 2001. Riken Technos Corporation was incorporated in 1951 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Teac Corporation engages in the audio and information product businesses in Japan and internationally. Its audio products comprise high-end and other audio products; audio equipment for music production; and professional audio products. Its information products include recording and reproducing equipment for aircrafts, medical image recording, and reproducing products, as well as measurement products, such as sensors/transducers, data recorders, medical imaging recorders and filing systems, and video/ audio reproducer units, as well as data storage products comprising optical disc drives, and CD/DVD/Blu-ray disc writer and reader. It also provides manufacturing, customer, and system solutions; business solutions; and repair and maintenance services. The company was incorporated in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Teac Corporation operates as a subsidiary of Global Acoustic Partners LLC.

Dream Incubator Inc. is a venture capital and private equity firm specializing in incubation and investments in all business stages. The firm specializes in M&A and business restructuring. It seeks to invest in Japan and Vietnam including other part of Asia. The firm offers assistance in formulating capital policies and business plans to venture companies, as well as provides support required to meet the needs of companies in hi-tech and IT fields. Dream Incubator Inc. was founded in 2000 and is based in Tokyo, Japan, with additional offices in Shanghai, China; Bangalore, India; Singapore, Singapore; Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, Thailand and Indonesia.

Howa Machinery, Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of machine tools, pneumatic and hydraulic equipment, electronic machines, sweepers, metal joinery fittings, and firearms in Japan. The company's machine tools include machining centers, transfer lines, and standard machine tool units for transfer lines; and pneumatic and hydraulic equipment comprises power chucks, rotating cylinders, rod less slit and magnetic type cylinders, hydraulic and pneumatic clamp cylinders, hydraulic jig cylinders, rotary actuators, and hydraulic cylinders. It also provides electronic machines, which include exposure systems for printed circuit boards, ceramic green sheet-related equipment, and testing systems for mounted circuit boards; sweepers used for cleaning in streets, factories, and public and leisure facilities; and sporting rifles. The company was formerly known as Howa Heavy Industries, Ltd. and changed its name to Howa Machinery, Ltd. in 1945. Howa Machinery, Ltd. was incorporated in 1907 and is headquartered in Kiyosu, Japan.

Mitsubishi Pencil Co., Ltd. manufactures and supplies writing instruments in Japan, the United States, Europe, Asia, and internationally. The company operates through Writing Instruments and Writing Instrument Peripheral Products Business; and Other Business segments. It offers pencils and colored pencils, water-based ink roller balls, oil-based ballpoint pens, mechanical pencils and refill lead, felt-tip pens and markers, and office and school supplies; and the sale of adhesive tape and handicrafts. The company also provides ballpoint pen; multifunctional and customizable pen; sign pens and markers; seals and name pens; green net; and sharp; eye makeup and hair dye products; and carbon nanotubes, acoustic matching layers, electrode materials, and containers. It serves medical care, electronics, automobiles, and cosmetics industries. Mitsubishi Pencil Co., Ltd. was founded in 1887 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Asanuma Corporation operates as a general contractor in Japan and internationally. It undertakes a range of projects, such as schools, hospitals, hotels, water and sewer lines, and roads. The company was founded in 1892 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Arbeit-Times Co., Ltd. engages in editing and publishing of free job information magazines under the DOMO name in Japan. The company offers DOMO, a part-time job recruitment magazine; DOMO NET, a part-time job recruitment information site; Wagasha de DOMO, an applicant tracking system which allows to create own company's recruitment website; JOB, a job change information site; DOMO Pad, a job information magazine; TSUNORU, a new graduate recruitment information site for small and medium-sized companies; Tegara Watch, an employee retention support tool; wevox, an organizational issue visualization tool; NJSS, a bidding information flash services; and President interview site, a president interview site. It also provides job change/employment events; job change agent, job change agent, IT education, and corporate programming training services. The company was incorporated in 1973 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Fuji Seal International, Inc. engages in planning, proposal, development, manufacturing, and sales of packaging systems. The company offers shrink sleeve labels for containers; pressure sensitive labels used in promotional and advertising campaign tools; spouted pouches; rotary machines, linear machines, hybrid steam tunnels, self-adhesive/pressure-sensitive labelers, and PSL labeling systems; and packaging services, as well as training and maintenance services, after-service support services, and remote service centers. It operates in Japan, the United States, Mexico, the United Kingdom, the Netherlands, France, Spain, Poland, Switzerland, Germany, Italy, Indonesia, Vietnam, Thailand, and India. The company was formerly known as Fuji Seal, Inc. and changed its name to Fuji Seal International, Inc. in 2004. Fuji Seal International, Inc. was founded in 1897 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Axis Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, sale, consultation, and operation management of computer systems. It offers system integration services, including application and low code development, network design, infrastructure system construction, cloud lift and shift, operation and maintenance, and nearshore development services. The company also provides KITARO, a smart reception service; Servive, a core system for debt collection operations; Parthenon for billing/collection, transportation management, research and analysis, and data management; AxIsOCR, an OCR service that uses AI technology to read characters in handwritten documents and forms, and digitize them; and BizFront, a UI improvement tool that adds functions to the input fields on the business system screen. In addition, it offers KITARO, an IoT service; DX promotion acceleration solution for digital transformation; security services, such as security consulting, product implementation, operational support, and vulnerability diagnosis; and safety confirmation services. The company serves finance, transportation, public services, manufacturing, medical care, and distribution industries, as well as government and electric power sectors and aviation-related fields. The company was incorporated in 1991 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Niitaka Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells commercial detergents, cleaning agents, disinfectants, bleach products, solid fuels, and other products in Japan. The company also offers food additives products, cosmetic ingredients, and quasi-drugs. Further, it engages in the provision of hygiene management support services, etc. The company was formerly known as Niitaka Chemical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Niitaka Co., Ltd. in 2002. The company was incorporated in 1963 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

JMS Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacture, sale, export, and import of medical devices and pharmaceuticals in Japan, North America, Europe, China, South Korea, Thailand, and internationally. It offers infusion and nutrition solutions, which includes needless access port, closed drug mixing and infusion system, infusion pump, and oral and enteral nutrition system for treatment and laboratory testing; and dialysis solutions including dialysis equipment for hemodialysis, peritoneal dialysis solution, and APD equipment that automatically performs the injection and discharge of peritoneal dialysis solution. It also provides surgical treatment solution comprising products that are used in cardiac surgery and cardiovascular internal medicine, such as membrane oxygenator and cardiopulmonary blood tubing sets. In addition, the company offers blood management and cell therapy solutions, which includes serum collection sets and blood bags. Further, it provides logistics and other equipment; and offers maintenance works and sanatorium services. The company was incorporated in 1947 and is headquartered in Hiroshima, Japan.

STUDIO ALICE Co.,Ltd. operates children's photo studios in Japan. It operates through Photography Business and Clothes Manufacturing & Wholesale Business segments. The Photography Business segment engages in taking, producing, processing, displaying, and printing photographs. The Clothes Manufacturing and Wholesale Business segment is involved in manufacturing and selling clothing for photography. The company also manufactures and sells printed products. STUDIO ALICE Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1974 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Asahi Concrete Works Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells concrete products in Japan. The company offers PC box, HTC Box, PRC box, large multi-section box, and PPCa box culvert, as well as box culvert for jacking construction; PC rainwater storage tank agua, new box-type agua, box culvert type rainwater storage tank, and PCa open regulating pond. It also provides circular, oval, square, infiltration, and floating suppression type connect hole; disaster toilets; waterways; fire prevention water tank; underground garage; railway and road related products; and other products. Asahi Concrete Works Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1923 and is headquartered in Chuo, Japan.

Alps Alpine Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells electronic components in Japan, China, the United States, South Korea, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Component, Sensor and Communication, and Module and System. The company offers TACT switches, potentiometers, HAPTIC reactors, actuators, microfluidic device, and aspherical glass lens for automobiles, consumer appliances, mobile phones and video games. It also provides current, pressure, millimeter-wave, and magnetic sensors; and remote and analog meter monitoring systems, communication modules, and capacitive sensing modules for automotive, consumer, and industrial machinery markets. In addition, the company integrated displays, sound systems, electric shifters, power window switches, cabin controllers, functional surfaces, amplifiers and speakers, alpine premium sound systems, and customized car products. Further, it provides systems development, office, and financing and leasing services, as well as solution for car rental operators. The company was formerly known as Alps Electric Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Alps Alpine Co., Ltd. in January 2019. Alps Alpine Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Tadano Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells construction and vehicle-mounted cranes, aerial work platforms, and transport machinery in Japan and internationally. The company offers all-terrain, rough terrain, crawler, truck, and cargo cranes; aerial work platform machines, including hyper and super deck, and skyboy truck and self-propelled; and aerial work platform lineup for electrical work, communication and general construction, heavy load construction, and shipbuilding. It also provides vehicle transport, industrial vehicle transport, elevated road/bridge inspection, Pole digger, Orbital land vehicle, illuminated vehicle, marine crane, all-terrain crane detachable lifter, lifter, and lift house. The company was formerly known as Tadano Iron Works Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tadano Ltd. in 1989. Tadano Ltd. was founded in 1919 and is headquartered in Takamatsu, Japan.

SAXA, Inc., through its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and sells equipment and parts for information and communication systems in Japan. It also engages in the development, manufacture, sale, and support of external storage device units and peripherals connected to servers. SAXA, Inc. was formerly known as SAXA Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to SAXA, Inc. in July 2024. SAXA, Inc. was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

PRISM BioLab Co.,LTD engages in the research and development of pharmaceuticals using its proprietary drug discovery platform technology, PepMetics Technology. It develops E7386 targeting CBP/beta-catenin, which is in Phase II clinical trial for the treatment of cancer; and PRI724 targeting CBP/beta-catenin that is in Phase II clinical trial for treating cirrhosis. The company has a strategic collaboration with Receptor.AI Inc. for the development of an AI-integrated drug discovery platform. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Fujisawa, treating Japan.

Star Mica Holdings Co., Ltd. engages in the renovated condominium, investment, and advisory businesses in Japan. The company engages in investment, renovation, sale, and brokerage of pre-owned condominiums; and real estate leasing, planning, management, and brokerage activities. It also offers private banking and investment advisory services. The company was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Transgenic Group Inc. develops, distributes, and licenses genetically modified animals and antibodies in Japan. It operates through Drug Discovery Support Business and Investment and Consulting Business segments. The company provides glycan synthesis and analysis services; non-clinical studies for pharmaceuticals, foods, cosmetics, chemical substances, etc., as well as various safety tests for foods, and pharmaceutical agents; and support for bioequivalence test, including clinical trials, pharmacokinetic measurements, and the preparation of clinical trial reports; as well as hospital support services. It also offers drug efficiency and pharmacological test and safety studies; sugar chain analysis and synthesis services; advice and support services, including M&A, business revitalization, business succession services; and contract production services, such as genetically modified mice, antibodies, protein hypers, and expressing cells, as well as sells mouse-related products and mouse models, and research reagents. In addition, the company offers support service, including business succession and business revitalization, business succession, and investment business consultancy services. The company was formerly known as Trans Genic Inc. and changed its name to Transgenic Group Inc. in October 2024. Transgenic Group Inc. was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Fukuoka City, Japan.

Nihon Trim Co., Ltd. develops and sells electrolyzed hydrogen water purifiers in Japan and internationally. The company offers cartridges and electrolyzed hydrogen water apparatuses for households and livestock industries; electrolyzed water systems for agriculture; and electrolyzed water hemodialysis systems for medical care. It also manufactures and sells bottled water; and undertakes research and development work of electrolyzed hydrogen water. Nihon Trim Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1982 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Sun* Inc. engages in the digital creative studio business in Japan. The company offers creative and engineering services, including support for business design, prototype development, full development, and growth. It also provides talent platform services to support new business development and digital transformation. The company was incorporated in 2013 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Nippon Shinyaku Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells pharmaceuticals and foodstuffs in Japan and internationally. The company operates through Pharmaceuticals and Functional Food Business segments. It offers drugs in the fields of urology, hematology, intractable and rare diseases, gynecology, and other diseases; health food ingredients, preservatives, protein preparations, and supplements. The company in the Strategic Partnership with Nippon Shinyaku to develop ATSN-10 that is in Phase I/II of clinical trials for the treatment of GUCY2D-mutant Leber congenital amaurosis; and RGX-121 for the treatment of mucopolysaccharidosis. Nippon Shinyaku Co., Ltd. was founded in 1911 and is headquartered in Kyoto, Japan.

BENEFIT JAPAN Co., Ltd. engages in the internet telecommunication business in Japan. The company offers various products and services, including virtual mobile network operator, mobile Wi-Fi, communication robot, SIM cards, smartphones, and optical internet connections, as well as optional services, such as apps, content, and various support services. It also provides robot, reuse, water server, and other businesses. The company was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Daisan Co., Ltd. plans, designs, manufactures, and sells construction hardware, temporary equipment and other related services in Japan. It also manufactures general temporary construction materials used in mid- to high-rise building construction and bridge construction. In addition, its overseas business mainly provides ancillary construction work, such as thermal insulation work, scaffolding work, electrical work, and offers related construction and personnel dispatch services. Further, the company offers single pipe joint with visible lock, retractable pedals, HAP security system, simple morning glory, curing material for opening, DL and BL guard, DS coupler, DS bracket, DS step, DS hanger stage, bike and bamboo scaffoldings, and le-volt. Daisan Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1975 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Sodick Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of numerical control electric discharge machines (EDMs) in Japan and internationally. The company operates through three segments: Machine Tool, Industrial Machinery, and Food Machinery. The Machine Tool segment develops, manufactures, and sells electrical discharge machines. It also offers various products, such as die-sinker, wire-cut, small-hole drilling, and high-speed small hole processing machine; metal 3D printers; machining center; and CAD-CAM solutions. Its Industrial Machinery segment develops, manufactures, and sells injection molding machines, including horizontal and vertical injection moulding machines. The Food Machinery segment develops, manufactures, and sells noodle making machines, noodle manufacturing plants, confectionery production-related equipment, precooked side-dish food sterilization-related equipment, and packaged cooked rice manufacturing equipment. It also develops, manufactures, and sells linear motors and motion controllers which are used to control EDMs, injection molding machines, and cutting machines. In addition, the company offers machine tools, industrial machines, ceramic products and LED lighting. Further, the company provides consumable, such as wire electrodes, wire guide unit parts, filters, ion exchange resin, peripherals, electrodes for small hole EDM, tooling systems, dielectric fluids, and chemical products. Sodick Co., Ltd. was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.

Fuji Nihon Corporation engages in the manufacture and sale of refined sugar and sugar-related products in Japan. It offers refined white, granulated, brown and medium brown, rock, and liquid and liquid brown sugar. The company also provides inulin, a water-soluble fiber found in vegetables for maintaining the intestine clean; and cut flower nutrients under the KEEPFLOWER brand, as well as offers consultancy services for growers, florists, and customers. In addition, it offers food additives and functional materials. The company was formerly known as Fuji Nihon Seito Corporation and changed its name to Fuji Nihon Corporation in October 2024. Fuji Nihon Corporation was incorporated in 1949 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Daito Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of pharmaceutical products in Japan and internationally. It offers active pharmaceutical ingredients for generic drugs; develops and manufactures generic and over-the-counter drugs; and contract manufacturing services for ethical drugs. The company is also involved in the wholesale of pharmaceutical and veterinary medicine. It exports its products to the United States, as well as European and Asian countries. The company was formerly known as Daito Corporation and changed its name to Daito Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd. in 1992. Daito Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1942 and is headquartered in Toyama, Japan.

Advanced Media, Inc. engages in planning, design, and development of speech recognition solutions in Japan and internationally. The company offers AI voice recognition AmiVoice as a service to companies, corporate users, and general consumers. It also provides solutions for conference proceedings; mobile application development; language education; and manufacturing, distribution, and logistics solutions, as well as support and consulting services. In addition, the company offers microphone devices. Advanced Media, Inc. was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Toshima, Japan.

Konishi Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells synthetic adhesives in Japan. It operates through three segments: Bonds, Chemical Products, and Construction Business. The company offers general household adhesive, repair material, and tape for consumer sector; interior construction adhesive, general residential sealant, and construction tape for housing-related fields; industrial adhesives, industrial tape, and industrial release agent, as well as various resin products for industrial materials; building construction repair sealant; and adhesives and repair materials for civil engineering construction. It also trades in chemical products for automotive, electronics and electrical, chemicals, paint, and housing related fields. In addition, the company engages in the provision of survey, design, cost estimation, and construction of repair, reinforcement, and renovation work for concrete structures; contracting civil engineering and construction work; upper deck construction work for bridge and highway construction; planning, design, construction and supervision of civil engineering and construction works; and design and construction of architectural and civil engineering works. The company was founded in 1870 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

SOLXYZ Co., Ltd. provides system integration, system consulting, and outsourcing services in Japan. The company offers security consulting, cloud, IoT, general-purpose development tools, AI generator services, embedded development tools, education, general business, financial, and embedded systems services. SOLXYZ Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1981 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

YAMADA Consulting Group Co.,Ltd. provides various consulting services in Japan, Asia, the United States, and internationally. It offers sustainable growth, business revitalization, mergers and acquisitions, business succession, overseas business, organization personnel, corporate governance, information technology (IT) strategy and digital, and real estate services. The company also provides investment businesses related to unlisted stocks and real estate. The company was formerly known as TFP Consulting Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to YAMADA Consulting Group Co.,Ltd. in December 2010. YAMADA Consulting Group Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1989 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

ANEST IWATA Corporation operates air energy and coating business in Japan, Europe, the America, China, and internationally. It engages in manufacturing and sale of air compressors, vacuum equipment, coating equipment and systems, and peripheral equipment. The company offers coating/paint application equipment, which includes spray guns, electrostatic coating machines, and paint supply equipment for industrial and automotive industries; and automatic painting and environmental devices, painting plants and robots, and painting booths. In addition, it provides oil-free scroll vacuum pumps for general industries, semiconductors, food production, research facilities, etc.; and steam power generators. ANEST IWATA Corporation was founded in 1926 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.

AJIS Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides retail support services in Japan and internationally. It operates in three segments: Retail Support Business, Marketing Business, and International Business. The company offers inventory, merchandising, and retail outsourced services, including filling items, store renovations, and seasonal shelf changes; and marketing services, such as replenishment, temporary staffing, and research, as well as marketing solutions comprising in-store rounders, mystery shoppers, and production and installation of promotional materials. It also provides remodeling, survey, inspection, field, and other overseas retail support services, as well as system and hardware development. The company serves chain stores and distribution retail customers. AJIS Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1978 and is headquartered in Chiba, Japan. As of April 6, 2026, AJIS Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Saito Holdings Y.K..

Takara & Company Ltd. produces, consults, prints, and translates disclosure and IR-related materials in Japan and internationally. The company offers project proposal, design creation, proofreading, printing, electronic, and other services for statutory disclosure documents; and voluntary disclosure documents created for shareholders and investors. It is also involved in the provision of support services for general shareholders meetings; creation of examples; and provision of various information and seminars for persons in charge of disclosure, as well as for acquiring certifications. In addition, the company offers automation tools; WizLaboBudget, a budget management support tool; support services for the preparation of listing application documents required for initial public offering companies and support for audit responses; and advisory services related to the creation of ESG and integrated reports that create corporate social value, as well as develops applications and systems, corporate sites, such as ER/SR tools. Further, it provides support services for the transition to IFRS disclosure; disclosure of corrections and settlement of accounts and early settlement of accounts; advisory services, such as M&A support and listing examinations services on the TOKYO PRO Market; translation services covering a range of fields, including translation of confidential information and IR materials related to M&A; localization services; and support for customers global business development. Additionally, the company develops and sells AI translation systems, and support in setting up the translation environment. Takara & Company Ltd. was founded in 1952 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Sintokogio,Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells foundry, surface treatment, environmental, and material handling in Japan and internationally. The company engages in electronic core materials and ceramics businesses. It also offers green sand and v-process molding, chemically bonded sand, and aluminium casting products; dust collection, dust fire prevention system, exhaust gas treatment, and water treatment products; powder treatment products/ technologies, including granulation, kneading, pneumatic transport, dispersal, and powder solutions; and force sensors. In addition, it provides flooring and electric cylinders, as well as image processing measuring machine and calibration of measuring instruments and machines. The company was formerly known as Kubota Seisakusho, Ltd. and changed its name to Sintokogio,Ltd. in February 1960. Sintokogio,Ltd. was incorporated in 1934 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

MTI Ltd. engages in the content distribution for mobile phones in Japan. It operates through four segments: Content Business, Healthcare Business, School DX Business, and Other Businesses.
