artience Co., Ltd. engages in the colorants and functional materials, polymers and coatings, printing and information, and packaging materials businesses in Japan, Europe, Asia, the Americas, and internationally. The company operates through Coloring materials and functional materials related; Polymer/coating related; Package related; and Printing and information related business segments.It offers pigments, pigment dispersions, pastes for color filter, color resists, OCF resists, color/functional masterbatches, functional compounds, paints for data recording materials, CCUS materials, CNT dispersions, inkjet inks, colorants, and plastic colorants. The company also provides pressure sensitive adhesives, laminating adhesives, hot-melt adhesives, adhesive tapes, functional film for electronics, marking films, can coatings, resins, hard coating materials, medical products, natural extracts, and coating agents. In addition, it offers gravure and flexographic inks, gravure printing systems, gravure, and flexographic plate making solutions. Further, the company provides offset inks, newspaper inks, metal decorative inks, UV curing inks, offset printing materials, printing equipment, screen inks, printing inks, and others. It serves electronics, package, optoelectronics, medical/healthcare, mobility, building materials/living space, energy, and printing markets. The company was formerly known as Toyo Ink SC Holdings Co., Ltd. and changed its name to artience Co., Ltd. in January 2024. artience Co., Ltd. was founded in 1896 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

NPC Incorporated engages in the machinery and environmental businesses. The company researches and develops, and sells various equipment, including automated machines for automobile, electric, precision machine, film, medicine, electronic parts, and logistics industries. It also offers photovoltaic (PV) module manufacturing equipment, including cell testers, tabbing and stringing machines, layup machines, tape applicator, bussing machine, glass/sheet feeding machine, vacuum laminator, trimming machine, framing machine, j-box attachment/soldering/potting, inspection device, repair station, and buffer; vacuum bonding machines; and vacuum insulation panels sealing machines, etc. In addition, the company provides products and services related to PV panel inspection service, PV panel inspection device, PV panel reuse/recycling, PV panel disassembly equipment, etc. Further, the company sells vegetables cultivated in plant factory using artificial light. NPC Incorporated was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Taiho Kogyo Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells bearings in Japan. It offers engine parts, such as vacuum pumps, exhaust valves, turbocharger parts, and engine bearings; drive auxiliary bearing and compressor parts; and noise damping PCU covers, stack manifold and pressure plates, and adhesive gaskets, as well as fuel cell power generation contract testing products. The company also offers aluminum die-cast products and precision molds. Taiho Kogyo Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1939 and is headquartered in Toyota, Japan.

Haruyama Holdings Inc. engages in the sale of menswear, womenswear, and related products in Japan. It provides suits, formal wear, inner wear, coats, as well as casual, and business clothes. The company was formerly known as Haruyama Trading Company Limited. and changed its name to Haruyama Holdings Inc. in January 2017. Haruyama Holdings Inc. was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Okayama, Japan.

Hosokawa Micron Corporation provides powder and plastic processing equipment in Japan, the Americas, Europe, Asia, and internationally. The company offers powder processing equipment for grinding, classifying, blending and drying powder materials and products used in various industries; dust collection equipment for environmental protection and product recovery; and chemical hazard prevention equipment for the protection of workers during pharmaceuticals development and manufacture. It also provides machines for milling, mixing, particle design, agglomeration, feed and discharge, laboratory technology, bag filters, protection and production isolation, and engineering, as well as after-sales, toll processing, analysis, and preventive maintenance services. In addition, the company is involved in the contract research, development, manufacture, and sale of new materials, cosmetics, and hair growth products based on nanocomposite particle technology. Further, the company engages in the development, manufacture, sale, and system engineering of multi-layered performance films for use in food packaging; protection of electronic equipment; and single-layer film manufacturing equipment. It provides its products for energy, IT, automobile, chemicals, minerals, pharmaceuticals, food, polymer drying/SSP, containment, and metal industries. The company was founded in 1916 and is headquartered in Hirakata, Japan.

IACE TRAVEL Corporation., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the travel business in Japan, Canada, and Mexico. The company offers business travel management (BTM) services, such as air ticket and accommodation arrangements for domestic and international business trips, immigration information, visa applications, payment settlement, risk management, and business trip data. It also operates Smart BTM, a cloud-based travel booking system with online reservation functionality that provides data analysis and proposals for cost reduction, multiple route suggestions, urgent booking arrangements, and a 24/7 emergency response system. In addition, the company provides personal travel services comprising domestic and international package tours, personal travel arrangements, custom travel proposals, and other benefits-related services; travel agency support services for government bodies, such as personal trips and home visits; airline ticketing, travel planning, and guided tours for U.S. military personnel based in Japan; flight bookings to Japan and international tours departing from Canada; and incentive travel and personal travel support for employees of Japanese corporations in Mexico. It serves corporate clients, individual travelers, government agencies, and the U.S. military in Japan. IACE TRAVEL Corporation. was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Chuo, Japan.

SMN Corporation engages in digital marketing activities business in Japan. The company offers VALIS-Engine, an AI engine; Logicad, a demand side platform; and VALIS-Cockpit, human resources solution and a marketing analytics tool. It also provides data collection and analysis, advertising management, and content-based marketing solutions for agencies and advertisers; and creates and distributes ad content for SSPs and media outlets. In addition, the company offers marketing solutions to support advertisation on the web portal of ISP So-Net. The company was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. SMN Corporation operates as a subsidiary of Sony Network Communications Inc.

Meiwa Industry Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells automotive interior parts in Japan. The company operates through Auto Parts, Housing and Related Products, and Other segments. The company offers automotive parts, including trunk interior parts, floor interior parts, and other automobile interior parts, and components under the Shiko sheet, Zem-Light, Zem-Light SPS, and Meitone brand names for use in various areas, such as trunk, floor mats, and roofs of sedans, wagons, SUVs, minivans, small cars, and trucks. The company also manufactures and sells home construction materials and devices. The company was incorporated in 1950 and is headquartered in Atsugi, Japan.

Fujimak Corporation engages in the manufacture, sale, maintenance, and repair of commercial kitchen equipment in Japan and internationally. The company offers ovens, teppanyaki grills, fryer oil filters, gas ranges, induction stoves, warmers, griddles, salamander roasters, noodle boilers, rotary cooking kettle braising pans, dumpling grillers, steamers, package cookers, and reheating cabinets, as well as electric ranges, tables, and stock pot ranges; refrigerators, freezers, blast chillers, showcases, cold food carts, ice makers, and vacuum and tabletop coolers; Kitchen Link Cloud, a cloud-based temperature management system; Kitchen Link, a system that centrally manages data; I-Robo2, a stir-fry cooking robot; finibo, a system that automates the picking and sorting cleaned dishes; and island and custom-made home kitchens. It also provides dishwashers, cookware washers, sterilizer cabinets, and ultraviolet sterilizers; cleaning agents for washing machines; carts; automatic rice cookers, storage products, and silos; bakery equipment; cabinets and camshelving equipment; Pacojet, a frozen pulverizing cooker; vacuum packing machines, blenders and mixers, and cookers; gelato/ice cream service equipment, drink dispensers and machines, auxiliary cooking equipment, and water heaters; and sanitary sinks and bars, automatic hand sanitizer dispensers, air showers, electrolyzed water generators, digital probe thermometers, and water softeners and purifiers. The company sells its products online. It serves government agencies and public institutions; educational institutions and school lunch centers; medical and welfare facilities; hotels, inns, and lodging facilities; restaurants and izakayas; amusement facilities; fast food establishments; convenience stores; food processing plants and central kitchens; company cafeterias; ship kitchen facilities; and other industries. Fujimak Corporation was incorporated in 1950 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

SRA Holdings, Inc. engages in the provision of IT consulting, system construction, operation services, products, and solutions in Japan and internationally. It offers systems development services, which includes financial, embedded, and academic IT services, as well as business systems development, infrastructure development, and consulting services; operation/administration services comprising outsourcing, infrastructure operation, and system operation services; and product solutions marketing services consist of internal controls, cloud security, AI, BI, open source software, academia, development support, system quality, and healthcare services. The company also provides Cavirin, a compliance and security solution for the hybrid cloud; UniVision, a web services-based integrated university administration solution incorporating a range of academic systems, including Student Portfolio System and DB Spiral university information database system; PowerGres, a tool and support for database operation; and HEALTHPLAYER, a service platform for acquisition and analysis of various health care data. In addition, it offers P-Con, a paperless solution that enables as-is digitization of existing paper documents; MailDepot, a mail archiving product; ProjDepot, which provides consolidated management of projects across the organization; TestDepot, an embedded software development tool that supports automation of testing tasks; and Testablish that offers automated testing for GUI applications. The company was incorporated in 1991 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Makuake, Inc. operates the Makuake crowdfunding platform in Japan. It also operates Makuake, which is a support purchasing service for items and experiences; Makuake incubation studio, which supports new business development and practical human resource development by converting research and development technologies to create new businesses; Makuake stores and shop; Makuake Insight, a data-driven business support service; and general sales support services, as well as provides advertising distribution agency services. In addition, the company engages in media, internet advertising, game, investment development, and other businesses. The company was incorporated in 2013 and is headquartered in Meguro, Japan.

Fuller, Inc. offers business development and digital consultancy services in Japan. The company develops applications for mobile devices and offers App Ape, an app analytics service that provides the actual usage application data of smartphones. It also offers services, such as app development, UI/UX design, system development, and application usage data analysis with a focus on smartphone applications, and human resource development support. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Niigata, Japan.

Delivery Consulting Inc. provides technology solutions consulting services in Japan and internationally. The company offers data infrastructure architecture and cloud migration, IoT data architecture, and data security governance; system modernization; dashboard design, data modeling and engineering, and data application, as well as support for in-house production; intelligent automation; solution engineering; system architecture and application development; cloud strategy and migration; data strategy; AI and analytics; modernization diagnostics and in-house consulting services; and data managed services. It also provides contact center reform and AI at customer contact points to optimize the customer experience through digital utilization. In addition, the company offers Salesforce Sales Cloud; Wordsmith, a natural language generation engine; and Tableau, a BI tool. Delivery Consulting Inc. was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Fantasista Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in real estate business in Japan. It operates in three segments: Real Estate Business, Healthcare Business, and Clean Energy Business. The company is involved in the ownership, use, purchase, sale, rental, brokerage, management, and operation of real estate; buying, selling, management, consulting, and holding of securities related to the liquidation of assets; and planning, research, design, and construction consulting services related to urban development and planning. It also operates Under Railway Hotel AKIHABARA, a hotel under an elevated railway; and Zosei-kun.AI, an AI application that proposes plot divisions and create soil amount and cost estimates for land development. In addition, the company manufactures, sells, and imports health food and supplements, health-related equipment, cosmetics, and miscellaneous goods, as well as offers catalog mail orders. Further, it provides grid storage batteries and electric vehicle chargers. The company was formerly known as Asia Gate Holdings Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Fantasista Co., Ltd. in January 2024. Fantasista Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1950 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

Itoham Yonekyu Holdings Inc. engages in the manufacture and sale of processed meat and processed/precooked food products in Japan. The company operates in two segments: Processed Food Division and Meat Division. It offers ham, sausages, cooked, and processed foods products. The company was founded in 1928 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Nippon Shokubai Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of chemical products in Japan and internationally. It operates in two segments: Materials Business and Solutions Business. The Materials Business segment manufactures and sells acrylic acids, acrylates, superabsorbent polymers, ethylene oxides, ethylene glycols, ethanolamine, maleic anhydride, process catalysts, MMA monomers and polymers, and other chemicals. The Solutions Business segment manufactures and sells polymers for concrete admixtures, glycol ether, secondary alcohol ethoxylates, water soluble polymers, intermediates for pharmaceuticals, electronic information materials, iodine compounds, resins for adhesives/paints, ethyleneimine derivatives, processed adhesive products, and automotive catalysts, as well as De-NOx catalysts, dioxins decomposition catalysts, equipment for waste gas treatment, wet air oxidation catalysts, and materials for batteries. It also provides acrylic esters, maleimides, cyclic amides, initiators; water-based, solvent based and soluble polymers; inorganic and organic composite fine particles; and liquefied gas and fuel cell materials. In addition, the company produces and markets industrial materials, civil engineering and construction materials made of synthetic rubber latex or acrylic emulsion as base; and acrylic emulsion and fine products. The company was formerly known as Nippon Shokubai Kagaku Kogyo Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nippon Shokubai Co., Ltd. in 1991. Nippon Shokubai Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1941 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Hisamitsu Pharmaceutical Co., Inc. manufactures and sells pharmaceuticals in Japan. The company offers OTC products, such as external pain-relieving drugs under the SALONPAS, NOBINOBI, SALONSIP, AIR, SALONPAS, and FEITAS; BUTENALOCK, a remedy for athlete's foot; and ALLEGRA FX, a sinus medication for allergies. It also manufactures and sells quasi-drugs and cosmetics; MOHRUS TAPE and MOHRUS PAP XR, a transdermal analgesic anti-inflammatory drug; and patches for female hormone, asthma, and overactive bladders. It also exports its products to Asia, the United States, and the European area. Hisamitsu Pharmaceutical Co., Inc. was founded in 1847 and is headquartered in Tosu, Japan. As of February 19, 2026, Hisamitsu Pharmaceutical Co., Inc. operates as a subsidiary of Taiyo Kosan Co., Ltd.

C.E.Management Integrated Laboratory Co.Ltd provides services in the areas of civil engineering and construction in Japan. The company conducts geological surveys to obtain ground information for the construction for civil engineering structures and buildings; surveys and diagnosis of various infrastructures; disaster prevention systems, including the installation of debris flow warning systems, automatic monitoring systems, and measurement equipment to ensure safety of construction sites; and soil investigation services, such as conducting of surveys and tests in various situations comprising quality control, form control, and data provision. It also conducts surveys and tests on the natural environment, which comprise soil against environmental pollution; and non-destructive testing services, including investigation and diagnosis of social infrastructures, such as roads, railways, ports, airports, water, gas, and electricity, as well as buildings and condominiums. In addition, the company offers survey and design services comprising slope stability analysis consulting, pollution diffusion analysis, and construction drawing creation services; and undertakes soil remediation and ground reinforcement works. C.E.Management Integrated Laboratory Co.Ltd was incorporated in 1985 and is headquartered in Chikuma, Japan.

Sakata INX Corporation manufactures and sells various printing inks and auxiliary agents in Japan, Asia, the America, Europe, and internationally. The company offers gravure inks, flexographic inks, powder color toners, offset inks, industrial inject inks, functional coating materials, newspaper inks, and pigment dispersion for color fillers; and metal inks for equipment, machines, and consumables. It is also involved in the sale of printing plate-making and related equipment, and electronic apparatus and information-related equipment; manufacture and sale of various printing inks and auxiliary agents, and manufacture and sale of digital and specialty products. Sakata INX Corporation was founded in 1896 and is headquartered in Chuo, Japan.

Nikkato Corporation manufactures and sells industrial ceramics consumables in Japan. The company operates through Ceramics Business and Engineering Business segments. The Ceramics Business segment manufactures and sells ceramic tools, fixtures, tube, protection and insulating tube, firing container, crucible, setter, ball, wear resistant component, laboratory porcelains, and machine parts used in the production processes of manufacturers of electronic components, foods, pharmaceuticals, paints, and other products. The Engineering Business segment purchases and sells temperature measurement and control equipment and system; heating equipment; temperature sensor; and functional, and special refractory ceramics. The company was founded in 1913 and is headquartered in Sakai, Japan.

Hmcomm Inc. develops products using voice recognition processing, abnormal sound detection, and natural language analysis processing. The company provides AI utilization consulting solutions. It also promotes cybernics business related to sound, such as information technology, artificial intelligence, and robotics. The company was incorporated in 2012 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Cgs Holdings Inc. develops, distributes, and supports CAD/CAM, production management, and prototyping solutions in Japan and internationally. The company offers the EXCESS-HYBRID II V10.1, a 2D/3D integrated CAD/CAM system; and CAM-TOOL V21.1 for 5-axis machining. It also engages in the sales of computer systems related to graphics and image processing, as well as provides technical support services, and software maintenance and installation services. In addition, it is involved in the mold manufacturing business. The company was formerly known as C&G Systems Inc. and changed its name to Cgs Holdings Inc. in April 2025. Cgs Holdings Inc. was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Kitakyushu, Japan.

Daiwabo Holdings Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, operates as an IT infrastructure distributor in Japan. The company operates through IT Infrastructure Distribution Business and Industrial Machinery Business. It distributes computer appliances and peripheral devices; and provides logistics and technical services and support. In addition, the company manufactures and sells machine tools, such as vertical lathes, grinding machines, and specialized machines; and cartoning machines, automatic packaging machines, film, cardboard casers, and other automatic machinery. Further, it manufactures and sells machine parts for production equipment and casting parts. The company was founded in 1941 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Central Glass Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the chemical and glass businesses in Japan, Asia, Europe, and internationally. It offers glassware and automotive products, electronic materials, semiconductor, pharmaceuticals and agrochemicals, housing and industrial facilities, fluorine products, heat insulation materials, batteries, fertilizers, and other products. The company was formerly known as Ube Soda Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Central Glass Co., Ltd. in 1963. Central Glass Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1936 and is headquartered in Chiyoda, Japan.

Signpost Corporation provides information technology related services for the customers primarily in the financial industry and public institutions. The company operates through three segments: Consulting Business; Innovation Business; and DX/local Co-creation Business. It offers project management support and IT department support services; engages in the research, development, and sale of products and services that apply artificial intelligence (AD), deep learning, and sensing technologies using various sensors; and provides services and solutions created through formation (DX) technology and open innovation. The company also offers PMO, management and planning consulting, public consulting, and retail solutions, as well as operates touch to go and bookstore revitalization consortium systems. Signpost Corporation was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Shoei Foods Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, procures, processes, manufactures, sells, and imports food products in Japan, China, the United States, and internationally. The company offers fruits, including prunes, raisins, cranberries, blueberries, strawberries, mandarin oranges, lemons, mangoes, grapefruits, figs, dates, cherries, apples, apricots, grapes, raspberries, goji berries, pineapples, papayas, goldenberries, gingers, bananas, cherry tomatoes, aloes, mixed fruits, peaches, and pears; and nuts such as almonds, almond milk, walnuts and processed walnut products, macadamia nuts, cashews, hazelnuts, pecan nuts, pistachio nuts, coconuts, pine nuts, and sunflower and pumpkin seeds. It also provides confectionery and bread making ingredients comprising candied chestnuts, chestnut pastes, processed chestnut products, candied plums, sweet potato and chocolate processed products, maple syrups, baked confectioneries, powdered sugar, almond frost, custard powder, nata de coco and tapioca, fruit jam and filling, and fruit pickles and puree; and dairy products, which include butter, imported mozzarella and cream cheese, imported dairy products and preparations, condensed and fermented milks, cafe and confectionery ingredients, dairy lactic acid bacteria beverages, powder products, reconstituted concentrated milk, formulated milk powder, soft mix, and caramel products. In addition, the company offers foodservice ingredients, such as pasta, olive oil, tomatoes, table olives, cones, tuna processed products, processed potato products, mushrooms, steamed beans, fruit magic dolce and sauce, dessert syrups and jellies, and topping ingredients; and home products comprising prune small bags, nuts and seeds sachets, dried fruit packets, and other retail items. Further, it operates and manages walnut, prune, and almond farms. The company was founded in 1904 and is headquartered in Taito, Japan.

ATLED CORP. engages in the development and sale of software solutions in Japan. It offers X-point Cloud, a cloud-based workflow system; and Agile Works, a workflow system for organizational structuring and changes. The company also provides cloud services. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

SHOBIDO Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the planning, manufacturing, and selling cosmetic products in Japan and internationally. The company offers cosmetic accessories, clothing accessories, character goods, contact lenses, and related products. It sells its products to retailers and wholesalers. The company was formerly known as SHO-BI Corporation and changed its name to SHOBIDO Corporation in January 2020. SHOBIDO Corporation was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

GMO TECH Holdings, Inc. operates as a holding company that engages in internet advertising, real estate tech, affiliate services, internet media, GMO and DX solutions businesses. The company was incorporated in 2025 and is based in Shibuya, Japan.

Makita Corporation engages in the manufacture and sale of electric power tools, pneumatic tools, and gardening and household equipment in Japan, Europe, North America, Asia, Central and South America, Oceania, The Middle East, and Africa. It offers construction and building tools, such as cordless power cutter, cordless router, cordless breaker, battery powered random orbit sander, cordless cable cutter, and cordless hole puncher. The company also provides gardening tools, including robotic mower, cordless scarifier, cordless pole hedge trimmer, battery powered wheelbarrow, battery powered pruning shears, and battery powered backpack blower. In addition, it offers cleaning tools, including cordless vacuum sweeper, upright cleaner, and backpack vacuum cleaner, as well as cordless cooler & warmer box and cordless bar light. Further, the company provides parts, repairs, and accessories. The company was formerly known as Makita Electric Works, Ltd. and changed its name to Makita Corporation in April 1991. Makita Corporation was founded in 1915 and is headquartered in Anjo, Japan.

New Constructor's Network Co., Ltd. engage sin the earthquake-resistant wooden design business in Japan. It is involved in the housing field network development; housing field House manufacturer correspondence; and non-residential large-scale wooden building fields activities. The company also offers construction method for wooden buildings; thermal energy calculation and agency services; housing loan; and BIM solutions. New Constructor's Network Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1996 and is based in Chiyoda, Japan.

NIPPON KANZAI Holdings Co.,Ltd. provides building management and operations services in Japan. The company also engages in building management and operation, energy saving and environmental, residential management, real estate fund management businesses. In addition, it is involved in overseeing various public utilities, such as water supply, sewage treatment, and waste management facilities; and managing condominiums. Further, the company provides security; staffing; and payroll outsourcing and consulting services. The company was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Chuo, Japan.

Alpen Co.,Ltd. engages in the development and sale of sporting products in Japan. The company offers golf products; sports and casual wear, and sports shoes; training and fitness, and bicycle equipment; rackets for tennis, table tennis, baseball, soccer, and other game balls; outdoor wear; and camping and trekking, marine, and ski and snowboard equipment. It also operates golf courses, ski resorts, and fitness clubs. The company sells its products through stores and online stores. The company was incorporated in 1972 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

ASKA Pharmaceutical Holdings Co.,Ltd., through its subsidiaries, engages in the pharmaceutical, animal health, and other businesses in Japan. The company researches, develops, manufactures, and markets pharmaceutical products in the areas of endocrinology, obstetrics and gynecology, and urology; and researches, manufactures, imports, exports, and sells veterinary medicines, veterinary medical devices, feed and feed additives, reagents, agrochemicals, industrial chemicals, hygiene products, and food products and their raw materials. It is also involved in the clinical examination and biological testing activities; and offers quasi-drugs, food supplements, and medical devices. The company was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Uoriki Co., Ltd. engages in the retail, food and beverage, and wholesale businesses in Japan. The company involved in the retail of fresh fish and sushi products; and wholesale of fresh fish and other marine products. It also operates retail, and food and drink stores, as well as restaurants. It serves food supermarkets, local consignors, restaurants, and other domestic and international trading companies. Uoriki Co., Ltd. was founded in 1930 and is headquartered in Tachikawa, Japan.

Kaitori Okoku Co., Ltd. engages in the retail business in Japan. It sells second-hand goods, including clothing accessories, hobby products, trading cards, luxury brand products, precious metals, luxury watches, tickets, antiques, stamps, miscellaneous goods, alcohol, cash vouchers, etc. The company also franchises its stores. Kaitori Okoku Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

Macnica Holdings, Inc. imports, sells, and exports electronic components in Japan. It provides semiconductors and integrated circuits; and is involved in the related operations. The company was formerly known as Macnica Fuji Electronics Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to Macnica Holdings, Inc. in August 2022. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.

GMO Commerce, Inc. provides marketing support for e-commerce and brick-and-mortar stores. It also develops and provides marketing platforms that support the improvement of store CX and the promotion of DX. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Tokyo, Japan with an additional office in Miyazaki, Japan. GMO Commerce, Inc. operates as a subsidiary of GMO internet group, Inc.

NEXON Co., Ltd. engages in the production, development, and distribution of video games and mobile games in Japan and internationally. It offers PC online games, mobile games, and console games. The company was formerly known as NEXON Japan Co., Ltd. and changed its name to NEXON Co., Ltd. in April 2009. NEXON Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

G-Tekt Corporation manufactures and sells auto body components and transmission parts in Japan and internationally. It provides auto body components, such as dashboards, side structures, rear seat reinforcement components, back panels, frames, and floor components; vehicle transmission parts; and dies and production systems. The company was founded in 1952 and is headquartered in Saitama, Japan.

Tohbu Network Co., Ltd. provides truck transportation and logistics services. The company engages in the industrial waste truck transportation, freight forwarding, passenger automobile transportation, real estate leasing, warehousing, worker dispatch, automobile maintenance, and industrial waste collection businesses. It also sells cement and various building materials, automobile tires and parts, and oil and high-pressure gas; sells and leases automobiles and computers; and develops and sells software. In addition, the company engages in the insurance agency business, including life and non-life insurance; and generation, management, operation, and sale of electricity. The company was incorporated in 1943 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.

TBS Holdings,Inc. engages in the broadcasting and real estate businesses primarily in Japan. It operates through three segments: Media and Content, Lifestyle, and Real Estate and Other businesses. The Media and Content segment offers business broadcasting, program production, video technology, art production, VFX, audio technology, lighting technology, camera coverage, video investment, research and studies, various events, video software planning and production, CS business, computer software planning and development, video and audio software production, sales and distribution, various events, program sales, video software production and sales, anime and manga planning and production, and music software planning and production. The Lifestyle segment offers mail order sales, general merchandise retail, cosmetics manufacturing and sales, and educational businesses. The Real Estate and Other businesses segment offers maintenance and service businesses studio management, heating and cooling management, parking lot management, equipment leasing, insurance agency, real estate rental. The company was formerly known as Tokyo Broadcasting System Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to TBS Holdings,Inc. in October 2020. TBS Holdings,Inc. was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Cross Marketing Group Inc., through its subsidiaries, provides market research and IT solutions-related services internationally. It offers IT business services, including promotion, EC, marketing support, digital transformation, system development, and maintenance and operation. The company also provides online data collection and other services. In addition, it offers shopper marketing and medical research services. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Daiwa Cycle Co.,Ltd. sells bicycles, and bicycles parts and accessories primarily in Japan. The company offers city, electric assist, children's, girls, boys, kids, and mini cycles; sport and training bikes; and electric scooters. It also provides maintenance and repair services for bicycles. Daiwa Cycle Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Suita, Japan.

TENDA Co.,LTD. engages in the DX solutions business in Japan. It operates through DX Solution Business, Techwise Consulting Business, Game Content Business, and Others segments. The company offers Dojo, a manual automatic creation software; Dojo Web Manual, a multi-device manual creation and management tool; Dojo Navi, a system operation navigation; TEnWA, a business chat service; GAKTE, an e-learning system; MS TECH Microsoft product-related services, including Office 365 implementation support and technical services, SharePoint construction support, and Notes data migration services, etc.; D-Analyzer, an RPA business automatic analysis and implementation solution platform; Tenda's DX business reform development solutions; and Crawl Krei, a semi-custom web crawler that automatically collects the necessary data in the desired format from the infinite amount of information available on the Internet, as well as in-house study sessions. It also engages in the development and maintenance of software products; consulting services; business application development, smartphone application development, BPO services, programmer training, and on-site SE service; production of VFX/game effects, CG and metaverse effects, consumer/smart game effects, and VR effects; social game platform operation and consulting; intellectual property production and consulting; Web3 technology consulting; operation and maintenance of computer systems; and development, sale, and provision of AI solutions. In addition, the company plans, develops, and operates games. Further, it engages in the restaurant and studio businesses. The company was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in Shibuya, Japan. TENDA Co.,LTD. is a subsidiary of KFC K.K.

Jelly Beans Group Co., Ltd. plans, develops, wholesales, and retails non-leather women's footwear in Japan. The company offers its products primarily under the JELLY BEANS brand. It also imports and exports women's shoes. In addition, the company provides designing consulting, supply chain, and after-sales services. It sells its products to department stores and shopping malls. Further, it engages in the distribution of food products. Additionally, it engages in the freight forwarding; warehousing and warehouse management; rail transport; marine transport; air transport; and logistics consulting business. The company also operates online shops. The company was formerly known as Amagasa Co., Ltd. and changed its name to JELLY BEANS GROUP Co., Ltd. in September 2024. Jelly Beans Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Mobile Factory, Inc. engages in the development of mobile games in Japan. The company operates in two segments, Mobile Game Business and Content Business. It offers location-based games, including Station Memories!, EKIMEMO! Our Rails, and EKI-DASH series; and distributes ringtones, stamp materials, and other mobile contents through telecommunications carriers. The company was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Shinagawa, Japan.

Katakura & Co-op Agri Corporation engages in the fertilizer, cosmetic, chemical, feed, real estate, and other businesses in Japan and internationally. The company offers a range of agricultural materials, including chemical fertilizers and compound fertilizers, raising seedling soil, liquid, mixed, soil making, simple, molded mixed, pesticide, paste, simple, and silica fertilizers, as well as microbial material and seedling culture soil. It also supplies ammonia, industrial phosphoric acid, phosphoric acid for food and fertilizers, and sulfuric acid, as well as tank rental business. In addition, the company provides calcium carbonate for feed additives for a wide range of applications, such as poultry farming, pig farming, dairy cattle, beef cattle, and other marine products; manufactures, sells, and designs and develops synthetic clay minerals; provides physicochemical analysis, biologic analysis, quality analysis of agricultural products and crop cultivation tests, etc. Further, it develops, manufactures, and sells cosmetic raw materials for skin care, hair care, and make-up; and management, operation, and sale of real estate properties. The company was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Naigai Tec Corporation purchases, imports, exports, and sells pneumatic devices, pneumatic application devices, working machines, electric and electronic devices, and other tools. The company offers pneumatic, vacuum, mechatronics, temperature control, fluid control, environmental and energy-saving, and measuring equipment; power and electronic device; and other products related to devices and logistics, as well as products for semiconductor and liquidcrystal industries. It is involved in the assembly, repair, and maintenance of semiconductors, FPD manufacturing equipment, etc.; wholesale, import, export and other agent businesses for machines, electronic facilities, and other components; measurement and instrumentation equipment; and provision of consulting and after-sales services and related ancillary services. Naigai Tec Corporation was incorporated in 1961 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Oriental Consultants Holdings Company Limited, through its subsidiaries, engages in the infrastructure management services business in Japan and internationally. The company offers consulting services, such as intellectual services for projects related to social environment development; construction surveys, design, supervision, GIS, spatial information, surveying, and measurement; traffic observation and analysis, and information processing; IT solutions related to construction management, measurement control, and asset management; and outsourcing and resource management related to human resources and business processes. It is also involved in equipment sales and rental; geological and soil surveys; environmental and environmental cleanup; structural surveys and renovations; hydraulic analysis, well drilling, demolition work, and hot spring construction; and residential land and construction transactions. The company was formerly known as ACKG Limited and changed its name to Oriental Consultants Holdings Company Limited in December 2018. Oriental Consultants Holdings Company Limited was founded in 1957 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Nippon Sharyo, Ltd. engages in the railway vehicles, construction machinery, transportation equipment and steel structures, engineering, and other businesses in Japan, the United States, Asia, and internationally. The company offers electric trains, diesel railcars, hybrid cars, and passenger cars; and bullet, intercity and express, suburban and commuter, and exported train, as well as metro and subway, AGT, LRV, and monorail. It also provides pile drivers, full rotary tubing equipment, earth drills, obstacle removal machines; pilling, soil stabilizing, mini piling, earth drilling rigs, as well as casing rotator and crawler crane; and tank trucks, tank trailers, tank containers, storage tanks, large land vehicle carriers, unmanned guided vehicles, and freight cars. In addition, the company manufactures, sells, and erects new road and railway bridges, as well as machinery and equipment for railway operators, agricultural plants, and paper-related equipment; and provides repairs and maintenance of existing bridges. The company was incorporated in 1896 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan. Nippon Sharyo, Ltd. is a subsidiary of Central Japan Railway Company.

WITZ Corporation engages in the provision of control software engineering services in Japan. It operates in two segments, Software Business and Sensing Business. The company offers a range of embedded software for the automotive field; WiZNAR, a cybersecurity video seminar product; automotive cybersecurity education seminar products; functional safety support and cybersecurity response support solutions; and SF Twin Cobot, a simulation software for collaborative robots. It also provides WARXSS, a safety verification service for mobility; model-based development, 3D virtualization development, and plant simulation solutions; and SEAMS Guidelines, an AI quality and safety assurance product and solutions. The company was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

Torishima Pump Mfg. Co., Ltd. engages in the sale of pumps and peripheral equipment in Japan and internationally. It provides end-suction, double-suction, multi-stage, large, and specialized pumps; and mechanical seals, including single and multi-spring component, cartridge, and split seals. The company also offers installation and field testing; maintenance, overhaul, and operator training services; management and operation of the pumping facilities; re-engineering and design up, hydraulic parts upgrade, and coating services; and inspection and maintenance services. In addition, it engages in the design, engineering, procurement, construction, and commission of pumping stations; and provides engineering solutions for wind power generation systems, as well as wind assessment and location surveys, such as business plans, design, installation, and maintenance advisory services; and support services for installed wind power facilities. Further, the company is involved in reuse of wastewater energy; and wind power generation systems business. Torishima Pump Mfg. Co., Ltd. was founded in 1919 and is headquartered in Takatsuki, Japan.

Hagihara Industries Inc., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells plastic and industrial machinery products in Japan, Indonesia, Asia, and internationally. The company offers synthetic resin processing products, including flat yarns, monofilaments, sheets and sandbags, commercial printing and masking adhesive tapes, meltac cloths, base fabric for flexible container bag, artificial turf and carpet backing cloths, and barchips. It also provides engineering products, such as slitters, rewinders, yarn winders, plastic recycled pellet manufacturing equipment, extruder-related equipment, and GX line. The company exports its products. Its products are used in disaster prevention, architecture and civil engineering, industry and livestock farming, and household goods applications. Hagihara Industries Inc. was incorporated in 1962 and is headquartered in Kurashiki, Japan.

Yamau Holdings Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells concrete products in Japan. The company offers secondary, conventional, architectural, and precast concrete products; manufactures, constructs, and maintains floodgates, weirs, and dust collectors; and geological surveys, consulting, and civil engineering work services. It also provides concrete structure inspection, investigation, and repair works; sells and maintains information and office equipment; and manufactures, sells, and installs expansion joints for viaducts, bridges, and elevated roads. The company was formally known as Yamau Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yamau Holdings Co., Ltd. in April 2021. Yamau Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Fukuoka City, Japan.

Gifu landscape architect Co., Ltd. designs, constructs, and maintains landscaping and greening projects for public facilities, parks, golf courses, and resort facilities. The company offers rooftops, walls, biotopes, and other nature-friendly greening works; garden and exterior construction for private homes; planning and sales of prefabricated houses; and guidance and supervision of forestation for shopping centers, factories, etc. Gifu landscape architect Co., Ltd. was founded in 1927 and is headquartered in Gifu City, Japan.

Nac Co., Ltd. engages in rental and sale of dust control products in Japan. It operates through Kurikura Business, Rental Business, Architectural Consulting Business, Housing Business, and Beauty and Health Business segments. The Kurikura business segment is involved in the manufacture and sale of home delivery water, purified water servers, and hypochlorous acid solutions. The Rental Business segment engages in the rental and sales of dust control products, nursing care products, and welfare equipment, as well as pest control devices, regular cleaning services, and restoration work. The Architectural consulting business segment sells and constructs construction-related know-how products and construction materials to local builders, consulting services, and housing franchise business.The Housing Business is involved in the construction contracting for custom-built detached houses; sales of condominiums; and related financial services. The Beauty and Health Business segment manufactures and sells cosmetics, health food, beauty materials, and pharmaceuticals. It also offers financial services related to custom-built detached houses; import and sale of alcoholic beverages and Korean food products. The company was formerly known as Duskin Tsurugawa Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Nac Co., Ltd. in 1977. Nac Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1971 and is headquartered in Shinjuku, Japan.

Taikisha Ltd. engages in the environmental systems and painting systems businesses in Japan. The company is involved in the design, supervision and construction of building air conditioning equipment for general offices and industrial air conditioning equipment for production facilities in factories and research laboratories; and manufacture and sale of related equipment and materials. It also engages in the design, supervision, and construction of painting equipment related to the automobile industry, as well as related manufacturing and selling equipment and materials. In addition, the company designs and constructs HVAC systems for various facilities, factories, and research and development facilities. Taikisha Ltd. was founded in 1913 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Takamisawa Cybernetics Company, Ltd. manufactures and sells transportation system, mechatronics, and special system equipment in Japan. The company offers transportation equipment, such as ticket vending machine, automatic commutation ticket issuing machine, automatic fare adjustment machine, IC card charge machine, ticket issuing machine, platform door/lifting type platform fence, and hosting system; mechatronics equipment, including banknote handling, coin handling, card handling, and issuing banknotes handling machines, as well as OEM product development. It also provides gate machines, access management system, card vending machine, parking place management system, custom-made power source open door temperature control chamber, and disaster prevention measurement system. Takamisawa Cybernetics Company, Ltd. was incorporated in 1969 and is headquartered in Nakano, Japan.

MEDINET Co., Ltd. operates as a contract development and manufacturing organization that provides regenerative medicine and cell therapy solutions in Japan. It operates through two segments: Cell Processing Business and Regenerative Medicine Products Business.The company's solutions include technical know-how, facilities, systems, materials, professional cell-engineers, and other requirements to conduct immuno-cell therapy.It also manufactures regenerative medical/investigational and specified cell products. In addition, the company offers value chain solutions, such as personnel training, facility and equipment design, facility operations and management, preparation of standard operating procedures, logistics network, information system, purchasing and production management, quality management system, quality control and assurance, and technology transfer and process development solutions. The company serves medical institutions, research institutions, and biopharmaceutical companies. MEDINET Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Osaka Yuka Industry Ltd. engages in precision distillation services in Japan. The company undertakes various project works, including small-scale distillation for research; distillation production for various chemical substances; and support for the implementation of small distillation apparatuses and other items at plants. Its products are used in pharmaceuticals, agricultural chemicals, and electronic materials. The company was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Hirakata, Japan.

Superbag Company, Limited manufactures and markets paper and plastic shopping bags in Japan and internationally. It operates through Paper Products Business, Chemical Products Business, and Other Businesses segments. The company also offers Super Bag Vendor System, a bulk order and delivery system for supplies and consumable materials. The company was formerly known as Fukuda Trading Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Superbag Company, Limited in June 1963. Superbag Company, Limited was founded in 1905 and is headquartered in Toshima, Japan.

Toa Road Corporation engages in the civil engineering business in Japan. It constructs road networks and transportation infrastructure, such as expressways and national roads, as well as paving on bridges and tunnels. The company also undertakes civil works, including airport projects and civil construction parts of the road projects, as well as super express, railway container yard, photovoltaic power generation, and regional contribution and disaster recovery projects. In addition, it manufactures and sells asphalt emulsion for roads, railways, landscape, and sports facilities; asphalt mixtures; polymer-modified asphalt for heavy traffic roads, porous asphalt pavements, bridge deck pavements, and cold regions; and pavement materials for various applications, including garages and bridges. Further, the company provides pavement materials for various landscaping locations comprising historical places and parks; and sports pavement materials for use in running tracks, baseball stadiums, tennis courts, bicycle racetracks, and others. Additionally, it conducts surveying/cleaning of soil pollution; designs and builds various underground reservoirs; demolishes buildings, factories, chimneys, etc. for redevelopment projects; and provides road maintenance plans that integrate pavement maintenance techniques comprising planning, inspection/diagnosis, performance evaluation/forecasting, maintenance/rehabilitation design, etc. with asset management. The company was incorporated in 1930 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Ubiquitous AI Corporation develops and sells embedded software products primarily in Japan and internationally. The company offers various products, including Ubiquitous Securus, an anti-tamper security solution for embedded devices; Ubiquitous TPM Security, a security software solution for trusted platform module; Edge Trust, a solution for enabling secure IoT services; Ubiquitous Network Framework, a TCP/IP stack-based middleware; Ubiquitous DTCP, a link protection middleware; and Ubiquitous HDCP, a software development kit optimized for HDCP implementation. It also provides Ubiquitous WPA/WPS/Wi-Fi Direct, a software development kit for developing the functionalities necessary for wireless LAN clients to acquire the Wi-Fi certification logo; Ubiquitous QuickBoot, a fast boot solution for Linux and Android; Ubiquitous DeviceSQL, a data management software for embedded systems; and Ubiquitous USB host platform. In addition, the company offers Ubiquitous Miracast Solution, a wireless environment software for remote display connection; Ubiquitous ECHONET Lite, a middleware software; Ubiquitous Wi-SMART, a middleware software; Ubiquitous TLS/SSL, a security protocol; TOPPERS-Pro Series, an RTOS solution package; and Ubiquitous DLNA SDK, a middleware software. Further, it imports and sells software products; and provides technical support and customize development services. The company offers software analysis and development efficiency tools, security products, and support services related to its offerings. Its services include software development, distribution, and sales of data content licenses, as well as the design and production of various software, primarily contracted software for thin-film applications. The company was formerly known as Ubiquitous Corporation and changed its name to Ubiquitous AI Corporation in July 2018 operations. Ubiquitous AI Corporation was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Interworks Confidence Inc. provides temporary staffing and job placement services in Japan. The company operates through the HR Solution Business  Staffing/Outsourcing; HR Solution Business  Recruitment; and Media & Solutions Business segments. It offers staffing, recruitment, and advertising management services. The company also provides outsourcing services, such as game development and multilingual localization services, as well as game title debugging services. It serves the game, entertainment, and manufacturing industries. The company was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Shinjuku, Japan.

Hakuhodo DY Holdings Inc. provides advertising and marketing services in Japan and internationally. The company offers support in the area of digital marketing, software, media production and operation, and digital transformation. It also provides brand building services; and specializes in business development in the entertainment field, including animated programs and live events. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Cyfuse Biomedical K.K. develops, manufactures, and sells regenerative medicine-related products in Japan, Europe, and the United States. The company offers the Bio 3D Printer for use in the regeneration of various tissues and organs, such as cartilage and bone, blood vessels, and nerves; regenova, a 3D software that creates 3D data where spheroids shall be mounted; and S-PIKE that develops 3D-structures from cells. It also provides the Human 3D Mini-Liver, an in vitro MASH model that recapitulates human liver functions and predicts efficacy of drugs. Cyfuse Biomedical K.K. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

DENSO Corporation engages in the manufacture and sale of automotive parts in Japan, Rest of Asia, North America, Europe, and internationally. The company offers air-conditioning systems, including thermal management heat pump system, heat pump air-conditioning systems, personal heating and cooling devices, air quality system, heat exchangers, bus air-conditioning systems, automotive freezers, control system products, pick up systems, and cooling products, as well as heating, ventilation, and air-conditioning units. It also provides gasoline, diesel, hybrid, electric vehicle, and fuel cell vehicle power-train systems; and safety and cockpit systems, such as driving environment recognition, vehicle dynamic control, collision safety, visibility support, cockpit information, and information security systems, as well as other products. In addition, the company offers automotive service parts and accessories, comprising spark plugs, oil and cabin air filters, wiper blades, air filter elements, starters, alternators, compressors, oxygen sensors, fuel pumps, air conditioner service parts, radiators, condensers, plasmacluster ion generators, air conditioners for busses and construction vehicles, and truck refrigeration products, as well as refrigerant recovery, recycling, and charging machines; and repair and support products and services. Further, the company provides industrial solutions for factories in automotive parts production; agricultural solutions, including Profarm Controller, a climate control system for greenhouse and horticulture solutions; and home energy management system, co2 refrigerant heat-pumps and industrial systems. DENSO Corporation was incorporated in 1949 and is headquartered in Kariya, Japan.

Zeon Corporation engages in the elastomer materials, specialty materials, and other businesses in Japan, North America, Europe, and Asia. It operates through Elastomer Materials Business and High-Performance Materials Business segments. The company provides synthetic rubbers and latices, chemicals, aroma, and specialty chemicals. It also offers electronic and energy materials, specialty plastics, plastic film, carbon nanotube-related products, and medical products. Its products are used for transportation, electronics, telecommunication, civil engineering, architecture, housing, lifestyle, and industrial applications. Zeon Corporation was incorporated in 1950 and is headquartered in Chiyoda, Japan.

Sakai Chemical Industry Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells various chemical products in Japan, Asia, North America, Europe, the Middle East, and internationally. It operates through Electronic Materials; Cosmetic Materials; Organic Chemicals; Sanitary Materials; Contract Processing; Titanium Oxide and Zinc Products; Resin Additives; Catalyst; Inorganic Material; Medical Business; and Others. The company offers titanium dioxide used in a range of applications, including paints, printer inks, paper manufacturing, plastics, chemical fibers, rubber, porcelain enamel, optical glass, and capacitors; barium and strontium salt products; and zinc oxide for electronic materials, cosmetics, and heat-dissipation. It also provides plastic additives, such as metallic soap, hydrotalcite, and flame retardants, as well as calcium/zinc-based composite stabilizers; catalysts comprising De-NOx/De-DXN, hydrogenation, titanium catalysts for polyester polymerization, titanium dioxide for catalyst carriers, and catalysts for raw materials of synthetic fibers; and electronic materials, which includes dielectric and piezoelectric ceramics, spherical silica, and secondary batteries and electrode materials. In addition, the company offers cosmetic raw materials, such as titanium dioxide, zinc oxide, barium, calcium, water repellent pigments, and cosmetic inorganic fluorescent materials; pharmaceuticals, comprising prescription and OTC drugs, health foods, active pharmaceutical ingredients, and pharmaceutical intermediates. Further, it provides organic chemical products containing sulfur and phosphorus for electronics, resin materials, healthcare, lubricants, and water treatment materials sectors; and road marking materials for compartment lines, road markings, expressways, and braille sheets. The company exports its products. Sakai Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1918 and is headquartered in Sakai, Japan.

SHIKIGAKU. Co., Ltd. provides management and organization consulting services for employees. The company operates through Investment Management business, VC Fund business, and Hands-on Support business segments. It offers management consulting, marketing consulting, and recruitment consulting. The company also involved in community management, and sports and entertainment business; operating professional basketball team; and providing Sponsoring companies names and logos are displayed on player uniforms. In addition, The company support business growth through funding and management support for high-potential startups. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Shofu Inc. manufactures and sells dental materials and equipment worldwide. Its products include abrasives, bioactive composites, dental cements, and preventive and orthodontic materials; dental ceramics, indirect composites, artificial teeth, CAD/CAM materials used for crown bridge, dentures, and implant restorations. The company offers nail care products and equipment. The company was formerly known as Shofu Dental Mfg. Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shofu Inc. in 1983. Shofu Inc. was incorporated in 1922 and is based in Kyoto, Japan.

SK Japan Co.,Ltd. plans, manufactures, and sells character stuffed toys, key chains, household goods, mobile phone accessories, sarees, electronic toys, etc in Japan and internationally. It operates through two segments, Furniture Business and Customer Business. The company also sales capsule toy products to retailers. The company sells its products under HereDitail, Kigyurumi, PETTATTO OSUWARI, Mini this, Mosutomufu, and Tamashii Craft brands. It serves its products to amusement facilities. The company was incorporated in 1965 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Showa Holdings Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, engages in the digital finance business in Japan and internationally. It operates through four segments: Food business; Sports business; Rubber business; and Contents business. It develops financial technology solutions. It manufactures and sells Japanese sweets, such as rice cakes and dumplings; soft tennis, sportswear, construction of sports facilities, and tennis club operations; and rubber linings, molds, cleaning equipment, and food packing. In addition, it involved in the planning, production, editing, and design of content comprising music, magazines, books, trading card games, and websites. Further, it operates in the fields of in-house, wholesale, retail, distribution, and related licensing businesses. The company was incorporated in 1937 and is headquartered in Kashiwa, Japan. Showa Holdings Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of A.P.F.Group Co., Ltd.

Ishihara Sangyo Kaisha,Ltd. manufactures and sells organic and inorganic chemicals in Japan, Asia, the United States, Europe, and internationally. It offers titanium dioxide (TiO2) products under the TIPAQUE trade name, which includes white pigments for applications in paints, inks, plastics, cosmetics, and other products; yellow pigments; and functional materials, such as ultrafine TiO2, ultrafine ZnO, electro-conductive materials, photocatalytic TiO2, high purity TiO2, titanium tetrachride, TiO2 for catalytic use, and acicular type TiO2. The company also offers matting agents; heat shield materials; and environmental products, such as gypsum-based neutral soil adjustment agents, heavy metal absorbers and insolubilizers, iron oxide-based VOCs decomposers, and related combined solutions. In addition, the company provides agrochemicals, including herbicides, fungicides, insecticides, and nematicides; animal healthcare products comprising fuzapladib sodium hydrate, an anti-pancreatitis drug for dogs; and organic intermediates, such as CF3-pyridine compounds offered as pharmaceutical raw materials. Ishihara Sangyo Kaisha,Ltd. was founded in 1920 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Fuso Dentsu Co., Ltd. engages in the information and communication technology (ICT) business in Japan. The company designs, constructs, sells, and maintains telecommunication, electrical, and information processing equipment; designs, constructs, and manages electrical and communications work; sells computer software, system development, and consulting services; and operates, monitors, and manages customer systems. It offers disaster prevention and mitigation, resident information, internal information, and water bill solutions for government offices and municipalities; electronic medical record and nursing care, medical accounting, comprehensive medical examination, and school lunch support systems for the medical and healthcare industry; library system for schools; production control and sales management for the manufacturing sector; sales management and logistics core systems for the restaurant industry, rice wholesalers, roadside stations and direct sales shops, and wholesale/retail industry; logistics center solutions for the logistics sector; and switching equipment, network construction service, security, information sharing, and others. Fuso Dentsu Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1948 and is headquartered in Chuo, Japan.

TDC SOFT Inc. provides IT consulting services in Japan. The company provides Agile, UX design, scrum training, scaled Agile framework, security, artificial intelligence consulting, and system integration infrastructure services and solutions. It also offers SAFe, a product owner / product manager; UNIX server migration service; ASTERIA Warp, a domestic data integration tool that connects various systems in a non-coding manner; amazon web services; M-check+, a cloud application for stress check; and BP-LINKS, an EdI service that makes ordering, and monthly billing and settlement paperless. In addition, the company provides HuTaCT, a human resource talent management system; Trustpro, a cloud-based development framework; GitLab, a DevOps platform that allows you to manage version control, code review, and CI/CD in a single application; OpenCanvas; oracle ERP related services; PC procurement kitting service; progress corticon, Qlik sense; salesforce related services; SAP related services; total security services, Tegata; Trustpro; and WinActor, a software-type robot. The company was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in Chiyoda, Japan.

TOPPAN Holdings Inc. develops solutions based on its printing technologies in Japan, Asia, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Information & Communication, Lifestyle & Industry, and Electronics. The Information & Communication segment offers securities in general, bankbooks, cards, business forms, catalogs and other advertising and promotional printed materials, magazines, books, outsourcing, and other publications services. The Lifestyle & Industry segment provides soft packaging materials, paper containers and other packaging, plastic molded products, inks, transparent barrier films, decorative sheets, wallpaper, and other building materials. The Electronics segment offers LCD color filters, TFT LCDs, anti-reflection films, photomasks, and semiconductor package products. The company was formerly known as Toppan Inc. and changed its name to TOPPAN Holdings Inc. in October 2023. TOPPAN Holdings Inc. was founded in 1900 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Seiren Co.,Ltd. manufactures and markets textile products, industrial machines, and electronic parts in Japan and internationally. The company operates through five segments: Automotive Upholstery Materials, High Fashion Materials, Electronics Materials, Environmental & Life Materials, and Medical Materials. The Automotive Upholstery Materials segment offers materials for interiors of automobiles, railway rolling stock, etc., as well as seat covers, air bags, and decorative parts. The High Fashion Materials segment engages in the apparel textile processing; and provides apparel products. The Electronics Materials segment offers conductive materials, industrial wiping cloths, Viscotecs systems and supply, electronic devices, silicon wafer film deposition, and artificial satellites. The Environmental & Life Materials provides construction materials, interior materials, health/nursing products, and environmental/civil engineering materials. The Medical Materials offers medical materials, cosmetics, and water processing materials. It provides digital production systems; and civil engineering, construction, and industrial materials. The company also offers eco-friendly materials; beauty/health care materials; medical/nursing acre materials; and life/interior materials. In addition, it engages in the automotive interior, clothing materials, and textile finishing materials businesses. The company was formerly known as Fukui Seiren Kako Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Seiren Co.,Ltd. in 1973. Seiren Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1889 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

ONDECK Co., Ltd. provides M&A advisory, investment, and consulting services. It offers advisory services related to corporate and business revitalization and restructuring; and due diligence of companies and businesses. The company also provides business investment services, and financial support services. ONDECK Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Toyo Shutter Co., Ltd. manufactures, installs, purchases, imports, sells, and exports various shutters, doors, hardware, and building fixtures, materials, and consumables in Japan. The company offers heavy-duty, lightweight, aluminum, and high-speed sheet shutters; overdoor; hangar door; disaster prevention products; building materials; butterfly stop; and other products. It also provides steel, front, and special doors; residential overdoors; locks, hardware, cylinder type, and cutaway view products. In addition, the company offers architectural hardware, marine equipment/decorative hardware, and furniture and kitchen equipment, as well as disaster, crime, and flood prevention equipment. Additionally, it engages in the design, supervision, contracting, and execution of architecture and facility construction; design and construction of electrical equipment work; development of computer software; sale of computer equipment; sale, installation, and repair of machinery, equipment, and materials for various types of electric transportation and electrical equipment; and buying, selling, leasing, brokerage, and management of real estate. Further, the company is involved in outdoor advertising; maintenance work; acquisition, rental, and sale of industrial property rights, copyrights and other intangible property rights, know-how, system engineering, and other software; non-life insurance agency business; automobile liability insurance agency business; and business related to solicitation of life insurance. Toyo Shutter Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1955 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Paltac Corporation engages in the wholesale of cosmetics, daily necessities, and over-the-counter drugs in Japan. The company was incorporated in 1928 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan. Paltac Corporation is a subsidiary of MediPal Holdings Corporation.

Yushiro Inc., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells metalworking oils and fluids, and building maintenance products in Japan, the Americas, the United States, China, Southeast Asia, and India. The company offers cutting and grinding oils and fluids, including water miscible cutting and grinding fluids, and straight cutting and grinding oils; forming oils and fluids comprising water miscible cold rolling oils, straight rolling oils, hot rolling oils for seamless pipes, and non-graphite hot forging oils, as well as drawing, pressing oils and cold forging oils; and surface treatment agents, such as rust preventives, metal cleaners, car paint protective coatings, and car body protective waxes. It also provides water miscible cutting fluids for inner diamond blade saws; straight slurry bases for multi blade and multi wire saws, fire resistant water miscible slurry bases for multi wire saw, and water miscible slurry bases for multi wire saw; grinding fluids for aluminum and glass disks, and diamond slurries for magnetic heads; aluminum and magnesium diecast lubricants, urethane foam mold release agents, and plunger tip lubricants; aquaous quenchant products; fire resistant hydraulic fluids; and deodoran products. In addition, the company offers building maintenance products, including floor polishing chemicals, such as urethane and acrylic resin waxes, and water and oil-based floor waxes; floor cleaners comprising surface cleaners, stripping agents, and carpet cleaners; hand soaps; and floor maintenance equipment, including maintenance riding carts. Further, it engages in transportation and warehouse management activities. The company was formerly known as Yushiro Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yushiro Inc. in April 2025. Yushiro Inc. was founded in 1933 and is headquartered in Ota, Japan.

VELTRA Corporation engages in the provision of tours and activities worldwide. The company operates VELTRA, a tour and activity booking site; and Hawaii Activities, which specializes in Hawaii as a tour destination. It also offers activities, such as sightseeing tours, cultural experiences, gourmet tours, shows and entertainment, museums and art galleries, cruises, restaurants, spas and beauty treatments, golf, and marine sports. The company was incorporated in 1991 and is headquartered in Chuo, Japan.

Taoka Chemical Company, Limited manufactures and sells chemicals, functional materials, and resin additives in Japan and internationally. The company provides raw material for resists; one-component epoxy-based adhesives; cyanoacrylate-instant adhesives; and materials for electronic parts, as well as amide and ester imide, nylon, polyester, and polyimide varnishes. It also manufactures paper chemicals and water-soluble polymers; raw materials for drugs and diagnostic agents; and intermediates for agricultural chemicals. In addition, the company offers plasticizer for food product packaging and toys films, lubricants, floor materials, shoes, hoses, inks, rubber gloves, and food containers; methyl ester use in industrial detergents, shell mold applications, fine chemical intermediates, and base materials; dyes for fiber, paper, leather, and plastic; and functional pigments used in polarizing films, stationery, etc., as well as rubber additives, such as resin cross linking agents, tackifiers, and kneading type vulcanizing adhesives. Further, it develops and produces bisphenol derivatives; TBIS, an epoxy derivative; TBIS, an acid dianhydride; episulfide derivatives; and indole derivatives for various compounds for medical and agricultural chemical applications. The company was formerly known as Taoka Dystuffs Manufacturing Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Taoka Chemical Company, Limited in 1972. The company was founded in 1919 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan. Taoka Chemical Company, Limited operates as a subsidiary of Sumitomo Chemical Company, Limited.

TerraSky Co.,Ltd. provides cloud products and solutions in Japan and internationally. The company offers cloud integration services comprising Salesforce, MuleSoft Anypoint, Amazon Web services, Heroku, contact center, SAP migration, B2B commerce, and financial services cloud and marketing cloud solutions, as well as solutions for manufacturing industries. It also provides cloud consulting services comprising digital marketing support, DX promotion consulting, AppExchange consulting, marketing tool implementation support service, production support solutions, and data utilization support service; development support tools, such as mitoco X, floss, ACCELQ, DCSpider, skyvisual editor, and Elements.cloud services; and cloud services, including mitoco ERP, mitoco, Mitoco accounting, mitoco Work, mitoco AI, Fujitsu GLOVIA OM, Soask for subscription management, CloudSign for Salesforce, Salesforce Field Service, Insurance Agency Solution for insurance agents, Experience Cloud, Sales Cloud, Salesforce Data Cloud, OMLINE-I, OMLINE-O, ChoiceRESERVE Reservation Integration, SVF Cloud for Salesforce, MotionBoard Cloud for Salesforce, and invoiceAgent for to digitizing paper documents. The company was formerly known as Head Solutions Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Terasakai Co.,Ltd. in February 2007. TerraSky Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

HASEKO Corporation engages in the real estate, construction, and engineering businesses in Japan and internationally. The company operates through Construction-Related Business, Service-Related Business, Real Estate-Related Business, and Overseas-Related Business segments. It offers construction services for condominiums, including planning, design, construction, and sales. The company is also involved in the real estate development; real estate brokerage; construction and sale of real estate properties; large scale repair work, interior remodeling, and condominium rehabilitation; and consignment sale and real estate brokerage of for-sale condominiums. In addition, it manages facilities for the elderly; leases office equipment; provides insurance agency, printing, OA equipment rental, human resource placement, and web marketing services in support of corporate activities; and sells tools, furniture, and fixtures, as well as construction materials. The company was founded in 1937 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

AI inside Inc. develops and provides artificial intelligence and related information services in Japan.
