This segment also operates call centers, customer centers, billing collection departments, etc. The Office Solution Business segment offers energy solutions, consisting of the retail sale of electricity; office environment solutions comprising of business phones, unified threat management equipment, PCs, servers, network-compatible multifunctional devices, LED lighting equipment, and commercial air conditioners; and web solutions, such as renting corporate PR websites and creating websites, as well as manages and sells solar power generation systems and storage batteries. The Financial Planning Business provides insurance brokerage services under Hoken Minaoshi Honpo store. The company serves small and medium-sized businesses, and individual business owners. The company was formerly known as Tomei Mie and changed its name to Tomei Co.,Ltd. in 2001. Tomei Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Yokkaichi, Japan.

Ushio Inc. operates as a light solutions company in Japan and internationally. It offers light sources, such as lamps, lasers, and LEDs; light source units; injection-molding machines; mold protecting devices; joints and tubing; plastic materials; factory automation products; sound systems; cinema servers; and organs on chip. The company also provides optical equipment and systems, including lithography tools and aligners, cleaning and modification systems, measurement equipment, photoheating equipment, laboratory instruments, environment and sanitation related equipment, imaging and illumination systems, and photo alignment systems. Ushio Inc. was incorporated in 1949 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

Subaru Enterprise Co., Ltd. engages in the maintenance and cleaning of roads and road ancillary facilities in Japan. The company is also involved in the construction, repair, and maintenance of roads; operation of expressways and highway shops; and operation and management of marinas, cafes, and restaurants. In addition, it engages in the solar power generation business; property insurance business; roadside facilities; contracting repair works; consignment of store operations for toll roads, etc.; installation and sales of vending machines; sale of foodstuffs and drinking water, as well as sales of alcoholic beverages and disaster prevention goods; and real estate leasing activities. The company was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Subaru Enterprise Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Toho Co., Ltd.

Fuji United Holdings Company,Ltd. purchases and sells petroleum products in Japan. The company operates through the Oil Business, Recycling Business, Environment-Related Business, Home Energy Business, and Rental Business segments. It offers biodiesel fuels, recycled heavy oil, carbon offset fuels, fuel oils, asphalts, and lubricants, as well as AdBlue, a urea water for ammonia-based exhaust gas purification systems. The company also collects, transports, and processes industrial waste, as well as manufactures and sells recycled heavy oil; sells electricity generated by mega solar power plants; sells household fuel in small lots; and rents out construction machinery and other equipment. Fuji United Holdings Company,Ltd. was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

geechs inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the IT human resources businesses. It operates through IT Human Resources Business (Domestic), IT Human Resources Business (Overseas), SeedTech Business, and Other Business segments. The company provides matching services between IT freelance and full-time engineers and companies; and services, such as temporary staffing and recruitment overseas. It also offers on-demand programming school services and offshore contract development, as well as digital marketing support in the field of sports, including golf. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Shionogi & Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and distribution of pharmaceuticals, diagnostic reagents, and medical devices in Japan and internationally. It is also involved in consumer healthcare business; manufacturing, sale, analytical testing, and pharmaceutical engineering of medicinal drugs and investigational drugs; contracted monitoring of epidemiological components in sewage; promotion of implementation in social infrastructure; and business related to providing data and information; develops and sells foothold; and research and development of mucosal vaccines. In addition, the company provides contract support services for experimental research; contract testing of agricultural production materials; solutions for education and healthcare, system development, human resource development, and training business; marketing support services; and IT services for medical and healthcare-related issues. The company was formerly known as Shionogi Shoten Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shionogi & Co., Ltd. in 1943. The company was founded in 1878 and is headquartered in Kita, Japan.

J Escom Holdings,Inc., through its subsidiaries, engages in the digital marketing business in Japan and South Korea. It operates through Mail Order Business; Digital Marketing Business; and Other Businesses segments. The company offers digital gifts and reward advertisements. It also engages in the provision of mail order and consulting services; sale and marketing of books, magazines, and magazine advertisements; sale of hair and beauty products to beauty salons; operation of television shopping and online shops; and agency commission income activities. The company was formerly known as ESCOM Co., Ltd. and changed its name to J Escom Holdings,Inc. in 2005. J Escom Holdings,Inc. was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

Cresco Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the provision of information technology (IT) services and digital solutions in Japan. The company operates through the IT Service Business and Digital Solution Business segments. The IT Service Business segment offers enterprise systems, financial systems, embedded systems, AI systems, mobile systems, platforms, agile development, nearshore development, offshore development, RPA implementation support, data analytics, and UX design consulting solutions, as well as comprehensive IT planning, development, and maintenance services. The Digital Solution Business segment provides products and services that support customers' DX realization, such as cloud, robotics, artificial intelligence and data, security, and UX/UI. It is also involved in the provision of enterprise resource planning solutions; consulting and design development related to computer systems; and design and development of computer and package software related to personnel, payroll, workflow, and business consulting. In addition, the company provides system engineering and integration services; develops business applications and firmware/embedded software; and creates and sells software related to computers. It serves transportation, recruitment and temporary staffing, public services, resources and energy, construction and real estate, travel and hotels, medical and healthcare, banking, insurance, automobiles and transportation equipment, and machinery and electronics industries, as well as business involved in information, communications, advertising, and distribution services. Cresco Ltd. was incorporated in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Takeda iP Holdings Co.,Ltd. engages in information and communication, solutions sales, semiconductor-related masks, and real estate leasing businesses in Japan. The company is involved in the real estate rental and management operation; planning, design, printing, and logistics services for various printed materials primarily commercial printing; design of semiconductor parts; manufacture and sale of jigs and tools related to semiconductor parts; and sale of machinery and equipment. It also engages in the repair, sale, and leasing of machinery and equipment for printing, bookbinding, and paper container manufacturing. The company was formerly known as Takeda Printing Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Takeda iP Holdings Co.,Ltd. in April 2023. Takeda iP Holdings Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1924 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

OpenWork Inc. develops and manages a job and recruitment information platform in Japan. The company operates OpenWork, a one-stop job and recruitment information platform incorporating company reviews and salary information; OpenWork Recruiting, a direct scouting service; and Job Satisfaction LAB, which publishes various job- and recruitment-related reports, as well as offers analysis and reporting services to support companies' management and organizational development. It also provides alternative data services on Japanese companies. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Tokyo, Japan. OpenWork Inc. operates as a subsidiary of Link and Motivation Inc.

Takara Bio Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the businesses of reagents, equipment, contract services, and genetic medicine in Japan, China, the rest of Asia, the United States, Europe, and internationally. The company sells reagents and instruments, including reagents needed for genetic and cellular research, PCR instruments, cellular analysis devices, and in vitro diagnostics for COVID-19 testing. It also provides contract services related to regenerative medicine products and contract services related to gene analysis and testing. In addition, the company is involved in commercialization of its proprietary platform technology for biologics development; development, manufacture, and sale of manufacture ancillary materials, such as RetroNectin that is used in the manufacture of gene therapy product; application for marketing authorization of NY-ESO-1 siTCR gene therapy product; and development of JAK/STAT technology suitable for CAR gene therapy and applied development of CereAAV, a brain-tropic adeno-associated virus vector. It provides its products and services through sales agents or directly to its customers. The company was incorporated in 2002 and is headquartered in Kusatsu, Japan. Takara Bio Inc. is a subsidiary of Takara Holdings Inc.

Riso Kagaku Corporation operates in the printing equipment, real estate, and other businesses in Japan and internationally. The company offers production printers, full color inkjet printers, digital duplicators, and digital screen makers, as well as inkjet print engine under the VALEZUS, ComColor, GOCCOPRO, and RISOGRAPH names. It also engages in the leasing of buildings; print creating and digital communication business; and the application software business. It offers its products to educational institutions, government and public agencies, companies, and local communities. Riso Kagaku Corporation was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Syuppin Co., Ltd. operates e-commerce websites for buying and selling new and used products in Japan. It operates in four segments: Camera, Watch, and Writing instruments. The company offers used and new digital cameras, film cameras, interchangeable lenses, and camera peripherals; watches, and bags; fountain pens, stationery, leather accessories, etc.; as well as bike frames, parts, and accessories. The company also provides its product through stores. Syuppin Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Toyo Seikan Group Holdings, Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells packaging containers in Japan, rest of Asia, and internationally. It operates through Packaging; Engineering, Filling and Logistics; Steel Plate Related; Functional Materials Related; Real Estate Related; and Other Businesses segments. The company offers various packaging containers, including metal cans and caps; PET and plastic bottles, plastic films and pouches, and plastic trays and caps; paper cups and corrugated cardboard products; and glass bottles and tableware. It also provides steel plate related products, such as materials for metal cans, electrical and electronic components, automotive and industrial machinery parts, construction materials, and consumer electronics; and functional materials comprising magnetic disk aluminum substrates, optical functional films, pigments, enamelware glazes, gel coats, and micro-element fertilizers, as well as tin and thin plates, surface-treated steel sheets, steel bands, automatic binders, synthetic resins, and frit products. In addition, the company offers can and can end making machinery and beverage filling equipment; contract filling and sale of beverages, aerosol, and general liquid-filled products; trucking, warehousing, real estate rental management, and tourism services; and office buildings and commercial properties leasing services. Further, it is involved in the manufacturing and sale of automotive press dies, machinery and appliances, hard alloys, and agricultural-use materials; sale of petroleum products; and non-life insurance agency business. The company was formerly known as Toyo Seikan Kaisha, Ltd. and changed its name to Toyo Seikan Group Holdings, Ltd. in March 2013. Toyo Seikan Group Holdings, Ltd. was founded in 1917 and is headquartered in Shinagawa, Japan.

Fukuda Denshi Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of medical instruments in Japan and internationally. The company offers resting electrocardiograph and stress test products; patient monitoring systems, including central and bedside monitors, transmitters, and central viewer workstations; and vascular screening systems, such as data management software. Fukuda Denshi Co., Ltd. was founded in 1939 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Sumiken Mitsui Road Co.,Ltd. primarily engages in the construction business in Japan. The company is involved in the design, construction, and supervision of pavements and roads, airports, harbors, and living and community facilities, as well as landscaping, civil engineering works, and electricity and plumbing works. It also manufactures, sells, and leases construction machinery; and offers consulting services, security guard consignment, and buildings and facilities maintenance and management services. In addition, the company engages in the collection, transportation, and treatment of general and industrial waste; manufacture and sale of asphalt mixture, aggregates, and other civil engineering and construction materials; and acquisition, management, use, disposal, leasing, brokering, and sale of real estate properties. Further, it is involved in the soil and groundwater contamination, restoration, and purification activities; and generation, supply, and sale of solar power. The company was incorporated in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Sumiken Mitsui Road Co.,Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Sumitomo Mitsui Construction Co. Ltd.

Asahi Yukizai Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the piping system, resin, and water treatment and resource development businesses in Japan. The company offers ASAHIAV manual and automatic valves, and vinyl pipes and fittings; Dymatrix high performance resin valves products for semiconductor and flat panel display process needs; Falconics flow control systems; and various mixers; and provides services, including tank design and manufacturing, piping design and construction, piping prefabricated and processed product manufacturing, structural and piping stress analysis, supervisor dispatch, and piping deterioration diagnosis. It also provides phenolic resin products used in the casting process, photoresist, and various fields; resin-coated sand and aggregate products used in molds; and urethane insulation and urethane products for housing, construction, and civil engineering fields. In addition, the company engages in the development and supply of hydrothermal resources; design and construction of water utility facilities and reuse of wastewater; industrial water and wastewater treatment; and provision of maintenance and management services. The company was formerly known as Asahi Organic Chemicals Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Asahi Yukizai Corporation in April 2016. Asahi Yukizai Corporation was incorporated in 1945 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Unite and Grow Inc. operates as an IT administration insourcing company for small and medium-sized businesses in Japan. The company offers telephone IT consulting and onsite troubleshooting; regular and periodical visit services; remote operations monitoring service; and IT literacy training and management seminars. Unite and Grow Inc. was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Chiyoda, Japan.

Sansei Technologies, Inc. plans, designs, manufactures, installs, repairs, and maintains amusement rides, stage equipment, elevators, and other designed equipment in Japan, North America, the United States, Europe, and Asia. The company's amusement rides include dark rides, omnimovers, observation towers, boat rides, flume rides, tea cup rides, sky journey rides, train rides, roller coasters, and thrill rides. It also provides stage equipment, such as floor mechanisms comprising elevators for stage (Seri), orchestra, and revolving stage systems. In addition, the company offers rigging systems for raising and lowering the scenery sets, lighting, audio and screen equipment, stage curtains, backdrops, etc.; acoustic equipment; control systems; and stage equipment for small halls, adaptable stages, event halls, sports halls, and studios. Further, it provides property management and logistics services; repair and maintenance services; operates and manages amusement facilities; and rents electric and mechanical equipment for TV programs, concerts, stages, events, etc. The company was formerly known as Sansei Yusoki Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Sansei Technologies, Inc. in January 2014. Sansei Technologies, Inc. was incorporated in 1951 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

adish Co., Ltd. provides growth and adoption support solutions in Japan. The company offers growth support services for startups comprising CS Studio that provides customer success, consultation, and office-based/temporary help services; Start-up Growth Support with agile operational structure to deal with issues, such as responding to a surge in inquiries, setting communication preferences, and troubleshooting; and Internet Monitoring that provides monitoring services for appropriate postings. It also provides Adoption Support Services to business companies and educational institutions, including School Guardian, which provides support for personal information leakage on the internet and cyber bullying; Pazu for in-house measurement against flaming and social media literacy; hitobo for streamlining business operations with AL chatbot; matte, an AI alert function; and Front Support, an operational service for social media fan community. The company was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
enish,inc. engages in the planning, developing, and providing mobile games applications in Japan. enish,inc. was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

Hayashikane Sangyo Co.,Ltd. produces and sells food products in Japan. The company operates through Food Business and Feed Business segments. It offers fish meat products, fish hams and sausages, and functional foods, as well as fish and livestock feed. In addition, the company engages in information processing, refrigerated warehouse, and real estate related activities. Hayashikane Sangyo Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1941 and is headquartered in Shimonoseki, Japan.

ITmedia Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the internet media business in Japan. It operates through B to B Media Business and B to C Media Business segments. The company offers lead/prospective customer generation services comprising pipeline dashboards, ABM reports and alerts, and trade show promotions; advertorial article; email magazine advertisement; banner ads; B2B research; webcast; registration drive for in-house webinars; and sponsorship opportunities for events. It serves the IT industry, business, and consumer markets, as well as the electronics, mechanics, and manufacturing industries. The company was formerly known as Softbank ITmedia, Inc. and changed its name to ITmedia Inc. in March 2005. ITmedia Inc. was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Chiyoda, Japan. ITmedia Inc. is a subsidiary of SB Media Holdings Corp.

ASO International, Inc. operates in dental orthodontics business in Japan. The company offers SYMPHONY, an IDB system; HARMONY, a lingual correction system; CHANGE, full jaw orthodontic treatment; SHU-lider, a 3D metal-printed orthodontic device with sliding mechanics; LuxClear, an orthodontic device with shape memory properties; Form 4B, a new generation low force display method 3D printer; HEYGEARS, a 3D printer designed specifically for dentistry; AsoAligner, a transparent, thin, and aesthetically mouthpiece shaped orthodontic device; SATT SYSTEMS, a new LCD method 3D printer; WE SCAN, an AI automatic correction function and optical engine; and ASO Digital, a 3D printing and modeling service. It also offers orthodontic device, such as study models, IDB lingual/lingual, band/wire type and resin based orthodontic device, functional appliances, retainers, and other appliances; and AILINE, a tele consultation services. In addition, the company offers customized bands and metal print HYRAX. ASO International, Inc. was founded in 1982 and is based in Chuo, Japan.

Suido Kiko Kaisha, Ltd. engages in manufacture, installation, and sale of machinery and water treatment equipment in Japan and internationally. It offers various water treatment equipment, such as water generators and purifiers, indicator controllers, automatic valves, and digital residual chlorine measurement devices. The company also engages in the design and construction of water treatment, waterworks and industrial water supply, sewerage and small scale sewage treatment, industrial water and wastewater treatment, rural community water and sewerage, sludge reclamation, and sanitary landfill leachate treatment plants; design, manufacture, and sale of water treatment facility equipment and devices; operation, maintenance, and management of water treatment plants and facilities; and production and sale of industrial and chemical agents. In addition, it provides water quality inspection analysis and worker dispatching services. The company was incorporated in 1936 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Suido Kiko Kaisha, Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Toray Industries, Inc.

Mainichi Comnet Co., Ltd. engages in the real estate business in Japan. The company offers real estate consulting services. It is also involved in the rental of apartment for students; develops and sells developed condominium building to listed REITs, real estate funds, individuals, and companies; management and operation of student apartments and university dormitories; development of student dormitories; private finance initiative management; and mixed development of rental housing and commercial facilities. In addition, the company provides revitalization plans for existing real estate, such as company dormitories; architectural design; and building leasing system. Further, it offers student life solutions comprising outsourcing of student services; housing field activities; plan and arrange club activities, club and circle training camps, seminars, and training camps; planning and management of sports events; driver's license acquisition support services; extracurricular activities, including clubs, seminars, and circles; and seminar house consulting services. Additionally, the company provides Campus Career, a program developed to connect students with society; and new graduate recruitment solutions. The company was incorporated in 1972 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Mirai Works Inc. engages in the human recruitment and procurement support in Japan. The company offers FreeConsultant.jp, a freelance matching service; Skill Shift, a local side job matching service; MOREWORKS, a creator matching service; ConsulNext.jp, a consulting job changes support service; and Glocal Mission Jobs, a local job changes support services. It also provides consulting services for large companies; Re-skilling, a practical reskilling service for corporate human resources; Booster, an open innovation platform for pre-seed and seed startups, local governments, and business companies; regional revitalization project, a support services for local governments; and sustainability management support business for companies and local governments, as well as operating media outlet, such as MWRI, Career Knock, Uragawa, Glocal Mission Times, and Green Note. Mirai Works Inc. was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Betrend Corporation provides SaaS CRM services in Japan. The company offers betrend, a smart CRM system that allows companies to distribute information to customers using smartphones and mobile phones; and LINE Mini App, a web service. It also provides email marketing, call centers, customization, SMS delivery, and membership card services, as well as engages in the printing and delivering of postcards and other paper products. The company serves restaurants, retailers, and service providers. It provides its services through direct sales and agency sales. Betrend Corporation was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Shinagawa, Japan.

LiB Consulting co.,ltd provides management consulting services in Japan and internationally. The company offers services for IT; telecommunications; media; finance; industrial goods; trading companies; consumer goods; healthcare and life sciences; construction and real estate; mobility and energy; car dealer; housing and real estate; and venture and startups sectors. LiB Consulting co.,ltd was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Chuo, Japan.

Yuasa Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacturing, home building, environment building, and town building businesses in Japan. The company operates through Industrial Equipment & Tools; Machine Tools; Housing, Air & Fluidic Control Systems; Building Supplies & Exterior; Construction Machines; and Energy segments. It is involved in the sale of tools, industrial equipment and materials, control equipment, and logistics equipment; industrial machinery and equipment; pipe materials, air conditioning equipment, housing fixtures, housing equipment, design supervision and contracting of construction work, residential land, and building transactions; petroleum products; and construction machinery and materials, leasing and rental, manufacturing and sales of assembly-type temporary houses, event site construction and furnishing businesses. Yuasa Co., Ltd. was formerly known as Yuasa Trading Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yuasa Co., Ltd. in April 2026. The company was founded in 1666 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Kuze Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the food wholesale business for food service industries in Japan and internationally. It offers commercial ingredients and materials, such as dressing base, Italian prosciutto slice, crispy sheep intestine pork wiener, beer germanwurst, pan au specialty, pain au segle, pan aux noiresans, rolled egg, grated radishes, smoked salmon slices, scrambled eggs, sauces, pork cutlets, kinpei burdock, potato salad, pate de campagne, beef steak slice, beef burger patty, beef hamburger, radish and bamboo shoots, boiled radish and carrot soup stock, extra virgin olive oil, tempura flour, hakata mentaiko barako, fried chicken thighs, wheat fragrant baguette, shredded cheese, white miso, oil-free dressing Japanese style ginger, and grated onion dressing under the Kuze brand. The company also provides chiffon cakes, baked cakes, pound chocolate, danjou, shortcakes, roll cakes, mousses, mousse cakes, sponge sheets, ice creams, beans, whipping creams, coffee powder, and rice flour under the Dolceze brand name; and commercial wraps, paper towels, cooking sheets and papers, aluminum foil, alcohol spray bottle, neutral detergent, sterilizer / bleach, liquid detergent, dishwasher rinse, and hand soap. It distributes its products to hotels, halls, restaurants, pubs, fast food restaurants, catering, delicatessens and side dishes, and in-flight meal services. In addition, it proposes menus and offers products through catalog-sales system. Kuze Co., Ltd. was founded in 1934 and is headquartered in Toshima, Japan.

Sega Sammy Holdings Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the entertainment contents business in Japan, the United States, Europe, and internationally. It operates through Entertainment Contents Business, Pachislot and Pachinko Machines Business, and Gaming Business segments. The Entertainment Contents Business segment engages in the development and sale of consumer game software, such as Full Game and F2P, etc., as well as amusement machines; planning, production, and sale of animated films; and development, manufacture, and sale of toys. Its Pachislot and Pachinko Machines Business segment is involved in the development, manufacture, sale of pachislot and pachinko machines. The Gaming Business segment engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of gaming devices and casino machines; online gaming business; and development and operation of the Paradise City integrated resort. Sega Sammy Holdings Inc. was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Shinagawa, Japan.

ONEX Corporation provides metal heat treatment, remediation, and processing services in Japan and internationally. The company offers metal heat treatment services, including carburizing, carbonitriding, vacuum, high frequency, bright heat, and aluminum alloy heat treatment. Its metal heat treatment services also consist of quenching and tempering, nitriding, gas nitrocarburizing, shot peening, and PVD coating treatment services, as well as heat treatments for oversized parts. In addition, it provides logistics and information system development services. The company serves industrial machine tools, automobile parts, and construction machinery sectors. The company was formerly known as Oya Netsushori Co., Ltd. and changed its name to ONEX Corporation in July 1991. ONEX Corporation was incorporated in 1951 and is headquartered in Machida, Japan.

Prestige International Inc. provides business process outsourcing services in Japan and internationally. The company offers roadside assistance services for nonlife insurance companies, car manufacturers, and car dealerships; and property assistance services, such as home and parking assistance services for real estate management companies, parking lot operators, and car sharing service stations. The company also provides insurance services, including travel insurance claim agent services, as well as cashless medical services and other medical support; financial guarantee services for rent, child support expenses, nursing care expenses, and medical expenses; supply chain management, IT, and mobile solutions; CRM and temporary staffing solutions; and childcare service under the Orangery name. In addition, it offers pet consultation, emergency calls and reporting, towing, co-signing, rental property business management, living support, rehabilitation day, and value-added services, as well as sales promotion systems, and support for implementing supply-chain management; rental property management services; rent guarantee insurance services; and rental warranty and co-signing services. Prestige International Inc. was incorporated in 1986 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Vital KSK Holdings, Inc. engages in the wholesale and retail sale of pharmaceutical products in Japan. The company sells poisonous or deleterious substances, narcotics, quasi-drugs, medical equipment and devices, sanitary materials, hygiene goods, nursing care products, and beverages; and test reagents, agricultural chemicals, epidemiological agents and materials, industrial chemicals, veterinary drugs, poisonous and deleterious substances, paints, pigments, dyes, regenerative medicine products, and other chemicals, as well as well as chemicals for scientific use. It is also involved in the operation pharmacies; provision of medical management consulting services for medical institutions such as hospitals, nursing care providers, and local governments; wholesale of agricultural chemicals and agricultural materials; nursing care-related business; rental and sales of welfare equipment and home modification; general freight vehicle transportation activities; and insurance agency, real estate management, and parking lot operation businesses.Vital KSK Holdings, Inc. was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Setagaya, Japan.

Visual Processing Japan Co., Ltd. engages in the development of digital asset management (DAM) solutions in Japan. The company offers DAM solution to support the business activities of companies by providing assistance on media content production, management and distribution. It provides CIERTO that integrates digital asset management and product information management to support the production of content across various platforms, such as e-commerce sites, websites, videos, social media, catalogs, and brochures; APROOOVE WM, a project management solution for content production such as catalogs, brochures, videos, and websites; and WoodWing Studio, an online editing and distribution system that enables online editing of media consisting of magazines, newspapers, and documents. The company serves distribution and retail, manufacturing, service, printing, housing and real estate, media and publishing, pharmaceutical and chemical, finance and insurance, and travelling and sightseeing industries. The company was incorporated in 1994 and is headquartered in Shibuya, Japan.

Nippon Yusen Kabushiki Kaisha, together with its subsidiaries, provides logistics services in Japan, North America, Asia, and internationally. It operates in seven segments: Liner Trade, Air Cargo Transportation, Logistics, Automotive, Dry Bulk, Energy, and Others. The company offers liner trade services, such as ocean cargo shipping, ship owning and chartering, shipping agency, container terminal operations, harbor transport, and tugboat operations; air cargo transport; and logistics services, including warehousing, cargo transport/handling, and coastal cargo shipping services, as well as land transportation by trucks and rail, customs clearance, and ocean and air freight forwarding services. It also provides automotive services, such as constructing coastal and inland transportation networks, transporting construction and heavy machinery and used vehicles, and pre-delivery inspection; transport of heavy cargo and wind power-related cargo using heavy lift ships and module carriers; and energy transportation of crude oil, petroleum products, chemicals, liquefied petroleum gas, liquefied natural gas, coal, and offshore operation products. In addition, the company engages in real estate rental, management, and sale services; ownership and operation of passenger ships; wholesale of ship machinery and furniture, and oil products; information-processing business; cruise ship business through the operation of Asuka II; and other transport-related services. Further, it engages in ship management and marine technical support; research and development of transportation technology; towing; terminal security; electrical installation; supply of ship supplies; accounting; and underwriting insurance or reinsurance of assets. Nippon Yusen Kabushiki Kaisha was incorporated in 1885 and is headquartered in Chiyoda, Japan.

Unipres Corporation engages in manufacture and sale of automotive parts in Japan. The company offers car body frame products, such as front side members, rear side members, cross members, side sills, front pillars, center pillars, side roof rails, front floor panel, steering members, fuel tanks, and filler tubes, as well as battery case. It also provides precision press technology products, including torque converters, clutch pack and drum, driven/retaining plate, piston plunger, carrier pack, carrier plate/base, end plate, oil pan, and parts for cooling EV motors. In addition, the company offers plastic press products comprising front and floor under covers, front fender protectors, and rear diffuser. Further, it engages in the manufacture and sale of electric machinery parts; metal products; and welders, dies, jigs, and tools, as well as inspection and maintenance of press machinery. Unipres Corporation was incorporated in 1945 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.

PRONEXUS Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides corporate disclosure and investor relation services in Japan. It offers PRONEXUS WORKS support system for disclosure documentation; WORKS-i and WORKS-Core optional systems; outsourcing services for disclosure document preparation; E-IR, an automatic updating service; translation services; IFRS disclosure support services; and seminars and training sessions. The company also provides smart convocation, event planning and administration, shareholder benefit, web newsletters support, website production and management, and video production services. In addition, it engages in system development, infrastructure building, content creation, and client support associated with preparation of disclosure documents. Further, the company offers databases, including those containing economic statistics, industry statistics, financial information, and corporate information; business process outsourcing services tailored to preparation of disclosure documents and support for consolidated financial reporting; video equipment and operational support services across an range of occasions, including corporate events, academic conferences, trade shows, and entertainment; and rental office and administrative outsourcing services. The company was formerly known as Asia Securities Printing Co., Ltd. and changed its name to PRONEXUS Inc. in October 2006. PRONEXUS Inc. was founded in 1930 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Scala, Inc. engages DX business in Japan. It is also involved in human resources, EC business, incubation, and TCG business. The company was formerly known as Fusion Partners Co. and changed its name to Scala, Inc. in December 2016. Scala, Inc. was incorporated in 1987 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

AltPlus Inc., together with its subsidiaries, plans, develops, and operates online games for smartphone applications in Japan. It also provides licenses and business assets; and technology and human resources support services to game companies. AltPlus Inc. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Toshima, Japan.

Jenoba Co.,Ltd. engages in the positional information data distribution services in Japan. It also develops positional information systems, as well as offers positional information consulting services. It provides services for survey, land and house investigation, construction, agriculture, UAV and drone, and mobility robot applications. The company was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

GRID Inc. engages in the development, sale, consulting, maintenance, and operation support activities for systems using artificial intelligence (AI). The company offers AI solutions, such as ReNom APPS, an industry SaaS to optimize front-line field operations that support the foundations of society, such as electricity, shipping, SCM, and smart cities. It is also involved in the development, sale, consulting, maintenance, and operation support activities for applications and computer systems; and development, manufacturing, sale, consulting, maintenance, and operation of urban infrastructure solutions, as well as offers internet-based application services and management and consulting services. The company was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Escrow Agent Japan, Inc. engages in transaction support in the fields of transaction procedures and settlements related to finance, real estate, and construction in Japan. The company operates in three segments: Escrow Services, BPO, and Real Estate Auctions. It also offers business process outsourcing (BPO) service business consisting of business consignment and temporary staffing services; and escrow services comprising various support services, including information system provision for real estate businesses, financial institutions, construction businesses, and general customers. In addition, the company provides construction and development design services; business support services for professionals; and various consulting services for construction companies. Further, it offers escrow account services, trust services and inheritance procedure agency services, registration information acquisition filing system. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Harada Industry Co., Ltd. plans, designs, develops, manufactures, and sells various automotive antennas for radio broadcasting, GPS, phone, DSRC, ETC, TV, and others in Japan and internationally. The company provides fin, rod, screen, film, and integrated type antennas, as well as other antennas. It also provides cables, such as copper clad aluminum, coaxial, and shielded twisted pair cables, as well as connectors assembly and cable routing in cars. In addition, the company offers amplifiers and noise filters. The company was formerly known as Harada Electric Manufacturing Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Harada Industry Co., Ltd. in March 1958. Harada Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

JGC Holdings Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, provides engineering, procurement, and construction services. It operates in two segments, Total Engineering and Functional Materials Manufacturing. The Total Engineering segment is involved in the planning, design, procurement, construction, and commissioning services of machinery, facilities and plants for petroleum, petroleum refining, petrochemicals, gas, liquefied natural gas, etc. The Functional Materials Manufacturing segment manufacture and distributes products in catalyst, nanoparticle technology, hygiene and safety, electronic materials, and high-performance ceramic, and next generation energy sectors. In addition, the company provides consulting, real estate management, and water desalination, as well as sells oil and gas. It serves in Japan, Southeast Asia, the Middle East, Africa, North America, and internationally. The company was formerly known as JGC Corporation and changed its name to JGC Holdings Corporation in October 2019. JGC Holdings Corporation was incorporated in 1928 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.

Eidai Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of residential building materials and wooden boards primarily in Japan. The company offers flooring products, interior staircase sets, interior doors, closets, storage units, kitchen and bathroom products, and particle boards, as well as construction materials and non-residential materials. In addition, it engages in the solar power generation. Eidai Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1946 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Makino Milling Machine Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture, sale, and maintenance of machine tools in Japan, Asia, the United States, Europe, and internationally. The company offers machining centers, NC electrical discharge machines (EDM), milling machines, FMS, CAD/CAM systems, and other products. It also provides 5-axis, 4-axis, and 3-axis horizontal and vertical machining, graphite machining centers, wire EDM, sinker EDM, EDM hole drilling, and grinding machines; CNC machining monitoring programs; and automation solutions, including robot integration, linear pallet pool system, fixture plate handling system, pallet automation, and factory automation. In addition, the company provides engineering services, such as application engineering, machine tool integration, and turnkey services. It serves aerospace, automotive, die/mold/ job shops, medical, micromachining, and semiconductor industries. The company was formerly known as Makino Vertical Milling Machine Works and changed its name to Makino Milling Machine Co., Ltd. in April 1961. Makino Milling Machine Co., Ltd. was founded in 1937 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

sinops Inc. develops and sells demand forecasting and automatic ordering service systems for the distribution, food manufacturing, and wholesale industries in Japan. The company offers sinops-CLOUD, a cloud service for inventory, ordering, and forecasting; sinops-CLOUD M, which manages inventory intelligently with optimal ordering of raw and packaging materials; and sinops-WLMS, a human resources maximization AI service that makes people's work visible and support planning and development. It also provides sinops-W, a demand forecasting cash flow optimization system; and sinops-IM, an inter-base transfer instruction optimization system. In addition, it offers logistics diagnosis and improvement, and shelf allocation consulting services; implementation support; and support services. The company was formerly known as Link Inc. and changed its name to sinops Inc. in April 2019. sinops Inc. was incorporated in 1987 and is headquartered in Toyonaka, Japan.

MEEQ Inc. engages in the mobile IoT support business in Japan. It offers MEEQ, a mobile data communication service for IoT that allows to purchase and manage multiple lines from a console screen, as well as provides databases and data processing for creating IoT systems without coding or system development. The company's services include MEEQ Data Platform, which collects and processes data from IoT devices; MEEQ AI, a data processing SaaS that uses AI to process data collected and stored from IoT devices; MEEQ SIM, a IoT communications solutions; MEEQ Global SIM; MEEQ service integration, which links data in IoT storage with linked services; and MEEQ Business Tools that provides various business functions necessary for running an IoT business. MEEQ Inc. was formerly known as Sony Network Communications Smart Platform Inc. and changed its name to MEEQ Inc. in December 2022. The company was incorporated in 2019 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Japan Pure Chemical Co.,Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells precious metal plating chemicals for electronic components in Japan and internationally. The company provides gold electrolytic plating formulation for semiconductor applications, as well as PWB, connector, contact, and soldering applications; strike gold plating formulation for lead frame applications; flash gold plating formulation for leadframe uses; and palladium electrolytic formulation for connector and lead frame uses. It also offers gold plating formulation for soldering and wire bonding; electroless palladium plating formulation for wire bonding and soldering uses; and electrolytic and electroless silver plating formulations. In addition, the company provides anti bacterial agents for plating tanks and drag-out tanks; and impurity removal resin that removes Cu ions dissolved in Au and palladium plating formulation. Additionally, it offers surface treatment chemicals and stripping agents. Japan Pure Chemical Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1971 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Hakudo Co., Ltd. processes and sells metal and plastic materials in Japan, China, Thailand, and Vietnam. It offers aluminum tubes, copper, and stainless-steel plates, and bars; and elongated copper products, as well as special steel, titanium, and engineering plastics. The company was founded in 1932 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

AIT Corporation operates as a comprehensive logistics company in China and Southeast Asia. The company provides marine, air freight, motor truck, railroad cargo, and coastal transport freight forwarding; airfreight agency, customs clearance, warehousing, and ship brokerage services; and operates as an import and export, and nonlife insurance agency. It also sells and imports/exports containers and other transportation equipment; and clothing, chemicals, electromechanical parts, daily necessities, exterior products, food products, medicines, and automotive supplies. The company was incorporated in 1988 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

Nasu Denki-Tekko Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells electricity, communications, and transportation infrastructure materials in Japan. The company offers steel towers and structures, including transmission, telecommunications, and lighting towers, as well as steel frames, and equipment racks; overhead line materials, such as overhead wiring hardware, insulators, resin covers, NTT and CATV materials, wire rods, and antenna support poles for information and communications; and underground wire materials comprising cable support materials for tunnels and utility conduits, prefabricated manholes, concrete handhole products, iron covers, pipe materials, and utility pole removal materials. It also provides toll booth and transportation system materials, which include road information boards, signs, soundproof wall supports, electronic toll collection gantries, lighting and ventilation equipment, and railway overhead wire fittings; steel pipe, composite, and fabricated steel pipe columns; and assembled steel pipe poles for power generation, communications, and for disaster prevention. In addition, the company offers surface treatment solutions, such as highly corrosion-resistant plating, hot-dip zinc-aluminum alloy plating, hot-dip galvanization, low-gloss treatment, zinc phosphate treatment, and various types of painting; and air-heated hydrogen storage alloy system and hydrogen storage alloy tank. Further, it offers construction works comprising telecommunication tower, underground line facility, and road facility installation works, and deterioration diagnosis, as well as recycling of galvanized products. The company serves electric power, telecommunication, construction, expressway, and railway companies, as well as government agencies and ministry of land, infrastructure, transport, tourism, internal affairs and communications, and defense. Nasu Denki-Tekko Co., Ltd. was founded in 1929 and is headquartered in Shinjuku, Japan.

Yashima Denki Co., Ltd. engages in the plant, public/facilities, and transportation businesses in Japan and internationally. It provides plants solutions to petroleum, chemical, pharmaceuticals, and precision equipment manufacturing industries, as well as steel and non-ferrous metals plant sector. It also operates public/facilities business, which includes social and public systems, air conditioning solutions, data center solutions, and office environment solutions; and transportation business, such as vehicle, power substation, information and communications, and machinery and equipment. The company was formerly known as Yashima Denki Shokai Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yashima Denki Co., Ltd. in February 1960. Yashima Denki Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1946 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Cocorport, Inc. provides employment support services for persons with disability or serious illnesses in Japan. It offers employment transition support, employment retention support, and re-employment services. The company also provides self-reliance training and consultation support services to maintain and improve daily life skills. Cocorport, Inc. was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Kawasaki, Japan.

LaKeel, Inc. provides product, consulting, and professional services in Japan. The company offers LaKeel DX, a cloud platform that digitizes the enterprise and effectuates strategic IT; LaKeel BI, a self-service business intelligence (BI) tool; and LaKeel Data Insight, an enterprise data management solution. It also provides LaKeel HR, a human resources software; LaKeel online media services for video distribution; LaKeel messenger, a messaging tool; LaKeel eDocument, an electronic books preservation software; LaKeel workflow, a system that allow to build an electronic application and approval system; LaKeel passport, an ID management platform; and LaKeel commerce provides e-commerce solutions. In addition, the company offers LaKeel My Number, an own number for employees and their family members in lump sum; LaKeel Stress Check, a stress check tool for enterprise; LaKeel Survey, an employee survey tools; and LaKeel Process Manager, a business process management platform. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Daido Steel Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of steel products in Japan and internationally. The Specialty Steel segment is involved in automotive parts, industrial machinery parts, electrical machinery parts, construction, and tool steel business; and products and materials manufacturing, distribution, raw materials sales, transportation and logistics business. The High Performance Materials and Magnetic Materials segment offers stainless steel products, nickel-based alloys, electrical and electronics parts, magnetic material products, alloy powders, titanium products, and welding wires. The Parts For Automobile and Industrial Equipment segment provides die forgings, precise hot forgings, and welded parts, including automotive parts and bearing races; open die forgings parts for boats and ships, industrial machines, heavy electric machines, steel making equipment, chemical equipment, oil drilling rigs, and spacecraft and aircraft; and castings comprising manganese railway rails, components for automobiles, industrial machines, electric machines and furnaces, cast steel products, etc. This segment also offers precision castings for automotive, industrial machines, electric machines, telecommunications equipment, etc.; and lumber industry band saws, engine valves, compressors, hydraulic equipment, and machine tool parts. The Engineering segment provides steel making equipment; industrial furnaces and facilities; environmental equipment for drainage, exhaust, waste disposal, and treatment facilities; machine tools; and machine maintenance services. The Trading and Service segment engages in the provision of welfare services; real estate and insurance business; and golf course management and analysis businesses. Daido Steel Co., Ltd. was founded in 1916 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

Cross Cat Co., Ltd. engages in information services and related operations in Japan. The company offers digital transformation services, including CC-BizMate, which provides data collection and attendance management cloud services; CC-Dash AI, which offers data utilization and analysis, AI utilization consulting services, and PoC services; CC-MicView, which provides data utilization and analysis management dashboard construction support services; CC-Dash, which offers business intelligence (BI) system maintenance and operation services; and CC-SmartReservation, a conference booking system. It also provides system integration services for credit, banking, corporate, insurance, and public institutions, as well as staffing services. The company was incorporated in 1973 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

Power Solutions, Ltd. provides corporate IT services in Japan. The company offers business consulting, system integration, financial system development, operation support, system contract development and operation maintenance, Saas consulting, and Saas solution introduction. It also provides RPA engineering, UiPath RPA platform license sales, UiPath RPA platform implementation and operation support, and UiPath training; and infrastructure engineering services, including on-premises environment  server construction, cloud environment  server construction, network construction, and system operation services. In addition, it offers DX promotion and DX consulting services, including the development of reporting, compliance, and order-related systems for financial institutions such as asset management companies, as well as consulting for the manufacturing and logistics sectors to improve and standardize business processes. Power Solutions, Ltd. was incorporated in 2002 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

Br. Holdings Corporation, through its subsidiaries, engages in the construction business in Japan. The company operates through four segments: Information Systems Business; Information Systems Business; Real Estate Leasing Business; and Construction Business. It primarily constructs and sells prestressed concrete (PC) for bridges and other structures; and manufactures and sells railroad sleepers, construction materials, and secondary concrete products. The company also involved in repair and reinforcement; architecture; temporary staffing; civil engineering and construction; and information processing and software development businesses. In addition, it leases office space and manages rental properties. Br. Holdings Corporation was incorporated in 2002 and is headquartered in Hiroshima, Japan. As of March 23, 2026, Br. Holdings Corporation operates as a subsidiary of Yokogawa Bridge Holdings Corp..

TOA Corporation provides construction and engineering services in Japan. It is involved in marine and civil engineering, land building, development, and sale related activities. The company engages in contracting, planning, designing, executing, and supervising civil engineering and architectural works; dredging, reclamation, and land preparation activities; planning, designing, supervision, and contract works for regional, urban, resource, and ocean development; and surveying and geological investigation activities. In addition, it engages in the planning, tenure, construction, and maintenance of roads, railroads, ports and harbors, airports, waterworks and sewer systems, government offices, waste disposal and treatment facilities, other public facilities, etc. Further, the company leases equipment and properties and provides consulting services, as well as constructs power generation facilities, such as heat, electricity, and renewable energy. The company was formerly known as TOA Harbour Works Co., Ltd. and changed its name to TOA Corporation in 1987. TOA Corporation was founded in 1908 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Shinyei Kaisha engages in manufacturing, trading, and distribution activities in Japan and internationally. It operates through four segments: Food Products, Supplies, Electronics, and Business Development. The Food Products segment trades and distributes frozen foods, marine, and agricultural products. The Materials segment sells metals, machinery equipment, building materials, ball bearings, building hardware, household goods, materials and equipment, disaster prevention, real estate, and insurance business. The Electronics segment manufactures and sells capacitors, electronic, measuring, and testing equipment, as well as sensors and electronic components. The Business Development segment focuses on new business initiatives and sales of apparel. The company was formerly known as Shinyei Kiito Kaisha and changed its name to Shinyei Kaisha in August 1966. Shinyei Kaisha was incorporated in 1887 and is headquartered in Kobe, Japan.

Nagano Keiki Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells pressure gauges and sensors, measurement and control equipment, and other products in Japan and internationally. It offers various pressure gauges, including compound, vacuum, differential, and low and absolute pressure gauges, as well as diaphragm-seal type products; mechanical and electric type pressure switches and indicators with switches; pressure and differential pressure transmitters, load and level sensors, and others; digital and digital differential pressure gauges and digital indicators and meter relays; and temperature gauges. The company also provides flow and heat meters, such as water, air, and gas flowmeters, as well as heat meters and monitors; dead weight testers, liquid column manometers, precision aneroid manometers, and digital precision manometers; and accessories and regulators, ceramic products, measurement and control products, and noise level meters and vibration meters. In addition, it offers automotive electrical components, pneumatic equipment, leak testers, thermoelectric products, and precision miniature and die cast components; and maintenance and calibration services, as well as sells and distributes measurement instruments. The company serves automobile, industrial vehicle and construction, FA and industrial machinery, HVAC and refrigerator, semiconductor, process instrumentation, and medical and welfare industries; food, drug, and cosmetics industries; marine, aeronautical, and rail industries; and high-pressure hydrogen, gas, and new energy industries. Nagano Keiki Co., Ltd. was founded in 1896 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Noritake Co., Limited with its subsidiaries, provides industrial, ceramic and material, engineering, and tabletop products in Japan and internationally. It offers grinding and polishing tools comprising grinding wheels, CBN wheels, diamond tools, coated abrasives, coolants, and recycled products; ceramics and materials, such as vacuum fluorescent display, electronic ceramic powders, thick film circuit substrate, decoration materials, engineering ceramics, electronic paste, and gypsum. The company also provides engineering products comprising heating furnaces/kilns, actuator-less line mixers and related equipment, cutting machines, and filtration systems; and tabletop products, including chinaware for family table, gift, and ornament, as well as tableware for professional and institutional use. The company was founded in 1904 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.

Watami Co., Ltd. engages in the food service, home meal service, environmental, and agriculture businesses in Japan and internationally. It is involved in the operation of restaurants; delivery of boxed meals; organic farming, livestock, and dairy farming; and the development, construction, operation, and management of wind and solar power generation facilities, as well as sale of electricity. The company was incorporated in 1967 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Tazmo Co., Ltd., together with subsidiaries engages in the development, manufacturing, and sales of semiconductor manufacturing equipment in Japan, Taiwan, China, South Korea, Vietnam, rest of Asia, North America, and Europe. It operates in three segments: Process Equipment Business; Mold and Resin Molding Business; and Surface Treatment Equipment Business. The company offers semiconductor manufacturing equipment, including bonders/debonders, cleaning systems, CMP slurry distribution systems, coaters/developers, and phosphoric acid reclamation process equipment; clean transfer equipment, such as atmospheric and vacuum robots, and pre aligners; and nanoimprint fully automated mass production equipment. It also provides FPD manufacturing equipment comprising FDP/PLP and manual coaters; precision molding dies and plastic moldings, which include mold making, injection molding, emboss carrier tapes, and precision parts; and UV irradiation systems. In addition, the company offers liquid crystal displays and other electronic device peripherals; wafer support systems; color filter manufacturing equipment; and plating processing and circuit formation equipment. Tazmo Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1972 and is headquartered in Okayama, Japan.

Sakurajima Futo Kaisha, Ltd. engages in the port transportation business in Japan. It is involved in the bulk cargo handling, such as coal, coke, raw salt, soda ash, titanium raw materials, etc.; liquid cargo handling, including petroleum products, chemicals, chemical products, etc.; and logistic warehousing comprising chemical centers, central kitchen, cold storage warehouses, etc., as well as solar power generation business. It offers barge transportation, warehousing, cargo transportation, and customs brokerage business. Sakurajima Futo Kaisha, Ltd. was incorporated in 1948 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
coly Inc. develops and markets mobile online games on various platforms. Coly Inc. was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

Rokko Butter Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells cheese and other food products under the QBB and EMINA brand names in Japan. The company offers cheese, nuts, desserts, and chocolate products. The company was formerly known as peace Oil Industries Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Rokko Butter Co., Ltd. in July 1954. Rokko Butter Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1948 and is headquartered in Kobe, Japan.

Tamron Co.,Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells optical equipment in Japan, North America, Europe, and Asia. It operates through three segments: Photography Products; Monitoring & FA Related Business; and Mobility and Healthcare Products, Others. The company offers interchangeable lenses for mirrorless and DSLR cameras. It also provides network surveillance camera lenses, FA and machine vision lenses, teleconferencing lenses, and camera modules. In addition, the company offers automotive camera and drone lenses, medical devices, various optical device units, and lenses for compact digital cameras and video cameras. The company was formerly known as Taisei Optical Equipment Manufacturing Inc. and changed its name to Tamron Co.,Ltd. in April 1970. Tamron Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1948 and is headquartered in Saitama, Japan.

PS Construction Co., Ltd. engages in the civil engineering and architecture businesses in Japan. It undertakes works of precast segment, composite, corrugated steel web, composite truss, and long span arch bridges, as well as marine structures, as well as PC confined pier, and H-shaped PC pile works; and architectural section provides prestressed, precast, and precast prestressed concrete. It also offers JIS girders and PC deck slab; and architectural members, such as beams, columns, and floors. In addition, it engages in the design, manufacture, sales, and leasing of machines, equipment, and apparatuses for prestressed concrete construction and other construction works; mineral mining and contracts; purchase, sales, leasing, brokerage, ownership, and management of real estate; freight and storage business; and agency of liability insurance, life insurance, and auto insurance. The company was formerly known as P.S. Mitsubishi Construction Co., Ltd. and changed its name to PS Construction Co., Ltd. in June 2024. P.S. Mitsubishi Construction Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1952 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan. P.S. Mitsubishi Construction Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Taisei Corporation.

Eagle Industry Co.,Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures, markets, and sells mechanical seals, special valves, and other sealed products in Japan and internationally. The company operates through the Automobile and Construction Machinery Industries, General Industrial Machinery, Semiconductor Industry, Marine Industry, and Aerospace Industry segments. It offers mechanical, gas, aerospace, magnetic fluid vacuum, segmented, stern tube, brush, and lip seals. The company also provides metal gaskets, O-rings, accumulators, actuators, aerospace, bearings, tanks, coupling, joint, valves, filters, metal bellows, thin-walled metal parts, supply systems, hydraulic regeneration systems, and flow meters. It serves the oil and gas; construction, agriculture, and transporter; automobile; energy; aerospace; pulp and paper; housing equipment; food and beverage and pharmaceutical; water and irrigation; refinery and petrochemical; marine; steel; and semiconductor industries. The company was formerly known as Nihon Sealol Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Eagle Industry Co.,Ltd. in June 1978. Eagle Industry Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Toagosei Co., Ltd. Manufactures and sells chemical products. The company operates through Core Chemicals Business, Polymer/Oligomer Business, Adhesive Materials Business, High-performance Materials Business, Resin Processed Products Business, and Other segments. It provides commodity chemicals, such as liquid caustic soda, liquid chlorine, synthetic hydrochloric acid, sodium hypochlorite, caustic potash, super potash, iron perchloride solution, and Aron Zia Clean 200 hypochlorous acid solution; acrylic acid, acrylic esters, acrylamide tertiary butyl sulfonic acid, and ethylene carbonate; and oxygen, nitrogen, and argon industrial gases. The company also provides dispersants, thickeners, scale inhibitors, pressure sensitive adhesives, binders, paint vehicles, gelling agents, graft polymers, ARUFON, and macromonomers acrylic polymer products, as well as polymer flocculant; and adhesive materials, including instant glue, Aron Alpha, light-curable adhesives, high functional reactive adhesives, hot melt adhesives, film adhesives, silsesquioxane derivative, and powder paints. In addition, it offers high-purity inorganic chemicals, inorganic functional materials, and cellulose nano fiber performance chemicals; construction and civil engineering products comprising acrylic rubber protective coatings and waterproofing materials. The company operates in Japan, the United States, China, Taiwan, Hong Kong, Singapore, Thailand, Vietnam, Korea, and internationally. Toagosei Co., Ltd. was founded in 1933 and is headquartered in Minato, Japan.

World Holdings Co., Ltd. engages in human resources and education, information and telecommunications, real estate, and agricultural park businesses in Japan. The company offers subcontracting; business process outsourcing; temporary staffing services; research and development; manufacturing; development of electromechanical designs; development of information technology system designs; and medical and biotechnology research and development. It is also involved in planning, development, sale of condominiums; renovation of condominiums/detached houses; rental property brokerage and real estate brokerage business; development, manufacturing, sale, and rental of prefabricated houses; real estate fund management; and management and collection of receivables. In addition, the company engages in operation of mobile phone store and call center; and management of agricultural parks. The company was formerly known as WORLD INTEC Co., Ltd. The company was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Fukuoka City, Japan.

A&D HOLON Holdings Company, Limited provides measurement technologies and products. The company provides measurement, control, and simulation systems; FFT, sound, and vibration analyzers; digital ultrasonic flaw detectors; digital ultrasonic thickness meters; material testing machines; A/D D/A converters for semiconductor manufacturing equipment; electron guns; electronic balances; digital platform scales; weighing indicators; weighing controllers; various industrial weighing equipment; and load cells. It also offers weighing and measurement data processing systems; medical digital blood pressure monitors; various scales for medical use; home digital blood pressure meters; digital home scales; ultrasonic inhalers; electron beam photomask pattern dimension measuring equipment, electron beam photomask defect review analysis equipment, and roller mold measurement tool. In addition, the company engages in business and asset management; and real estate management. The company was incorporated in 1977 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.

Kurabo Industries Ltd. engages in textile, chemical, technology, food and service, and real estate businesses in Japan and internationally. It manufactures and sells threads and sewn products, including yarns, fabrics; flame-retardant material and anti-static fabric; insulated clothing and bedding; yarn materials for towels/socks/underwear; work environment support tools, including on-site risk management system and assistive suit; and other products. The company manufactures, processes, and sells polyurethane foam, functional resin products, housing insulation and construction materials, nonwoven fabrics, semiconductor-related products, reinforcing fabrics, and functional materials. In addition, the company manufactures, sells, and maintains electronics-related products; designs, manufactures, constructs, and sells environmental and energy-related plants; generates biomass power using biomass power plants and livestock waste treatment system; and manufactures and sells biomedical and machine tools. Additionally, it manufactures and sells freeze-dried food; engages in the management of hotel, driving school, etc.; and engages in real estate development, management, and leases real estate properties. Kurabo Industries Ltd. was incorporated in 1888 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.

zig-zag,Inc., a technology company, provides cross-border e-commerce platform services. It offers WorldShopping, a purchasing agent service for overseas customers; and WorldShoppingBIZ, a cross-border e-commerce support service for domestic e-commerce sites. zig-zag,Inc. was incorporated in 2015 and is based in Shibuya, Japan.

Y.A.C. Holdings Co., Ltd. provides mechatronics, display, industrial machinery, and electronics related products in Japan and internationally. It offers burnishers; LEDs, semiconductor classifiers, taping machines, LED classifiers, and embossed carrier tapes; slicing and dicing machines; laser anneal and drilling machines; ion beam milling and spattering equipment; and precision polishers, dust conveyers, automatic transfer systems, chip handlers, wafer handling tools, and appearance inspection machines. The company also designs, manufactures, sells, and maintains automatic packaging equipment; and provides display flat panels, such as LEDs and OELs. In addition, it offers shirt finishing systems, wool and uniform finishers, tumblers, bagging systems, sorters, and apparel equipment for clothing; dry etching and barrel plasma ashing systems; contract processing service; and UV curing machines, hard disk conveyors, conveyor/handling/automatic machines, handlers, pogo-pin insertion machines, converor and bagging machines, factory automation equipment, solar water and cell manufacturing tools, and research and development tools. Further, the company provides electronics related equipment, including electric power related measuring and control communication equipment, and heater and medical equipment. Y.A.C. Holdings Co., Ltd. was formerly known as Y.A.C. Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Y.A.C. Holdings Co., Ltd. in April 2017. The company was incorporated in 1973 and is headquartered in Akishima, Japan.

ABIST Co.,Ltd. engages in industrial design engineering service business in Japan. It is involved in the contracting based and engineers staffing activities. The company also engages in mechanical design and development, system/software development, electrical and electronic design and development, and AI solutions; and engineer training for clients, commissioned training for engineering universities, etc.; real estate leasing business; and manufacturing and sale of beauty and health products. ABIST Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Mitaka, Japan.

Amano Corporation provides time information, parking, environmental, and cleaning systems in Japan and internationally. The company offers time information systems, including time and attendance (T&A), payroll information, human resources and information, and access information systems; employee administration, cloud, and photo ID card issuing services; time recorders; and digital time stamps. It also provides parking systems, such as gate- and flap-locking type parking, bicycle parking, security gate, and toll road systems; and ticketless LPR, parking facility data center, and commissioned management services. In addition, the company offers environmental systems, including dust collectors, mist collectors, vacuum cleaners, commercial air purifiers, large-scale dust collectors, pneumatic conveying systems, measurements for powder physicality, and visualization systems for microparticles. Further, it provides cleaning and robot solutions, such as autonomous robotic floor and compact automatic floor scrubbers, compact carpet cleaners, industrial vacuum cleaners, floor polishers, electronic high-speed burnishers, hand-pushed sweepers, and electrolytic water generators. Amano Corporation was founded in 1931 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.

Nikon Corporation manufactures and sells optical instruments in Japan, North America, Europe, China, Thailand, and internationally. The company operates through Imaging Products Business, Precision Equipment Business, Healthcare Business, Components Business, and Digital Manufacturing Business segments. The Imaging Products Business segment provides digital camera-interchangeable lens type, compact DSC and interchangeable lens. The Precision Equipment Business segment offers FPD lithography system and semiconductor lithography system. The Healthcare Business segment provides products and services for the life science solutions field, such as biological microscopes, for the eye care solutions field such as ultra-wide field retinal imaging devices, and for the contract cell development and manufacturing field. The Components Business segment offers industrial microscopes, measuring instruments, X-ray, CT inspections systems; and optical components, optical parts, and encoders; EUV-related components and space-related solutions; and photomask substrates for FPDs. The Digital Manufacturing Business provides products and services of metal 3D printers. Nikon Corporation was incorporated in 1917 and is headquartered in Shinagawa, Japan.

BTM, Inc. provides IT engineering and DX solution services in Japan. The company offers human resources services. It also provides consulting and development results for system development projects. It also offers cloud services, network equipment, servers, PCs, etc. The company was formerly known as Business Total Management Co., Ltd. and changed its name to BTM, Inc. in September 2017. BTM, Inc. was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

M&A Capital Partners Co.,Ltd. engages in the mergers and acquisitions (M&A) brokerage business in Japan. It offers mediation, brokerage, advisory, database provision, and media management services. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.

Shinozakiya, Inc. engages in planning, developing, and selling processed soybean foods in Japan. It operates through two segments: Retail Business and Other Businesses. It offers tofu, soymilk, bento boxes and sweets. The company also engages in the wholesale business of retail stores, commercial customers, and mail order sales. It distributes its products through directly managed stores and mail orders under the Sandaime Shigezo brand name. The company was formerly known as Shinozakiya Foods, Ltd. and changed its name to Shinozakiya, Inc. in October 1995. Shinozakiya, Inc. was incorporated in 1987 and is headquartered in Koshigaya, Japan.

Sanki Service Corporation engages in the provision of design, construction, management, and maintenance services for various equipment in Japan and internationally.
